tests/PluginLoadTest.cpp
```
1 | // SecretEngine
2 | // Module: tests
3 | // Responsibility: Basic engine initialization and hardware activation test
4 | 
5 | #include <SecretEngine/Core.h>
6 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
7 | #include <SecretEngine/IPlugin.h>
8 | #include <SecretEngine/ILogger.h>
9 | 
10 | int main() {
11 |     SecretEngine::ICore* core = SecretEngine::GetEngineCore();
12 |     
13 |     if (core) {
14 |         // 1. Initialize Core (Scans and Loads Plugins)
15 |         core->Initialize();
16 |         
17 |         SecretEngine::ILogger* logger = core->GetLogger();
18 |         
19 |         // 2. Locate the Rendering Capability
20 |         auto renderer = core->GetCapability("rendering");
21 |         if (renderer) {
22 |             logger->LogInfo("Test", "Found 'rendering' capability. Activating hardware...");
23 |             renderer->OnActivate(); // This opens the window
24 |         } else {
25 |             logger->LogError("Test", "Failed to find 'rendering' capability! Check DLL paths.");
26 |         }
27 |         
28 |         // 3. Main Loop
29 |         logger->LogInfo("Test", "Entering main loop...");
30 |         while (!core->ShouldClose()) {
31 |             core->Update(); // Handles PollEvents via Submit()
32 |         }
33 |         
34 |         // 4. Clean Shutdown
35 |         core->Shutdown();
36 |     }
37 |     
38 |     return 0;
39 | }

tools/compile_3d_shaders.bat
```
1 | @echo off
2 | cd /d "%~dp0.."
3 | REM Compile 3D shaders for Android
4 | 
5 | echo Compiling 3D shaders...
6 | 
7 | REM Check if glslc is available
8 | where glslc >nul 2>nul
9 | if %ERRORLEVEL% NEQ 0 (
10 |     echo ERROR: glslc not found. Make sure Vulkan SDK is installed and in PATH.
11 |     exit /b 1
12 | )
13 | 
14 | REM Compile vertex shader
15 | glslc plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\basic3d.vert -o plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\basic3d_vert.spv
16 | if %ERRORLEVEL% NEQ 0 (
17 |     echo ERROR: Failed to compile basic3d.vert
18 |     exit /b 1
19 | )
20 | echo ✓ Compiled basic3d.vert
21 | 
22 | REM Compile fragment shader
23 | glslc plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\basic3d.frag -o plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\basic3d_frag.spv
24 | if %ERRORLEVEL% NEQ 0 (
25 |     echo ERROR: Failed to compile basic3d.frag
26 |     exit /b 1
27 | )
28 | echo ✓ Compiled basic3d.frag
29 | 
30 | REM Compile Mega Geometry Vertex Shader
31 | glslc plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\mega_geometry.vert -o plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\mega_geometry_vert.spv
32 | if %ERRORLEVEL% NEQ 0 (
33 |     echo ERROR: Failed to compile mega_geometry.vert
34 |     exit /b 1
35 | )
36 | echo ✓ Compiled mega_geometry.vert
37 | 
38 | REM Compile Mega Geometry Fragment Shader
39 | glslc plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\mega_geometry.frag -o plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\mega_geometry_frag.spv
40 | if %ERRORLEVEL% NEQ 0 (
41 |     echo ERROR: Failed to compile mega_geometry.frag
42 |     exit /b 1
43 | )
44 | echo ✓ Compiled mega_geometry.frag
45 | 
46 | REM Compile Compute Culling Shader
47 | glslc plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\cull.comp -o plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\cull_comp.spv
48 | if %ERRORLEVEL% NEQ 0 (
49 |     echo ERROR: Failed to compile cull.comp
50 |     exit /b 1
51 | )
52 | echo ✓ Compiled cull.comp
53 | 
54 | REM Copy to Android assets
55 | echo Copying shaders to Android assets...
56 | copy /Y plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\basic3d_vert.spv android\app\src\main\assets\shaders\basic3d_vert.spv
57 | copy /Y plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\basic3d_frag.spv android\app\src\main\assets\shaders\basic3d_frag.spv
58 | copy /Y plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\mega_geometry_vert.spv android\app\src\main\assets\shaders\mega_geometry_vert.spv
59 | copy /Y plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\mega_geometry_frag.spv android\app\src\main\assets\shaders\mega_geometry_frag.spv
60 | copy /Y plugins\VulkanRenderer\shaders\cull_comp.spv android\app\src\main\assets\shaders\cull_comp.spv
61 | 
62 | echo ✓ All 3D shaders compiled and copied!
```

tools/cook_mesh.py
```
1 | import sys
2 | import json
3 | import struct
4 | import os
5 | 
6 | def cook(input_path, output_path):
7 |     print(f"Cooking {input_path} to {output_path}...")
8 |     with open(input_path, 'rb') as f:
9 |         magic = f.read(4)
10 |         if magic != b'glTF':
11 |             print("Not a GLB file")
12 |             return
13 |         struct.unpack('<I', f.read(4)) # version
14 |         struct.unpack('<I', f.read(4)) # length
15 |         
16 |         chunk0_len = struct.unpack('<I', f.read(4))[0]
17 |         chunk0_type = struct.unpack('<I', f.read(4))[0]
18 |         json_data = json.loads(f.read(chunk0_len).decode('utf-8'))
19 |         
20 |         chunk1_len = struct.unpack('<I', f.read(4))[0]
21 |         chunk1_type = struct.unpack('<I', f.read(4))[0]
22 |         bin_data = f.read(chunk1_len)
23 |         
24 |     def get_data(accessor_idx):
25 |         accessor = json_data['accessors'][accessor_idx]
26 |         if 'bufferView' not in accessor: return None
27 |         bv = json_data['bufferViews'][accessor['bufferView']]
28 |         offset = bv.get('byteOffset', 0) + accessor.get('byteOffset', 0)
29 |         count = accessor['count']
30 |         ctype = accessor['componentType']
31 |         type_map = {5126: 'f', 5123: 'H', 5125: 'I', 5121: 'B'}
32 |         item_size_map = {'SCALAR': 1, 'VEC2': 2, 'VEC3': 3, 'VEC4': 4}
33 |         item_size = item_size_map[accessor['type']]
34 |         fmt = '<' + type_map.get(ctype, 'f') * item_size
35 |         stride = bv.get('byteStride', struct.calcsize(fmt))
36 |         
37 |         data = []
38 |         for i in range(count):
39 |             item = struct.unpack_from(fmt, bin_data, offset + i * stride)
40 |             data.append(item)
41 |         return data
42 | 
43 |     all_positions = []
44 |     all_normals = []
45 |     all_uvs = []
46 |     all_indices = []
47 | 
48 |     for mesh in json_data.get('meshes', []):
49 |         for primitive in mesh.get('primitives', []):
50 |             base_idx = len(all_positions)
51 |             
52 |             attrs = primitive['attributes']
53 |             pos = get_data(attrs['POSITION'])
54 |             if not pos: continue
55 |             
56 |             norm = get_data(attrs.get('NORMAL', -1))
57 |             if norm is None or len(norm) == 0: norm = [(0,1,0)] * len(pos)
58 |             
59 |             uv = get_data(attrs.get('TEXCOORD_0', -1))
60 |             if uv is None or len(uv) == 0: uv = [(0,0)] * len(pos)
61 |             
62 |             all_positions.extend(pos)
63 |             all_normals.extend(norm)
64 |             all_uvs.extend(uv)
65 |             
66 |             indices_idx = primitive.get('indices')
67 |             if indices_idx is not None:
68 |                 idx_data = get_data(indices_idx)
69 |                 for i in idx_data:
70 |                     # idx_data might be list of scalars or tuples
71 |                     val = i[0] if isinstance(i, tuple) else i
72 |                     all_indices.append(val + base_idx)
73 |             else:
74 |                 for i in range(len(pos)):
75 |                     all_indices.append(i + base_idx)
76 | 
77 |     if not all_positions:
78 |         print("No vertex data found!")
79 |         return
80 | 
81 |     with open(output_path, 'wb') as f:
82 |         f.write(b'MESH')
83 |         f.write(struct.pack('<I', 1)) 
84 |         f.write(struct.pack('<I', len(all_positions)))
85 |         f.write(struct.pack('<I', len(all_indices)))
86 |         
87 |         min_p = [min(p[i] for p in all_positions) for i in range(3)]
88 |         max_p = [max(p[i] for p in all_positions) for i in range(3)]
89 |         f.write(struct.pack('<ffffff', *min_p, *max_p))
90 |         
91 |         for i in range(len(all_positions)):
92 |             p = all_positions[i]
93 |             n = all_normals[i]
94 |             u = all_uvs[i]
95 |             # Handle possible VEC4 normals or UVs
96 |             f.write(struct.pack('<ffffffff', p[0], p[1], p[2], n[0], n[1], n[2], u[0], u[1]))
97 |             
98 |         for idx in all_indices:
99 |             f.write(struct.pack('<I', int(idx)))
100 | 
101 |     print(f"Done! Cooked {len(all_positions)} vertices and {len(all_indices)} indices (Merged all primitives)")
102 | 
103 | if __name__ == "__main__":
104 |     if len(sys.argv) < 3:
105 |         print("Usage: python cook_mesh.py <input.glb> <output.meshbin>")
106 |     else:
107 |         cook(sys.argv[1], sys.argv[2])
```

2 | with open('Assets/meshes/Character-Animated.glb', 'rb') as f:

tools/generate_huge_scene.py
```
1 | import json
2 | import random
3 | 
4 | def generate_scene():
5 |     entities = []
6 | 
7 |     # 1. Player Start (Looking at the grid)
8 |     # Positioned at (0, 5, -50), looking towards +Z (where the grid will be)
9 |     # Rotation roughly 0 degrees Y if +Z is forward. 
10 |     # If 180 is +Z, then we use 180.
11 |     entities.append({
12 |         "name": "PlayerStart",
13 |         "transform": {
14 |             "position": [0, 5, -50],
15 |             "rotation": [0, 180, 0], 
16 |             "scale": [1, 1, 1]
17 |         },
18 |         "isPlayerStart": True
19 |     })
20 | 
21 |     # 2. 1000 Instances of Character
22 |     # Arranged in a grid from X=-200 to X=200, Z=0 to Z=400
23 |     rows = 25
24 |     cols = 40 # 25 * 40 = 1000
25 |     spacing_x = 15.0
26 |     spacing_z = 15.0
27 |     
28 |     start_x = -(cols * spacing_x) / 2.0
29 |     start_z = 0.0
30 | 
31 |     count = 0
32 |     for r in range(rows):
33 |         for c in range(cols):
34 |             x = start_x + c * spacing_x
35 |             z = start_z + r * spacing_z
36 |             
37 |             entities.append({
38 |                 "name": f"Char_{count}",
39 |                 "transform": {
40 |                     "position": [x, 0, z],
41 |                     "rotation": [0, 90, 0],
42 |                     "scale": [15, 15, 15]
43 |                 },
44 |                 "mesh": {
45 |                     "path": "meshes/Character.meshbin",
46 |                     "color": [
47 |                         random.random(), # R
48 |                         random.random(), # G
49 |                         random.random(), # B
50 |                         1.0
51 |                     ]
52 |                 },
53 |                 "isPlayer": False
54 |             })
55 |             count += 1
56 | 
57 |     scene = {"entities": entities}
58 |     
59 |     with open('Assets/scene.json', 'w') as f:
60 |         json.dump(scene, f, indent=4)
61 |     
62 |     print(f"Generated scene.json with {len(entities)} entities ({count} characters).")
63 | 
64 | if __name__ == "__main__":
65 |     generate_scene()
```

tools/HierachyBuilder.html
```
1 | <!DOCTYPE html>
2 | <html lang="en">
3 | <head>
4 |     <meta charset="UTF-8">
5 |     <title>SecretEngine - 3D Fly-Mode Editor</title>
6 |     <style>
7 |         body { margin: 0; display: flex; height: 100vh; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; background: #111; color: #eee; overflow: hidden; }
8 |         #sidebar { width: 350px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-right: 1px solid #333; background: #1a1a1a; box-shadow: 2px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }
9 |         .panel-header { padding: 12px; background: #222; border-bottom: 1px solid #333; font-weight: bold; color: #0cf; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
10 |         #hierarchy { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px; }
11 |         .entity-item { padding: 8px 12px; margin-bottom: 4px; background: #252525; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: 0.2s; }
12 |         .entity-item:hover { background: #333; }
13 |         .entity-item.selected { border-color: #0cf; background: #2a353a; }
14 |         .entity-name { font-size: 13px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
15 |         .del-btn { color: #ff4444; border: none; background: none; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px; }
16 |         #json-container { height: 250px; padding: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #333; background: #151515; }
17 |         #json-input { width: 100%; height: 180px; background: #0a0a0a; color: #00ff41; border: 1px solid #444; padding: 8px; font-family: 'Consolas', monospace; font-size: 10px; border-radius: 4px; resize: none; box-sizing: border-box; }
18 |         #viewport { flex: 1; position: relative; }
19 |         #hud { position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 20px; pointer-events: none; color: #0cf; font-family: 'Consolas', monospace; font-size: 12px; text-shadow: 2px 2px 2px #000; }
20 |         #crosshair { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; width: 10px; height: 10px; border: 1px solid #fff; border-radius: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.6; }
21 |         button.primary { background: #0cf; color: #000; border: none; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; }
22 |     </style>
23 | </head>
24 | <body>
25 | 
26 | <div id="sidebar">
27 |     <div class="panel-header">HIERARCHY <button class="primary" id="add-sphere-btn">+ Sphere</button></div>
28 |     <div id="hierarchy"></div>
29 |     <div id="json-container">
30 |         <div style="font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 5px; color: #888;">SCENE JSON</div>
31 |         <textarea id="json-input"></textarea>
32 |         <button id="sync-btn" style="margin-top:5px; width:100%; padding: 8px; background: #333; color: white; border: 1px solid #555; cursor: pointer;">Update Scene</button>
33 |     </div>
34 | </div>
35 | 
36 | <div id="viewport">
37 |     <div id="hud">
38 |         MODE: <span id="ui-mode">WALKING</span><br>
39 |         FOCUS: <span id="ui-focus">NONE</span><br><br>
40 |         [W,A,S,D] 3D FLY MOVE<br>
41 |         [F] SELECT | [E] PILOT
42 |     </div>
43 |     <div id="crosshair"></div>
44 | </div>
45 | 
46 | <script type="importmap">{ "imports": { "three": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/build/three.module.js", "three/addons/": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/examples/jsm/" } }</script>
47 | 
48 | <script type="module">
49 |     import * as THREE from 'three';
50 |     import { PointerLockControls } from 'three/addons/controls/PointerLockControls.js';
51 |     import { TransformControls } from 'three/addons/controls/TransformControls.js';
52 | 
53 |     let scene, camera, renderer, fpsControls, transformControl, playerMesh;
54 |     let moveForward = false, moveBackward = false, moveLeft = false, moveRight = false;
55 |     let entitiesMap = new Map(); 
56 |     let selectedEntity = null;
57 |     let isPiloting = false;
58 |     const clock = new THREE.Clock();
59 | 
60 |     // DOM References
61 |     let jsonInput, hierarchyEl;
62 | 
63 |     const initialJSON = {
64 |         "entities": [
65 |             { "name": "Cube1", "transform": { "position": [-10, 0, 0], "rotation": [0,0,0], "scale": [1,1,1] }, "mesh": { "path": "meshes/cube.meshbin", "color": [1, 0.4, 0.4, 1] }},
66 |             { "name": "Character", "transform": { "position": [0, 0.5, 0], "rotation": [0,0,0], "scale": [1, 1, 1] }, "mesh": { "path": "meshes/Character.meshbin", "color": [0, 1, 1, 1] }, "isPlayer": true },
67 |             { "name": "PlayerStart", "transform": { "position": [0, 2, 15], "rotation": [-10, 0, 0], "scale": [1, 1, 1] }, "isPlayerStart": true }
68 |         ]
69 |     };
70 | 
71 |     init();
72 |     animate();
73 | 
74 |     function init() {
75 |         // Initialize DOM refs
76 |         jsonInput = document.getElementById('json-input');
77 |         hierarchyEl = document.getElementById('hierarchy');
78 | 
79 |         scene = new THREE.Scene();
80 |         scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x111111);
81 |         camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(75, (window.innerWidth - 350) / window.innerHeight, 0.1, 1000);
82 |         
83 |         scene.add(new THREE.GridHelper(100, 50, 0x333333, 0x222222));
84 |         scene.add(new THREE.HemisphereLight(0xffffff, 0x444444, 2));
85 | 
86 |         renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true });
87 |         renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth - 350, window.innerHeight);
88 |         document.getElementById('viewport').appendChild(renderer.domElement);
89 | 
90 |         fpsControls = new PointerLockControls(camera, renderer.domElement);
91 |         transformControl = new TransformControls(camera, renderer.domElement);
92 |         transformControl.addEventListener('dragging-changed', (e) => { if (!e.value) updateJSONFromScene(); });
93 |         scene.add(transformControl);
94 | 
95 |         document.getElementById('viewport').addEventListener('click', () => { if (!transformControl.dragging) fpsControls.lock(); });
96 |         document.getElementById('sync-btn').addEventListener('click', loadFromJSON);
97 |         document.getElementById('add-sphere-btn').addEventListener('click', addSphere);
98 | 
99 |         setupKeyboard();
100 |         jsonInput.value = JSON.stringify(initialJSON, null, 4);
101 |         loadFromJSON();
102 |     }
103 | 
104 |     function spawnEntity(ent) {
105 |         let mesh;
106 |         if (ent.isPlayerStart) {
107 |             mesh = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.5), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffff00, wireframe: true }));
108 |         } else {
109 |             const geo = ent.name.includes('Sphere') ? new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.5) : new THREE.BoxGeometry(1, 1, 1);
110 |             const mat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: ent.mesh?.color ? new THREE.Color(...ent.mesh.color) : 0xcccccc });
111 |             mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat);
112 |         }
113 |         mesh.position.set(...ent.transform.position);
114 |         mesh.rotation.set(...ent.transform.rotation.map(r => r * Math.PI / 180));
115 |         mesh.scale.set(...ent.transform.scale);
116 |         scene.add(mesh);
117 |         entitiesMap.set(mesh, ent);
118 |         return mesh;
119 |     }
120 | 
121 |     function loadFromJSON() {
122 |         entitiesMap.forEach((v, k) => { scene.remove(k); k.geometry?.dispose(); k.material?.dispose(); });
123 |         entitiesMap.clear();
124 |         transformControl.detach();
125 |         
126 |         try {
127 |             const data = JSON.parse(jsonInput.value);
128 |             data.entities.forEach(ent => {
129 |                 const mesh = spawnEntity(ent);
130 |                 if (ent.isPlayer) playerMesh = mesh;
131 |                 if (ent.isPlayerStart) { camera.position.set(...ent.transform.position); }
132 |             });
133 |             refreshHierarchyUI();
134 |         } catch(e) { console.error("Invalid JSON", e); }
135 |     }
136 | 
137 |     function setupKeyboard() {
138 |         window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
139 |             if (document.activeElement === jsonInput) return;
140 |             switch (e.code) {
141 |                 case 'KeyW': moveForward = true; break;
142 |                 case 'KeyS': moveBackward = true; break;
143 |                 case 'KeyA': moveLeft = true; break;
144 |                 case 'KeyD': moveRight = true; break;
145 |                 case 'KeyF': handleSelection(); break;
146 |                 case 'KeyE': 
147 |                     if (selectedEntity) { 
148 |                         isPiloting = !isPiloting; 
149 |                         document.getElementById('ui-mode').innerText = isPiloting ? "PILOTING" : "WALKING"; 
150 |                     } 
151 |                     break;
152 |             }
153 |         });
154 |         window.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
155 |             switch (e.code) {
156 |                 case 'KeyW': moveForward = false; break;
157 |                 case 'KeyS': moveBackward = false; break;
158 |                 case 'KeyA': moveLeft = false; break;
159 |                 case 'KeyD': moveRight = false; break;
160 |             }
161 |         });
162 |     }
163 | 
164 |     function handleSelection() {
165 |         if (!playerMesh || isPiloting) return;
166 |         let closest = null, minDist = 5.0;
167 |         entitiesMap.forEach((data, mesh) => {
168 |             if (data.isPlayer || data.isPlayerStart) return;
169 |             const dist = playerMesh.position.distanceTo(mesh.position);
170 |             if (dist < minDist) { minDist = dist; closest = mesh; }
171 |         });
172 |         if (selectedEntity && selectedEntity.material.emissive) selectedEntity.material.emissive.set(0x000000);
173 |         selectedEntity = closest;
174 |         if (selectedEntity) { 
175 |             selectedEntity.material.emissive.set(0x003333); 
176 |             document.getElementById('ui-focus').innerText = entitiesMap.get(selectedEntity).name; 
177 |         }
178 |     }
179 | 
180 |     function animate() {
181 |         requestAnimationFrame(animate);
182 |         const delta = clock.getDelta();
183 |         const moveSpeed = 10.0 * delta;
184 | 
185 |         if (fpsControls.isLocked) {
186 |             const moveTarget = isPiloting ? selectedEntity : playerMesh;
187 |             if (moveTarget) {
188 |                 // Get 3D direction vectors from camera
189 |                 const forward = new THREE.Vector3();
190 |                 camera.getWorldDirection(forward); // This includes the Y pitch
191 |                 forward.normalize();
192 | 
193 |                 const right = new THREE.Vector3();
194 |                 right.crossVectors(forward, camera.up).normalize();
195 | 
196 |                 if (moveForward) moveTarget.position.addScaledVector(forward, moveSpeed);
197 |                 if (moveBackward) moveTarget.position.addScaledVector(forward, -moveSpeed);
198 |                 if (moveLeft) moveTarget.position.addScaledVector(right, -moveSpeed);
199 |                 if (moveRight) moveTarget.position.addScaledVector(right, moveSpeed);
200 | 
201 |                 // Make target face movement direction
202 |                 moveTarget.rotation.set(camera.rotation.x, camera.rotation.y, camera.rotation.z);
203 |             }
204 | 
205 |             if (isPiloting && selectedEntity) {
206 |                 const targetPos = selectedEntity.position.clone();
207 |                 const offset = new THREE.Vector3(0, 5, 10).applyQuaternion(selectedEntity.quaternion);
208 |                 camera.position.lerp(targetPos.add(offset), 0.1);
209 |                 camera.lookAt(selectedEntity.position);
210 |             } else if (playerMesh) {
211 |                 camera.position.copy(playerMesh.position).add(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1.6, 0));
212 |             }
213 |             updateJSONFromScene();
214 |         }
215 |         renderer.render(scene, camera);
216 |     }
217 | 
218 |     function refreshHierarchyUI() {
219 |         if (!hierarchyEl) return;
220 |         hierarchyEl.innerHTML = '';
221 |         entitiesMap.forEach((data, mesh) => {
222 |             const div = document.createElement('div');
223 |             div.className = 'entity-item' + (transformControl.object === mesh ? ' selected' : '');
224 |             div.innerHTML = `<span class="entity-name">${data.name}</span><button class="del-btn">&times;</button>`;
225 |             div.onclick = (e) => {
226 |                 if(e.target.className === 'del-btn') { 
227 |                     scene.remove(mesh); entitiesMap.delete(mesh); updateJSONFromScene(); refreshHierarchyUI(); 
228 |                 } else { 
229 |                     transformControl.attach(mesh); refreshHierarchyUI(); 
230 |                 }
231 |             };
232 |             hierarchyEl.appendChild(div);
233 |         });
234 |     }
235 | 
236 |     function updateJSONFromScene() {
237 |         const entities = [];
238 |         entitiesMap.forEach((data, mesh) => {
239 |             data.transform.position = [parseFloat(mesh.position.x.toFixed(2)), parseFloat(mesh.position.y.toFixed(2)), parseFloat(mesh.position.z.toFixed(2))];
240 |             data.transform.rotation = [parseFloat((mesh.rotation.x * 180/Math.PI).toFixed(2)), parseFloat((mesh.rotation.y * 180/Math.PI).toFixed(2)), parseFloat((mesh.rotation.z * 180/Math.PI).toFixed(2))];
241 |             entities.push(data);
242 |         });
243 |         jsonInput.value = JSON.stringify({ entities }, null, 4);
244 |     }
245 | 
246 |     function addSphere() {
247 |         const newEnt = { "name": "NewSphere", "transform": { "position": [camera.position.x, 0, camera.position.z - 5], "rotation": [0,0,0], "scale": [1,1,1] }, "mesh": { "path": "meshes/sphere.meshbin", "color": [0.5, 0.5, 1, 1] } };
248 |         const mesh = spawnEntity(newEnt); 
249 |         transformControl.attach(mesh); 
250 |         updateJSONFromScene(); 
251 |         refreshHierarchyUI();
252 |     }
253 | 
254 |     window.onresize = () => {
255 |         camera.aspect = (window.innerWidth - 350) / window.innerHeight;
256 |         camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
257 |         renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth - 350, window.innerHeight);
258 |     };
259 | </script>
260 | </body>
261 | </html>
```

tools/package_windows.bat
```
1 | @echo off
2 | cd /d "%~dp0.."
3 | echo Packaging SecretEngine for Windows...
4 | if not exist "dist" mkdir dist
5 | if not exist "dist\bin" mkdir dist\bin
6 | if not exist "dist\plugins" mkdir dist\plugins
7 | if not exist "dist\assets" mkdir dist\assets
8 | 
9 | echo Copying binaries...
10 | xcopy /y "build\bin\Debug\*" "dist\bin\"
11 | xcopy /y "build\bin\Release\*" "dist\bin\"
12 | 
13 | echo Copying plugins...
14 | xcopy /s /y "build\tests\Debug\plugins\*" "dist\plugins\"
15 | 
16 | echo Copying assets...
17 | xcopy /s /y "Assets\*" "dist\assets\"
18 | 
19 | echo Done! Package available in dist/ folder.
```

tools/PollEvents()
```
```

tools/quick_build.bat
```
1 | @echo off
2 | cd /d "%~dp0.."
3 | echo ========================================
4 | echo   SecretEngine - Quick Build Script
5 | echo ========================================
6 | echo.
7 | 
8 | echo [1/3] Building APK...
9 | cd android
10 | call gradlew.bat assembleDebug
11 | if %ERRORLEVEL% NEQ 0 (
12 |     echo ERROR: Build failed!
13 |     pause
14 |     exit /b 1
15 | )
16 | cd ..
17 | 
18 | echo.
19 | echo [2/3] Installing APK...
20 | adb install -r android\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk
21 | if %ERRORLEVEL% NEQ 0 (
22 |     echo ERROR: Installation failed! Is device connected?
23 |     echo Run 'adb devices' to check.
24 |     pause
25 |     exit /b 1
26 | )
27 | 
28 | echo.
29 | echo [3/3] Starting logcat monitor...
30 | echo Press Ctrl+C to stop monitoring
31 | echo.
32 | adb logcat | findstr SecretEngine
33 | 
34 | pause
```

android/app/build.gradle
```
1 | plugins {
2 |     id 'com.android.application'
3 | }
4 | 
5 | android {
6 |     namespace 'com.secretengine.game'
7 |     compileSdk 34
8 | 
9 |     defaultConfig {
10 |         applicationId "com.secretengine.game"
11 |         minSdk 26
12 |         targetSdk 34
13 |         versionCode 1
14 |         versionName "1.0"
15 | 
16 |         externalNativeBuild {
17 |             cmake {
18 |                 arguments "-DANDROID_STL=c++_static"
19 |             }
20 |         }
21 |         ndk {
22 |             // Build for modern Android phones (ARM64) and PC Emulators (x86_64)
23 |             abiFilters 'arm64-v8a', 'x86_64'
24 |         }
25 |     }
26 | 
27 |     packaging {
28 |         jniLibs {
29 |             useLegacyPackaging = true
30 |         }
31 |     }
32 | 
33 |     buildTypes {
34 |         release {
35 |             minifyEnabled false
36 |             proguardFiles getDefaultProguardFile('proguard-android-optimize.txt'), 'proguard-rules.pro'
37 |         }
38 |     }
39 |     
40 |     externalNativeBuild {
41 |         cmake {
42 |             // FIX: Points to C:/SecretEngine/CMakeLists.txt
43 |             path file('../../CMakeLists.txt')
44 |             version '3.22.1'
45 |         }
46 |     }
47 |     
48 |     buildFeatures {
49 |         viewBinding true
50 |     }
51 | }
52 | 
53 | dependencies {
54 |     implementation 'androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.6.1'
55 |     implementation 'com.google.android.material:material:1.11.0'
56 |     implementation 'androidx.games:games-activity:3.0.0'
57 | }
```

1 | #␀␀␀␀␀f␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀GLSL.std.450␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀main␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀$␀␀␀-␀␀␀W␀␀␀Y␀␀␀_␀␀␀a␀␀␀c␀␀␀d␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀�␀␀␀

core/src/AssetProvider.cpp
```
1 | // SecretEngine
2 | // Module: core
3 | // Responsibility: Platform-agnostic asset loading implementation
4 | // Dependencies: IAssetProvider, ILogger
5 | 
6 | #include <SecretEngine/IAssetProvider.h>
7 | #include <SecretEngine/ILogger.h>
8 | #include <fstream>
9 | #include <vector>
10 | 
11 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
12 | #include <android/asset_manager.h>
13 | #include <android_native_app_glue.h>
14 | extern struct android_app* g_AndroidApp;
15 | #endif
16 | 
17 | namespace SecretEngine {
18 | 
19 | class AssetProvider : public IAssetProvider {
20 | public:
21 |     AssetProvider(ILogger* logger) : m_logger(logger) {}
22 | 
23 |     std::vector<char> LoadBinary(const char* path) override {
24 |         std::vector<char> buffer;
25 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
26 |         if (g_AndroidApp && g_AndroidApp->activity && g_AndroidApp->activity->assetManager) {
27 |             AAsset* asset = AAssetManager_open(g_AndroidApp->activity->assetManager, path, AASSET_MODE_BUFFER);
28 |             if (asset) {
29 |                 const void* assetData = AAsset_getBuffer(asset);
30 |                 size_t size = AAsset_getLength(asset);
31 |                 if (assetData) {
32 |                     // Stage 1 NITRO: Zero-Copy Direct Access
33 |                     const char* dataPtr = static_cast<const char*>(assetData);
34 |                     buffer.assign(dataPtr, dataPtr + size);
35 |                 } else {
36 |                     // Fallback to read if buffer access fails
37 |                     buffer.resize(size);
38 |                     AAsset_read(asset, buffer.data(), size);
39 |                 }
40 |                 AAsset_close(asset);
41 |                 return buffer;
42 |             }
43 |         }
44 | #else
45 |         // Windows Path Resolution (Root, Assets/, ../Assets/)
46 |         const char* fallbacks[] = { "", "Assets/", "../Assets/", "../../Assets/" };
47 |         for (const char* prefix : fallbacks) {
48 |             std::string fullPath = std::string(prefix) + path;
49 |             std::ifstream file(fullPath, std::ios::binary | std::ios::ate);
50 |             if (file.is_open()) {
51 |                 size_t size = (size_t)file.tellg();
52 |                 buffer.resize(size);
53 |                 file.seekg(0);
54 |                 file.read(buffer.data(), size);
55 |                 file.close();
56 |                 return buffer;
57 |             }
58 |         }
59 | #endif
60 |         if (m_logger) m_logger->LogError("AssetProvider", (std::string("Failed to load asset: ") + path).c_str());
61 |         return {};
62 |     }
63 | 
64 |     bool LoadBinaryToBuffer(const char* path, void* dest, size_t size) override {
65 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
66 |         if (g_AndroidApp && g_AndroidApp->activity && g_AndroidApp->activity->assetManager) {
67 |             AAsset* asset = AAssetManager_open(g_AndroidApp->activity->assetManager, path, AASSET_MODE_BUFFER);
68 |             if (asset) {
69 |                 const void* assetData = AAsset_getBuffer(asset);
70 |                 size_t assetSize = AAsset_getLength(asset);
71 |                 size_t toRead = (size < assetSize) ? size : assetSize;
72 |                 
73 |                 if (assetData) {
74 |                     // NITRO: Direct memory-to-memory copy without intermediate buffering
75 |                     memcpy(dest, assetData, toRead);
76 |                 } else {
77 |                     AAsset_read(asset, dest, toRead);
78 |                 }
79 |                 AAsset_close(asset);
80 |                 return true;
81 |             }
82 |         }
83 | #else
84 |         const char* fallbacks[] = { "", "Assets/", "../Assets/", "../../Assets/" };
85 |         for (const char* prefix : fallbacks) {
86 |             std::string fullPath = std::string(prefix) + path;
87 |             std::ifstream file(fullPath, std::ios::binary);
88 |             if (file.is_open()) {
89 |                 file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(dest), size);
90 |                 file.close();
91 |                 return true;
92 |             }
93 |         }
94 | #endif
95 |         return false;
96 |     }
97 | 
98 |     std::string LoadText(const char* path) override {
99 |         auto binary = LoadBinary(path);
100 |         return std::string(binary.begin(), binary.end());
101 |     }
102 | 
103 |     bool Exists(const char* path) override {
104 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
105 |         if (g_AndroidApp && g_AndroidApp->activity && g_AndroidApp->activity->assetManager) {
106 |             AAsset* asset = AAssetManager_open(g_AndroidApp->activity->assetManager, path, AASSET_MODE_UNKNOWN);
107 |             if (asset) {
108 |                 AAsset_close(asset);
109 |                 return true;
110 |             }
111 |         }
112 |         return false;
113 | #else
114 |         const char* fallbacks[] = { "", "Assets/", "../Assets/", "../../Assets/" };
115 |         for (const char* prefix : fallbacks) {
116 |             std::string fullPath = std::string(prefix) + path;
117 |             std::ifstream file(fullPath);
118 |             if (file.is_open()) return true;
119 |         }
120 |         return false;
121 | #endif
122 |     }
123 | 
124 | private:
125 |     ILogger* m_logger;
126 | };
127 | 
128 | IAssetProvider* CreateAssetProvider(ILogger* logger) {
129 |     return new AssetProvider(logger);
130 | }
131 | 
132 | } // namespace SecretEngine
```

core/src/Core.cpp
```
1 | // SecretEngine
2 | // Module: core
3 | // Responsibility: Main engine implementation and service registry
4 | // Dependencies: ICore, SystemAllocator, Logger, PluginManager, IRenderer
5 | 
6 | #include <SecretEngine/Core.h>
7 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
8 | #include <SecretEngine/IRenderer.h> // FIX: Resolve C2061 identifier 'IRenderer'
9 | #include <SecretEngine/IWorld.h>
10 | #include <SecretEngine/IInputSystem.h>
11 | #include <SecretEngine/IAssetProvider.h>
12 | #include "SystemAllocator.h"
13 | #include "Logger.h"
14 | #include "PluginManager.h"
15 | #include <map>
16 | #include <string>
17 | 
18 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
19 | extern "C" SecretEngine::IPlugin* CreateVulkanRendererPlugin();
20 | extern "C" SecretEngine::IPlugin* CreateInputPlugin();
21 | extern "C" SecretEngine::IPlugin* CreateCameraPlugin();
22 | extern "C" SecretEngine::IPlugin* CreateLogicPlugin();
23 | extern "C" SecretEngine::IPlugin* CreateDebugPlugin();
24 | #endif
25 | 
26 | #include <chrono>
27 | 
28 | namespace SecretEngine {
29 |     extern IWorld* CreateWorld();
30 |     extern IAssetProvider* CreateAssetProvider(ILogger* logger);
31 | 
32 |     class Core : public ICore {
33 |     public:
34 |         static Core* GetInstance() {
35 |             static Core instance;
36 |             return &instance;
37 |         }
38 | 
39 |         void Initialize() override {
40 |             m_allocator = new SystemAllocator();
41 |             m_logger = new Logger();
42 |             m_assetProvider = CreateAssetProvider(m_logger);
43 |             m_pluginManager = new PluginManager();
44 |             m_world = CreateWorld();
45 |             m_lastTime = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
46 |             m_logger->LogInfo("Core", "SecretEngine Initializing...");
47 |             
48 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
49 |             IPlugin* renderer = CreateVulkanRendererPlugin();
50 |             if (renderer) {
51 |                 renderer->OnLoad(this);
52 |             }
53 |             
54 |             IPlugin* input = CreateInputPlugin();
55 |             if (input) {
56 |                 input->OnLoad(this);
57 |             }
58 |             
59 |             IPlugin* camera = CreateCameraPlugin();
60 |             if (camera) {
61 |                 camera->OnLoad(this);
62 |             }
63 |             
64 |             IPlugin* logic = CreateLogicPlugin();
65 |             if (logic) {
66 |                 logic->OnLoad(this);
67 |             }
68 | 
69 |             IPlugin* debug = CreateDebugPlugin();
70 |             if (debug) {
71 |                 debug->OnLoad(this);
72 |             }
73 | 
74 |             // Activate all loaded plugins
75 |             for (auto const& [name, plugin] : m_capabilities) {
76 |                 if (plugin) {
77 |                     plugin->OnActivate();
78 |                 }
79 |             }
80 | #else
81 |             m_pluginManager->ScanPlugins("plugins", this); 
82 | #endif
83 |         }
84 | 
85 |         void Update() override {
86 |             // Calculate Delta Time
87 |             auto currentTime = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
88 |             float dt = std::chrono::duration<float>(currentTime - m_lastTime).count();
89 |             m_lastTime = currentTime;
90 | 
91 |             // Update all plugins (includes camera, renderer, logic)
92 |             for (auto const& [name, plugin] : m_capabilities) {
93 |                 plugin->OnUpdate(dt);
94 |             }
95 | 
96 |             auto plugin = GetCapability("rendering");
97 |             if (plugin && m_isRendererReady) {
98 |                 IRenderer* renderer = static_cast<IRenderer*>(plugin->GetInterface(1));
99 |                 if (renderer) {
100 |                     renderer->Submit(); 
101 |                     renderer->Present();
102 |                 }
103 |                 
104 |                 static bool firstFrame = true;
105 |                 if (firstFrame) {
106 |                     if (m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo("Core", "First frame rendered!");
107 |                     firstFrame = false;
108 |                 }
109 |             }
110 |         }
111 | 
112 |         void SetRendererReady(bool ready) override {
113 |             m_isRendererReady = ready;
114 |         }
115 | 
116 |         bool ShouldClose() const override {
117 |             return m_shouldClose;
118 |         }
119 | 
120 |         void Shutdown() override {
121 |             m_logger->LogInfo("Core", "SecretEngine Shutting down...");
122 |             if (m_pluginManager) {
123 |                 m_pluginManager->UnloadAll();
124 |                 delete m_pluginManager;
125 |             }
126 |             if (m_world) delete m_world;
127 |             if (m_assetProvider) delete m_assetProvider;
128 |             delete m_logger;
129 |             delete m_allocator;
130 |         }
131 | 
132 |         IAllocator* GetAllocator(const char* name) override { return m_allocator; }
133 |         ILogger* GetLogger() override { return m_logger; }
134 |         IWorld* GetWorld() override { return m_world; }
135 |         IInputSystem* GetInput() override { 
136 |             auto input = GetCapability("input");
137 |             return input ? static_cast<IInputSystem*>(input->GetInterface(2)) : nullptr;
138 |         }
139 | 
140 |         IAssetProvider* GetAssetProvider() override {
141 |             return m_assetProvider;
142 |         }
143 | 
144 |         void RegisterCapability(const char* name, IPlugin* plugin) override {
145 |             m_capabilities[name] = plugin;
146 |             m_logger->LogInfo("Core", ("Registered Capability: " + std::string(name)).c_str());
147 |         }
148 | 
149 |         IPlugin* GetCapability(const char* name) override {
150 |             auto it = m_capabilities.find(name);
151 |             return (it != m_capabilities.end()) ? it->second : nullptr;
152 |         }
153 | 
154 |     private:
155 |         Core() : m_allocator(nullptr), m_logger(nullptr), m_assetProvider(nullptr), m_pluginManager(nullptr), m_world(nullptr), m_shouldClose(false), m_isRendererReady(false) {}
156 |         SystemAllocator* m_allocator;
157 |         Logger* m_logger;
158 |         IAssetProvider* m_assetProvider;
159 |         PluginManager* m_pluginManager;
160 |         IWorld* m_world;
161 |         std::map<std::string, IPlugin*> m_capabilities;
162 |         bool m_shouldClose; 
163 |         bool m_isRendererReady;
164 |         std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::time_point m_lastTime;
165 |     };
166 | 
167 |     ICore* GetEngineCore() {
168 |         return Core::GetInstance();
169 |     }
170 | }
```

core/src/JobSystem.cpp
```
1 | // SecretEngine
2 | // Module: core
3 | // Responsibility: Lock-free job system implementation
4 | // Dependencies: JobSystem.h
5 | 
6 | #include <SecretEngine/JobSystem.h>
7 | #include <chrono>
8 | 
9 | namespace SecretEngine {
10 | 
11 | JobSystem::JobSystem() {
12 |     // Constructor - initialization happens in Initialize()
13 | }
14 | 
15 | JobSystem::~JobSystem() {
16 |     Shutdown();
17 | }
18 | 
19 | void JobSystem::Initialize(uint32_t numThreads) {
20 |     if (m_isRunning.load(std::memory_order_relaxed)) {
21 |         return; // Already initialized
22 |     }
23 |     
24 |     // Auto-detect thread count
25 |     if (numThreads == 0) {
26 |         numThreads = std::thread::hardware_concurrency();
27 |         if (numThreads == 0) numThreads = 4; // Fallback
28 |         
29 |         // Reserve one thread for main thread
30 |         if (numThreads > 1) {
31 |             numThreads -= 1;
32 |         }
33 |     }
34 |     
35 |     m_numThreads = numThreads;
36 |     m_isRunning.store(true, std::memory_order_release);
37 |     
38 |     // Spawn worker threads
39 |     m_workers.reserve(numThreads);
40 |     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < numThreads; ++i) {
41 |         m_workers.emplace_back(&JobSystem::WorkerThread, this, i);
42 |     }
43 | }
44 | 
45 | void JobSystem::Shutdown() {
46 |     if (!m_isRunning.load(std::memory_order_relaxed)) {
47 |         return; // Not running
48 |     }
49 |     
50 |     // Signal shutdown
51 |     m_isRunning.store(false, std::memory_order_release);
52 |     
53 |     // Wait for all workers to finish
54 |     for (auto& worker : m_workers) {
55 |         if (worker.joinable()) {
56 |             worker.join();
57 |         }
58 |     }
59 |     
60 |     m_workers.clear();
61 |     m_numThreads = 0;
62 | }
63 | 
64 | void JobSystem::Execute(JobFunction&& function, std::atomic<uint32_t>* counter) {
65 |     if (!m_isRunning.load(std::memory_order_relaxed)) {
66 |         // System not running, execute immediately on calling thread
67 |         function();
68 |         if (counter) {
69 |             counter->fetch_sub(1, std::memory_order_release);
70 |         }
71 |         return;
72 |     }
73 |     
74 |     // Get next write position
75 |     uint32_t head = m_jobHead.load(std::memory_order_relaxed);
76 |     uint32_t nextHead = (head + 1) % MAX_JOBS;
77 |     
78 |     // Check if queue is full
79 |     uint32_t tail = m_jobTail.load(std::memory_order_acquire);
80 |     if (nextHead == tail) {
81 |         // Queue full, execute on calling thread
82 |         function();
83 |         if (counter) {
84 |             counter->fetch_sub(1, std::memory_order_release);
85 |         }
86 |         return;
87 |     }
88 |     
89 |     // Write job
90 |     m_jobs[head].function = std::move(function);
91 |     m_jobs[head].counter = counter;
92 |     
93 |     // Commit write
94 |     m_jobHead.store(nextHead, std::memory_order_release);
95 | }
96 | 
97 | void JobSystem::WaitForCounter(std::atomic<uint32_t>* counter) {
98 |     if (!counter) return;
99 |     
100 |     // Spin-wait with yield (efficient for short waits)
101 |     while (counter->load(std::memory_order_acquire) > 0) {
102 |         // Help process jobs while waiting
103 |         Job job;
104 |         if (GetJob(job)) {
105 |             job.function();
106 |             if (job.counter) {
107 |                 job.counter->fetch_sub(1, std::memory_order_release);
108 |             }
109 |         } else {
110 |             // No jobs available, yield to other threads
111 |             std::this_thread::yield();
112 |         }
113 |     }
114 | }
115 | 
116 | void JobSystem::WorkerThread(uint32_t threadIndex) {
117 |     (void)threadIndex; // Unused for now, could be used for thread-local storage
118 |     
119 |     while (m_isRunning.load(std::memory_order_relaxed)) {
120 |         Job job;
121 |         if (GetJob(job)) {
122 |             // Execute job
123 |             job.function();
124 |             
125 |             // Decrement counter if present
126 |             if (job.counter) {
127 |                 job.counter->fetch_sub(1, std::memory_order_release);
128 |             }
129 |         } else {
130 |             // No jobs available, sleep briefly
131 |             std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::microseconds(100));
132 |         }
133 |     }
134 | }
135 | 
136 | bool JobSystem::GetJob(Job& outJob) {
137 |     uint32_t tail = m_jobTail.load(std::memory_order_relaxed);
138 |     uint32_t head = m_jobHead.load(std::memory_order_acquire);
139 |     
140 |     // Check if queue is empty
141 |     if (tail == head) {
142 |         return false;
143 |     }
144 |     
145 |     // Read job
146 |     outJob = m_jobs[tail];
147 |     
148 |     // Commit read
149 |     uint32_t nextTail = (tail + 1) % MAX_JOBS;
150 |     m_jobTail.store(nextTail, std::memory_order_release);
151 |     
152 |     return true;
153 | }
154 | 
155 | } // namespace SecretEngine
```

core/src/Logger.cpp
```
1 | // SecretEngine
2 | // Module: core
3 | // Responsibility: Implementation of platform-specific logging
4 | // Dependencies: Logger.h, <cstdio>
5 | 
6 | #include "Logger.h"
7 | #include <cstdio>
8 | #include <cstring>
9 | 
10 | #if defined(__ANDROID__)
11 | #include <android/log.h>
12 | #endif
13 | 
14 | namespace SecretEngine {
15 | 
16 |     void Logger::LogInfo(const char* cat, const char* msg)    { InternalLog("INFO", cat, msg); }
17 |     void Logger::LogWarning(const char* cat, const char* msg) { InternalLog("WARN", cat, msg); }
18 |     void Logger::LogError(const char* cat, const char* msg)   { InternalLog("ERROR", cat, msg); }
19 | 
20 |     void Logger::InternalLog(const char* level, const char* category, const char* message) {
21 |         std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
22 | 
23 | #if defined(__ANDROID__)
24 |         // Route to Android Logcat with correct priority
25 |         int priority = ANDROID_LOG_INFO;
26 |         if (strcmp(level, "ERROR") == 0) {
27 |             priority = ANDROID_LOG_ERROR;
28 |         } else if (strcmp(level, "WARN") == 0) {
29 |             priority = ANDROID_LOG_WARN;
30 |         }
31 |         __android_log_print(priority, category, "[%s] %s", level, message);
32 | #else
33 |         // Route to Windows Console
34 |         printf("[%s][%s] %s\n", level, category, message);
35 | #endif
36 |     }
37 | }
```

core/src/PluginManager.cpp
```
1 | // SecretEngine
2 | // Module: core
3 | // Responsibility: Implementation of plugin scanning and dynamic loading
4 | // Dependencies: PluginManager.h, <fstream>, nlohmann/json
5 | 
6 | #include "PluginManager.h"
7 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
8 | #include <nlohmann/json.hpp>
9 | #include <fstream>
10 | 
11 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
12 | #include <windows.h>
13 | #else
14 | #include <dlfcn.h>
15 | #endif
16 | 
17 | namespace SecretEngine {
18 | 
19 |     void PluginManager::ScanPlugins(const std::filesystem::path& path, ICore* core) {
20 |         if (!std::filesystem::exists(path)) return;
21 | 
22 |         for (auto const& dir_entry : std::filesystem::directory_iterator{path}) {
23 |             if (dir_entry.is_directory()) {
24 |                 std::filesystem::path manifestPath = dir_entry.path() / "plugin_manifest.json";
25 |                 if (std::filesystem::exists(manifestPath)) {
26 |                     // Parse manifest
27 |                     std::ifstream f(manifestPath);
28 |                     nlohmann::json manifest = nlohmann::json::parse(f);
29 |                     std::string libName = manifest["library"];
30 |                     std::filesystem::path libPath = dir_entry.path() / libName;
31 | 
32 |                     // Platform-specific LoadLibrary
33 |                     void* handle = nullptr;
34 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
35 |                     handle = LoadLibraryW(libPath.c_str());
36 | #else
37 |                     handle = dlopen(libPath.c_str(), RTLD_NOW);
38 | #endif
39 | 
40 |                     if (handle) {
41 |                         // Resolve CreatePlugin symbol
42 |                         typedef IPlugin* (*CreateFunc)();
43 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
44 |                         CreateFunc create = (CreateFunc)GetProcAddress((HMODULE)handle, "CreatePlugin");
45 | #else
46 |                         CreateFunc create = (CreateFunc)dlsym(handle, "CreatePlugin");
47 | #endif
48 | 
49 |                         if (create) {
50 |                             IPlugin* plugin = create();
51 |                             plugin->OnLoad(core); // Phase 3: Register
52 |                             m_loadedPlugins.push_back({ handle, plugin });
53 |                         }
54 |                     }
55 |                 }
56 |             }
57 |         }
58 |     }
59 | 
60 |     void PluginManager::UnloadAll() {
61 |         for (auto& lp : m_loadedPlugins) {
62 |             lp.pluginInstance->OnUnload(); // Phase 7: Unload
63 |             // In a full implementation, we would call DestroyPlugin here
64 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
65 |             FreeLibrary((HMODULE)lp.libraryHandle);
66 | #else
67 |             dlclose(lp.libraryHandle);
68 | #endif
69 |         }
70 |         m_loadedPlugins.clear();
71 |     }
72 | 
73 |     PluginManager::~PluginManager() { UnloadAll(); }
74 | }
```

2 | // Module: core

4 | // Dependencies: SecretEngine/IPlugin.h, <filesystem>, nlohmann/json
5 | 
6 | #pragma once
7 | #include <SecretEngine/IPlugin.h> // Fix: Ensure this path is resolved
8 | #include <vector>

10 | 
11 | namespace SecretEngine {

13 |     class PluginManager {
14 |     public:
15 |         PluginManager() = default;
16 |         ~PluginManager();
17 | 
18 |         // Phase 1 & 2: Discovery and Library Loading
19 |         void ScanPlugins(const std::filesystem::path& path, class ICore* core);
20 |         
21 |         // Phase 7: Unload all libraries
22 |         void UnloadAll();
23 | 
24 |     private:
25 |         struct LoadedPlugin {
26 |             void* libraryHandle;
27 |             IPlugin* pluginInstance;
28 |         };
29 |         std::vector<LoadedPlugin> m_loadedPlugins;
30 |     };

32 | }
