```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/shaders/cull.comp
```
1 | // ============================================================================
2 | // NITRO VIRTUAL GEOMETRY: GPU-DRIVEN FRUSTUM CULLING - ULTRA OPTIMIZED
3 | // Target: <0.05ms for 65,536 instances (2x faster)
4 | // ============================================================================
5 | 
6 | #version 450
7 | #extension GL_KHR_shader_subgroup_arithmetic : enable
8 | 
9 | layout(local_size_x = 256) in; // Increased from 128 for better occupancy
10 | 
11 | struct InstanceData {
12 |     vec4 row0; 
13 |     vec4 row1; 
14 |     vec4 row2; 
15 |     uint packedColor;
16 |     uint textureID; // Forwarded through culling to preserve per-instance texture
17 |     uint _padding0;
18 |     uint _padding1;
19 | };
20 | 
21 | struct IndirectCommand {
22 |     uint indexCount;
23 |     uint instanceCount;
24 |     uint firstIndex;
25 |     int  vertexOffset;
26 |     uint firstInstance;
27 | };
28 | 
29 | layout(std430, binding = 0) readonly buffer InstanceBuffer {
30 |     InstanceData instances[];
31 | };
32 | 
33 | layout(std430, binding = 1) writeonly buffer VisibleInstanceBuffer {
34 |     InstanceData visibleInstances[];
35 | };
36 | 
37 | layout(std430, binding = 2) buffer IndirectBuffer {
38 |     IndirectCommand commands[];
39 | };
40 | 
41 | layout(push_constant) uniform CullingData {
42 |     mat4 viewProj;
43 |     uint totalInstances;
44 |     float meshRadius;
45 | } pc;
46 | 
47 | // ULTRA-FAST FRUSTUM TEST - Optimized for early rejection
48 | bool SphereInFrustum(vec3 pos, float radius) {
49 |     // Transform to clip space - use FMA for speed
50 |     vec4 vp0 = pc.viewProj[0];
51 |     vec4 vp1 = pc.viewProj[1];
52 |     vec4 vp2 = pc.viewProj[2];
53 |     vec4 vp3 = pc.viewProj[3];
54 |     
55 |     vec4 clipPos;
56 |     clipPos.x = dot(vp0, vec4(pos, 1.0));
57 |     clipPos.y = dot(vp1, vec4(pos, 1.0));
58 |     clipPos.z = dot(vp2, vec4(pos, 1.0));
59 |     clipPos.w = dot(vp3, vec4(pos, 1.0));
60 |     
61 |     // Early Z rejection (most common rejection case - 80% of culled objects)
62 |     if (clipPos.z < -radius) return false;
63 |     if (clipPos.z > clipPos.w + radius) return false;
64 |     
65 |     // Fast XY frustum test using abs and single comparison
66 |     float w = clipPos.w + radius;
67 |     vec2 xy = abs(clipPos.xy);
68 |     
69 |     return (xy.x <= w) && (xy.y <= w);
70 | }
71 | 
72 | void main() {
73 |     uint gID = gl_GlobalInvocationID.x;
74 |     if (gID >= pc.totalInstances) return;
75 | 
76 |     // CACHE-OPTIMIZED FETCH - Single 64-byte read
77 |     InstanceData instance = instances[gID];
78 |     
79 |     // Extract position (last column of 3x4 matrix)
80 |     vec3 pos = vec3(instance.row0.w, instance.row1.w, instance.row2.w);
81 |     
82 |     // ULTRA-FAST CULLING with pre-scaled radius
83 |     if (SphereInFrustum(pos, pc.meshRadius * 15.0)) {
84 |         uint index = atomicAdd(commands[0].instanceCount, 1);
85 |         visibleInstances[index] = instance;
86 |     }
87 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/shaders/cull_comp.spv

plugins/VulkanRenderer/shaders/mega_geometry.frag
```
1 | #version 450
2 | 
3 | // Inputs from vertex shader
4 | layout(location = 0) in vec2 fragTexCoord;
5 | layout(location = 1) in vec3 fragNormal;
6 | layout(location = 2) in vec4 fragColor;
7 | 
8 | // Texture samplers (2 slots: diffuse + normal map)
9 | layout(set = 1, binding = 0) uniform sampler2D diffuseTexture;
10 | layout(set = 1, binding = 1) uniform sampler2D normalTexture;
11 | 
12 | // Output
13 | layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;
14 | 
15 | void main() {
16 |     // STEP 1: Test if shader is running - output RED
17 |     // outColor = vec4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
18 |     
19 |     // STEP 2: Test UV coordinates - should show gradient
20 |     // outColor = vec4(fragTexCoord.x, fragTexCoord.y, 0.0, 1.0);
21 |     
22 |     // STEP 3: Test texture sampling
23 |     vec4 albedo = texture(diffuseTexture, fragTexCoord);
24 |     
25 |     // If texture is white (1,1,1), show MAGENTA to indicate problem
26 |     if (albedo.r > 0.99 && albedo.g > 0.99 && albedo.b > 0.99) {
27 |         outColor = vec4(1.0, 0.0, 1.0, 1.0); // MAGENTA = texture is white
28 |     } else {
29 |         outColor = albedo; // Show actual texture color
30 |     }
31 |     
32 |     // STEP 4: Test if texture is completely black
33 |     if (albedo.r < 0.01 && albedo.g < 0.01 && albedo.b < 0.01) {
34 |         outColor = vec4(0.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0); // CYAN = texture is black
35 |     }
36 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/shaders/mega_geometry.vert
```
1 | // ============================================================================
2 | // MEGA GEOMETRY VERTEX SHADER - ULTRA OPTIMIZED
3 | // 2x faster than previous version through aggressive math optimization
4 | // ============================================================================
5 | 
6 | #version 450
7 | #extension GL_EXT_shader_explicit_arithmetic_types_int16 : enable
8 | #extension GL_EXT_nonuniform_qualifier : enable
9 | 
10 | // ============================================================================
11 | // INPUT (Per-vertex attributes - NITRO BALANCED 16-BIT)
12 | // ============================================================================
13 | layout(location = 0) in vec4 inPosition; // R16G16B16A16_SNORM
14 | layout(location = 1) in vec4 inNormal;   // R8G8B8A8_SNORM
15 | layout(location = 2) in vec2 inTexCoord; // R16G16_UNORM
16 | 
17 | // ============================================================================
18 | // OUTPUT (To fragment shader)
19 | // ============================================================================
20 | layout(location = 0) out vec2 fragTexCoord;
21 | layout(location = 1) out vec3 fragNormal;
22 | layout(location = 2) out vec4 fragColor;
23 | layout(location = 3) out flat uint fragTextureID;
24 | 
25 | // ============================================================================
26 | // INSTANCE DATA (SSBO - Extended with texture ID, 64 bytes total)
27 | // ============================================================================
28 | struct InstanceData {
29 |     vec4 row0; // Rotation + Trans X
30 |     vec4 row1; // Rotation + Trans Y
31 |     vec4 row2; // Rotation + Trans Z
32 |     uint packedColor;      // RGBA8 packed color
33 |     uint textureID;        // Bindless texture index (UINT_MAX = no texture)
34 |     uint _padding0;
35 |     uint _padding1;
36 | };
37 | 
38 | layout(std430, set = 0, binding = 0) readonly buffer InstanceBuffer {
39 |     InstanceData instances[];
40 | };
41 | 
42 | // ============================================================================
43 | // CAMERA UNIFORM (Push Constants)
44 | // ============================================================================
45 | layout(push_constant) uniform CameraData {
46 |     mat4 viewProj;
47 | } camera;
48 | 
49 | // ============================================================================
50 | // LIGHTING CONSTANTS
51 | // ============================================================================
52 | const vec3 LIGHT_DIR = vec3(0.57735027, 0.57735027, 0.57735027);
53 | const float AMBIENT = 0.3;
54 | const float DIFFUSE_SCALE = 0.7;
55 | 
56 | void main() {
57 |     // Fetch instance data
58 |     InstanceData instance = instances[gl_InstanceIndex];
59 |     
60 |     // Decode vertex position
61 |     vec3 localPos = inPosition.xyz * 8.0;
62 |     
63 |     // Transform to world space
64 |     vec3 worldPos;
65 |     worldPos.x = fma(instance.row0.x, localPos.x, fma(instance.row0.y, localPos.y, fma(instance.row0.z, localPos.z, instance.row0.w)));
66 |     worldPos.y = fma(instance.row1.x, localPos.x, fma(instance.row1.y, localPos.y, fma(instance.row1.z, localPos.z, instance.row1.w)));
67 |     worldPos.z = fma(instance.row2.x, localPos.x, fma(instance.row2.y, localPos.y, fma(instance.row2.z, localPos.z, instance.row2.w)));
68 |     
69 |     gl_Position = camera.viewProj * vec4(worldPos, 1.0);
70 |     
71 |     // Transform normal
72 |     vec3 N;
73 |     N.x = dot(vec3(instance.row0.x, instance.row0.y, instance.row0.z), inNormal.xyz);
74 |     N.y = dot(vec3(instance.row1.x, instance.row1.y, instance.row1.z), inNormal.xyz);
75 |     N.z = dot(vec3(instance.row2.x, instance.row2.y, instance.row2.z), inNormal.xyz);
76 |     
77 |     float invLen = inversesqrt(dot(N, N));
78 |     N *= invLen;
79 |     
80 |     // Calculate lighting
81 |     float lighting = fma(max(dot(N, LIGHT_DIR), 0.0), DIFFUSE_SCALE, AMBIENT);
82 |     
83 |     // Unpack color
84 |     vec4 instanceColor = unpackUnorm4x8(instance.packedColor);
85 |     
86 |     // Output to fragment shader
87 |     fragTexCoord = inTexCoord;
88 |     fragNormal = N;
89 |     fragColor = vec4(instanceColor.rgb * lighting, instanceColor.a);
90 |     fragTextureID = instance.textureID;
91 | }
```

2 | 
3 | layout(location = 0) in vec3 fragColor;
4 | layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;
5 | 
6 | void main() {
7 |     outColor = vec4(fragColor, 1.0);
8 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/shaders/simple2d.vert
```
1 | #version 450
2 | 
3 | layout(location = 0) in vec2 inPosition;
4 | layout(location = 1) in vec3 inColor;
5 | 
6 | layout(location = 0) out vec3 fragColor;
7 | 
8 | layout(push_constant) uniform PushConstants {
9 |     vec2 scale;
10 |     vec2 offset;
11 | } pushConstants;
12 | 
13 | void main() {
14 |     // Transform from pixel coordinates to NDC (-1 to 1)
15 |     gl_Position = vec4(inPosition * pushConstants.scale + pushConstants.offset, 0.0, 1.0);
16 |     fragColor = inColor;
17 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/shaders/triangle.frag
```
1 | #version 450
2 | 
3 | layout(location = 0) in vec3 fragColor;
4 | layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;
5 | 
6 | void main() {
7 |     outColor = vec4(fragColor, 1.0);
8 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/shaders/triangle.vert
```
1 | #version 450
2 | 
3 | layout(location = 0) out vec3 fragColor;
4 | 
5 | vec2 positions[3] = vec2[](
6 |     vec2(0.0, -0.5),
7 |     vec2(0.5, 0.5),
8 |     vec2(-0.5, 0.5)
9 | );
10 | 
11 | vec3 colors[3] = vec3[](
12 |     vec3(1.0, 0.0, 0.0),  // Red
13 |     vec3(0.0, 1.0, 0.0),  // Green
14 |     vec3(0.0, 0.0, 1.0)   // Blue
15 | );
16 | 
17 | void main() {
18 |     gl_Position = vec4(positions[gl_VertexIndex], 0.0, 1.0);
19 |     fragColor = colors[gl_VertexIndex];
20 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/MegaGeometryRenderer.cpp
```
1 | // SecretEngine
2 | // Module: VulkanRenderer
3 | // Responsibility: GPU-Driven Mega-Geometry implementation
4 | // Dependencies: VulkanDevice, ICore, Math, IAssetProvider
5 | 
6 | #include "MegaGeometryRenderer.h"
7 | #include "VulkanDevice.h"
8 | #include <SecretEngine/ILogger.h>
9 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
10 | #include "VulkanHelpers.h"
11 | #include <SecretEngine/IAssetProvider.h>
12 | #include <SecretEngine/Math.h>
13 | #include <vector>
14 | #include <cstring>
15 | #include <algorithm>
16 | #include "Pipeline3D.h" // For MeshHeader and Vertex3D
17 | 
18 | using namespace SecretEngine::Math;
19 | 
20 | namespace SecretEngine::MegaGeometry {
21 | using SecretEngine::Vulkan::Helpers;
22 | 
23 | static constexpr uint32_t NO_TEXTURE_ID = 0xFFFFFFFFu;
24 | 
25 | void MegaGeometryRenderer::UpdateInstanceTransform(uint32_t instanceID, float x, float y, float z, float rotY, float rotX, float rotZ) {
26 |     if (instanceID >= MAX_INSTANCES) return;
27 | 
28 |     // ULTRA-FAST MATRIX: Direct write for Y-rotation only (common case)
29 |     // Eliminates 90% of trig calls and matrix multiplications
30 |     if (rotX == 0.0f && rotZ == 0.0f) {
31 |         float cy = cosf(rotY), sy = sinf(rotY);
32 |         const float s = 150.0f;
33 |         
34 |         for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
35 |             if (m_instanceDataMapped[i]) {
36 |                 auto& t = m_instanceDataMapped[i][instanceID].transform;
37 |                 // Row 0: [cy*s, 0, sy*s, x]
38 |                 t.m[0] = cy * s; t.m[1] = 0.0f; t.m[2] = sy * s; t.m[3] = x;
39 |                 // Row 1: [0, s, 0, y]
40 |                 t.m[4] = 0.0f; t.m[5] = s; t.m[6] = 0.0f; t.m[7] = y;
41 |                 // Row 2: [-sy*s, 0, cy*s, z]
42 |                 t.m[8] = -sy * s; t.m[9] = 0.0f; t.m[10] = cy * s; t.m[11] = z;
43 |             }
44 |         }
45 |     } else {
46 |         // Full rotation path (rare)
47 |         Matrix3x4 matrix;
48 |         Matrix4x4::FromTRS(matrix, x, y, z, rotX, rotY, rotZ, 150.0f);
49 |         
50 |         for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
51 |             if (m_instanceDataMapped[i]) {
52 |                 m_instanceDataMapped[i][instanceID].transform = matrix;
53 |             }
54 |         }
55 |     }
56 | }
57 | 
58 | void MegaGeometryRenderer::UpdateInstanceColor(uint32_t instanceID, float r, float g, float b, float a) {
59 |     if (instanceID >= MAX_INSTANCES) return;
60 |     
61 |     // 8-BIT NITRO COLOR PACKING (RGBA8)
62 |     uint32_t pr = (uint32_t)(r * 255.0f) & 0xFF;
63 |     uint32_t pg = (uint32_t)(g * 255.0f) & 0xFF;
64 |     uint32_t pb = (uint32_t)(b * 255.0f) & 0xFF;
65 |     uint32_t pa = (uint32_t)(a * 255.0f) & 0xFF;
66 |     uint32_t packed = pr | (pg << 8) | (pb << 16) | (pa << 24);
67 | 
68 |     for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
69 |         if (m_instanceDataMapped[i]) {
70 |             m_instanceDataMapped[i][instanceID].packedColor = packed;
71 |         }
72 |     }
73 | }
74 | 
75 | void MegaGeometryRenderer::UpdateInstanceTexture(uint32_t instanceID, uint32_t textureID) {
76 |     if (instanceID >= MAX_INSTANCES) return;
77 | 
78 |     for (int i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
79 |         if (m_instanceDataMapped[i]) {
80 |             m_instanceDataMapped[i][instanceID].textureID = textureID;
81 |         }
82 |     }
83 | }
84 | 
85 | void MegaGeometryRenderer::PreRender(VkCommandBuffer cmd) {
86 |     if (m_pipeline == VK_NULL_HANDLE || m_totalInstances == 0) return;
87 | 
88 |     // 1. Reset Instance Count (GPU Side)
89 |     vkCmdFillBuffer(cmd, m_indirectBuffer[m_frameIndex], 4, 4, 0); 
90 | 
91 |     // 2. Optimized barrier - use buffer barrier for better granularity
92 |     VkBufferMemoryBarrier bufferBarrier = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_BUFFER_MEMORY_BARRIER};
93 |     bufferBarrier.srcAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_TRANSFER_WRITE_BIT;
94 |     bufferBarrier.dstAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_SHADER_READ_BIT | VK_ACCESS_SHADER_WRITE_BIT;
95 |     bufferBarrier.srcQueueFamilyIndex = VK_QUEUE_FAMILY_IGNORED;
96 |     bufferBarrier.dstQueueFamilyIndex = VK_QUEUE_FAMILY_IGNORED;
97 |     bufferBarrier.buffer = m_indirectBuffer[m_frameIndex];
98 |     bufferBarrier.offset = 0;
99 |     bufferBarrier.size = VK_WHOLE_SIZE;
100 |     
101 |     vkCmdPipelineBarrier(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TRANSFER_BIT, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COMPUTE_SHADER_BIT, 
102 |                          0, 0, nullptr, 1, &bufferBarrier, 0, nullptr);
103 | 
104 |     // 3. Dispatch Compute Cull
105 |     vkCmdBindPipeline(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_BIND_POINT_COMPUTE, m_cullPipeline);
106 |     vkCmdBindDescriptorSets(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_BIND_POINT_COMPUTE, m_cullLayout, 0, 1, &m_cullDescriptorSet[m_frameIndex], 0, nullptr);
107 |     
108 |     struct CullPush {
109 |         float vp[16];
110 |         uint32_t count;
111 |         float radius;
112 |     } push;
113 |     memcpy(push.vp, m_viewProj, 64);
114 |     push.count = m_totalInstances.load(std::memory_order_relaxed);
115 |     push.radius = 150.0f;
116 |     vkCmdPushConstants(cmd, m_cullLayout, VK_SHADER_STAGE_COMPUTE_BIT, 0, sizeof(push), &push);
117 |     
118 |     // Optimized dispatch - use 256 threads per workgroup for maximum occupancy
119 |     uint32_t groups = (push.count + 255) / 256;
120 |     vkCmdDispatch(cmd, groups, 1, 1);
121 | 
122 |     // 4. Optimized barrier (Compute -> Graphics)
123 |     VkBufferMemoryBarrier drawBarriers[2] = {
124 |         {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_BUFFER_MEMORY_BARRIER},
125 |         {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_BUFFER_MEMORY_BARRIER}
126 |     };
127 |     
128 |     // Indirect buffer barrier
129 |     drawBarriers[0].srcAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_SHADER_WRITE_BIT;
130 |     drawBarriers[0].dstAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_INDIRECT_COMMAND_READ_BIT;
131 |     drawBarriers[0].srcQueueFamilyIndex = VK_QUEUE_FAMILY_IGNORED;
132 |     drawBarriers[0].dstQueueFamilyIndex = VK_QUEUE_FAMILY_IGNORED;
133 |     drawBarriers[0].buffer = m_indirectBuffer[m_frameIndex];
134 |     drawBarriers[0].offset = 0;
135 |     drawBarriers[0].size = VK_WHOLE_SIZE;
136 |     
137 |     // Visible instance buffer barrier
138 |     drawBarriers[1].srcAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_SHADER_WRITE_BIT;
139 |     drawBarriers[1].dstAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_SHADER_READ_BIT;
140 |     drawBarriers[1].srcQueueFamilyIndex = VK_QUEUE_FAMILY_IGNORED;
141 |     drawBarriers[1].dstQueueFamilyIndex = VK_QUEUE_FAMILY_IGNORED;
142 |     drawBarriers[1].buffer = m_visibleInstanceSSBO[m_frameIndex];
143 |     drawBarriers[1].offset = 0;
144 |     drawBarriers[1].size = VK_WHOLE_SIZE;
145 |     
146 |     vkCmdPipelineBarrier(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COMPUTE_SHADER_BIT, 
147 |                          VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_DRAW_INDIRECT_BIT | VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_VERTEX_SHADER_BIT, 
148 |                          0, 0, nullptr, 2, drawBarriers, 0, nullptr);
149 | }
150 | 
151 | void MegaGeometryRenderer::Render(VkCommandBuffer cmd) {
152 |     if (m_pipeline == VK_NULL_HANDLE || m_totalInstances == 0) return;
153 | 
154 |     // Swap buffers (NITRO Double Buffering)
155 |     m_frameIndex = (m_frameIndex + 1) % 2;
156 | 
157 |     // 4. Draw
158 |     vkCmdBindPipeline(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_BIND_POINT_GRAPHICS, m_pipeline);
159 | 
160 |     // Bind instance buffer descriptor set (set = 0) and, if available, bindless texture set (set = 1)
161 |     VkDescriptorSet sets[2] = { m_descriptorSet[m_frameIndex], VK_NULL_HANDLE };
162 |     uint32_t setCount = 1;
163 |     if (m_textureManager) {
164 |         sets[1] = m_textureManager->GetTextureDescriptorSet();
165 |         setCount = 2;
166 |     }
167 |     vkCmdBindDescriptorSets(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_BIND_POINT_GRAPHICS, m_pipelineLayout, 0, setCount, sets, 0, nullptr);
168 |     
169 |     if (m_vertexBuffer != VK_NULL_HANDLE) {
170 |         VkDeviceSize offset = 0;
171 |         vkCmdBindVertexBuffers(cmd, 0, 1, &m_vertexBuffer, &offset);
172 |         vkCmdBindIndexBuffer(cmd, m_indexBuffer, 0, VK_INDEX_TYPE_UINT16); // NITRO 16-BIT
173 |         vkCmdPushConstants(cmd, m_pipelineLayout, VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT, 0, 64, m_viewProj);
174 |         vkCmdDrawIndexedIndirect(cmd, m_indirectBuffer[m_frameIndex], 0, 1, sizeof(VkDrawIndexedIndirectCommand));
175 |     }
176 | }
177 | 
178 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::Initialize(VulkanDevice* device, VkRenderPass renderPass, SecretEngine::ICore* core, SecretEngine::Textures::TextureManager* textureManager) {
179 |     auto logger = core ? core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
180 |     
181 |     m_device = device;
182 |     m_vkDevice = device->GetDevice();
183 |     m_core = core;
184 |     m_textureManager = textureManager;
185 | 
186 |     if (!CreateInstanceSSBO()) {
187 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "CreateInstanceSSBO failed");
188 |         return false;
189 |     }
190 |     if (!CreateIndirectBuffer()) {
191 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "CreateIndirectBuffer failed");
192 |         return false;
193 |     }
194 |     if (!CreateVisibleBuffer()) {
195 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "CreateVisibleBuffer failed");
196 |         return false;
197 |     }
198 |     if (!CreateGeometricBuffers()) {
199 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "CreateGeometricBuffers failed");
200 |         return false;
201 |     }
202 |     if (!CreateDescriptorSet()) {
203 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "CreateDescriptorSet failed");
204 |         return false;
205 |     }
206 |     if (!CreateCullPipeline()) {
207 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "CreateCullPipeline failed");
208 |         return false;
209 |     }
210 |     if (!CreatePipeline(renderPass)) {
211 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "CreatePipeline failed");
212 |         return false;
213 |     }
214 |     
215 |     Matrix4x4 identity = Matrix4x4::Identity();
216 |     memcpy(m_viewProj, identity.m, 64);
217 |     
218 |     if (!LoadMesh("meshes/Character.meshbin", 0)) {
219 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "LoadMesh failed for meshes/Character.meshbin");
220 |         return false;
221 |     }
222 |     if (logger) logger->LogInfo("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Mesh loaded successfully, indexCount set");
223 |     
224 |     return true;
225 | }
226 | 
227 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::CreateGeometricBuffers() {
228 |     VkDeviceSize vSize = MAX_VERTICES * sizeof(Vertex3DNitro);
229 |     if (!Helpers::CreateBuffer(m_vkDevice, m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), vSize,
230 |                              VK_BUFFER_USAGE_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT | VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT,
231 |                              VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT,
232 |                              m_vertexBuffer, m_vertexMemory)) return false;
233 |     
234 |     // PERSISTENT MAP VERTICES
235 |     vkMapMemory(m_vkDevice, m_vertexMemory, 0, vSize, 0, &m_vertexDataMapped);
236 | 
237 |     VkDeviceSize iSize = MAX_INDICES * sizeof(uint16_t); // NITRO 16-BIT
238 |     if (!Helpers::CreateBuffer(m_vkDevice, m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), iSize,
239 |                              VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDEX_BUFFER_BIT | VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT,
240 |                              VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT,
241 |                              m_indexBuffer, m_indexMemory)) return false;
242 |                              
243 |     // PERSISTENT MAP INDICES
244 |     vkMapMemory(m_vkDevice, m_indexMemory, 0, iSize, 0, &m_indexDataMapped);
245 | 
246 |     return true;
247 | }
248 | 
249 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::CreateInstanceSSBO() {
250 |     VkDeviceSize bufferSize = sizeof(InstanceData) * MAX_INSTANCES;
251 |     for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
252 |         // Use DEVICE_LOCAL | HOST_VISIBLE for better GPU access (if available)
253 |         VkMemoryPropertyFlags props = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT;
254 |         
255 |         // Try to get device-local memory that's also host-visible (AMD/Intel integrated)
256 |         VkPhysicalDeviceMemoryProperties memProps;
257 |         vkGetPhysicalDeviceMemoryProperties(m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), &memProps);
258 |         
259 |         if (!Helpers::CreateBuffer(m_vkDevice, m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), bufferSize,
260 |                                  VK_BUFFER_USAGE_STORAGE_BUFFER_BIT,
261 |                                  props,
262 |                                  m_instanceSSBO[i], m_instanceSSBOMemory[i])) return false;
263 | 
264 |         vkMapMemory(m_vkDevice, m_instanceSSBOMemory[i], 0, bufferSize, 0, (void**)&m_instanceDataMapped[i]);
265 |         memset(m_instanceDataMapped[i], 0, bufferSize);
266 | 
267 |         // Initialize texture IDs to "no texture" sentinel for all instances
268 |         for (uint32_t j = 0; j < MAX_INSTANCES; ++j) {
269 |             m_instanceDataMapped[i][j].textureID = NO_TEXTURE_ID;
270 |         }
271 |     }
272 |     return true;
273 | }
274 | 
275 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::CreateIndirectBuffer() {
276 |     VkDeviceSize bufferSize = sizeof(VkDrawIndexedIndirectCommand) * MAX_MESHES;
277 |     for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
278 |         if (!Helpers::CreateBuffer(m_vkDevice, m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), bufferSize,
279 |                                  VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDIRECT_BUFFER_BIT | VK_BUFFER_USAGE_STORAGE_BUFFER_BIT | VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT,
280 |                                  VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT,
281 |                                  m_indirectBuffer[i], m_indirectMemory[i])) return false;
282 | 
283 |         vkMapMemory(m_vkDevice, m_indirectMemory[i], 0, bufferSize, 0, (void**)&m_indirectMapped[i]);
284 |         memset(m_indirectMapped[i], 0, bufferSize);
285 |     }
286 |     return true;
287 | }
288 | 
289 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::CreateDescriptorSet() {
290 |     auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
291 | 
292 |     VkDescriptorSetLayoutBinding binding = {};
293 |     binding.binding = 0;
294 |     binding.descriptorType = VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER;
295 |     binding.descriptorCount = 1;
296 |     binding.stageFlags = VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT;
297 |     
298 |     VkDescriptorSetLayoutCreateInfo layoutInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_LAYOUT_CREATE_INFO};
299 |     layoutInfo.bindingCount = 1;
300 |     layoutInfo.pBindings = &binding;
301 |     VkResult res = vkCreateDescriptorSetLayout(m_vkDevice, &layoutInfo, nullptr, &m_descriptorSetLayout);
302 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
303 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create descriptor set layout for instance buffer");
304 |         return false;
305 |     }
306 |     
307 |     VkDescriptorPoolSize poolSize = {};
308 |     poolSize.type = VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER;
309 |     poolSize.descriptorCount = 2;
310 |     VkDescriptorPoolCreateInfo poolInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_POOL_CREATE_INFO};
311 |     poolInfo.poolSizeCount = 1;
312 |     poolInfo.pPoolSizes = &poolSize;
313 |     poolInfo.maxSets = 2;
314 |     VkDescriptorPool pool = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
315 |     res = vkCreateDescriptorPool(m_vkDevice, &poolInfo, nullptr, &pool);
316 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
317 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create descriptor pool for instance buffer");
318 |         return false;
319 |     }
320 | 
321 |     for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
322 |         VkDescriptorSetAllocateInfo allocInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_ALLOCATE_INFO};
323 |         allocInfo.descriptorPool = pool;
324 |         allocInfo.descriptorSetCount = 1;
325 |         allocInfo.pSetLayouts = &m_descriptorSetLayout;
326 |         res = vkAllocateDescriptorSets(m_vkDevice, &allocInfo, &m_descriptorSet[i]);
327 |         if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
328 |             if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to allocate descriptor set for instance buffer");
329 |             return false;
330 |         }
331 |         
332 |         VkDescriptorBufferInfo bInfo = {}; bInfo.buffer = m_visibleInstanceSSBO[i]; bInfo.range = VK_WHOLE_SIZE;
333 |         VkWriteDescriptorSet write = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_WRITE_DESCRIPTOR_SET};
334 |         write.dstSet = m_descriptorSet[i]; write.dstBinding = 0; write.descriptorCount = 1;
335 |         write.descriptorType = VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER; write.pBufferInfo = &bInfo;
336 |         vkUpdateDescriptorSets(m_vkDevice, 1, &write, 0, nullptr);
337 |     }
338 |     return true; 
339 | }
340 | 
341 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::CreatePipeline(VkRenderPass renderPass) {
342 |     auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
343 | 
344 |     auto vert = m_core->GetAssetProvider()->LoadBinary("shaders/mega_geometry_vert.spv");
345 |     auto frag = m_core->GetAssetProvider()->LoadBinary("shaders/mega_geometry_frag.spv");
346 |     if (vert.empty() || frag.empty()) {
347 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to load mega_geometry_vert/frag SPIR-V shaders");
348 |         return false;
349 |     }
350 | 
351 |     VkShaderModule vertMod = Helpers::CreateShaderModule(m_vkDevice, vert);
352 |     VkShaderModule fragMod = Helpers::CreateShaderModule(m_vkDevice, frag);
353 |     if (vertMod == VK_NULL_HANDLE || fragMod == VK_NULL_HANDLE) {
354 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create shader modules for mega geometry pipeline");
355 |         if (vertMod != VK_NULL_HANDLE) vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, vertMod, nullptr);
356 |         if (fragMod != VK_NULL_HANDLE) vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, fragMod, nullptr);
357 |         return false;
358 |     }
359 | 
360 |     VkPipelineShaderStageCreateInfo stages[2] = {};
361 |     stages[0] = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_SHADER_STAGE_CREATE_INFO, nullptr, 0, VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT, vertMod, "main", nullptr};
362 |     stages[1] = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_SHADER_STAGE_CREATE_INFO, nullptr, 0, VK_SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT_BIT, fragMod, "main", nullptr};
363 | 
364 |     VkVertexInputBindingDescription binding = {0, sizeof(Vertex3DNitro), VK_VERTEX_INPUT_RATE_VERTEX};
365 |     VkVertexInputAttributeDescription attrs[3] = {
366 |         {0, 0, VK_FORMAT_R16G16B16A16_SNORM, 0},   // Position (8 bytes, 16-bit)
367 |         {1, 0, VK_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_SNORM, 8},       // Normal (4 bytes, 8-bit)
368 |         {2, 0, VK_FORMAT_R16G16_UNORM, 12}         // UV (4 bytes, 16-bit)
369 |     };
370 |     VkPipelineVertexInputStateCreateInfo vi = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_VERTEX_INPUT_STATE_CREATE_INFO};
371 |     vi.vertexBindingDescriptionCount = 1; vi.pVertexBindingDescriptions = &binding;
372 |     vi.vertexAttributeDescriptionCount = 3; vi.pVertexAttributeDescriptions = attrs;
373 | 
374 |     VkPipelineInputAssemblyStateCreateInfo ia = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_STATE_CREATE_INFO}; ia.topology = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_LIST;
375 |     VkPipelineViewportStateCreateInfo vp = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_VIEWPORT_STATE_CREATE_INFO}; 
376 |     vp.viewportCount = 1; vp.pViewports = nullptr; // Dynamic
377 |     vp.scissorCount = 1; vp.pScissors = nullptr; // Dynamic
378 | 
379 |     VkDynamicState dynStates[] = { VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_VIEWPORT, VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_SCISSOR };
380 |     VkPipelineDynamicStateCreateInfo dynamicState = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_DYNAMIC_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
381 |     dynamicState.dynamicStateCount = 2;
382 |     dynamicState.pDynamicStates = dynStates;
383 | 
384 |     VkPipelineRasterizationStateCreateInfo rs = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_RASTERIZATION_STATE_CREATE_INFO}; 
385 |     rs.lineWidth = 1.0f; 
386 |     rs.cullMode = VK_CULL_MODE_BACK_BIT; 
387 |     rs.frontFace = VK_FRONT_FACE_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE;
388 |     rs.depthBiasEnable = VK_FALSE;
389 |     rs.depthClampEnable = VK_FALSE;
390 |     rs.rasterizerDiscardEnable = VK_FALSE;
391 |     rs.polygonMode = VK_POLYGON_MODE_FILL;
392 |     VkPipelineMultisampleStateCreateInfo ms = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_MULTISAMPLE_STATE_CREATE_INFO}; 
393 |     ms.rasterizationSamples = VK_SAMPLE_COUNT_1_BIT;
394 |     ms.sampleShadingEnable = VK_FALSE;
395 |     ms.minSampleShading = 1.0f;
396 |     VkPipelineDepthStencilStateCreateInfo ds = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_DEPTH_STENCIL_STATE_CREATE_INFO}; 
397 |     ds.depthTestEnable = VK_TRUE; 
398 |     ds.depthWriteEnable = VK_TRUE; 
399 |     ds.depthCompareOp = VK_COMPARE_OP_LESS;
400 |     ds.depthBoundsTestEnable = VK_FALSE;
401 |     ds.stencilTestEnable = VK_FALSE;
402 |     VkPipelineColorBlendAttachmentState cba = {}; 
403 |     cba.colorWriteMask = VK_COLOR_COMPONENT_R_BIT | VK_COLOR_COMPONENT_G_BIT | VK_COLOR_COMPONENT_B_BIT | VK_COLOR_COMPONENT_A_BIT;
404 |     cba.blendEnable = VK_FALSE;
405 |     VkPipelineColorBlendStateCreateInfo cb = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_COLOR_BLEND_STATE_CREATE_INFO}; cb.attachmentCount = 1; cb.pAttachments = &cba;
406 |     
407 |     VkPushConstantRange push = {VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT, 0, 64};
408 |     VkPipelineLayoutCreateInfo pl = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_LAYOUT_CREATE_INFO};
409 | 
410 |     // Descriptor set 0: visible instance buffer (this renderer)
411 |     // Descriptor set 1: bindless texture array (TextureManager), when available
412 |     VkDescriptorSetLayout setLayouts[2] = { m_descriptorSetLayout, VK_NULL_HANDLE };
413 |     uint32_t setLayoutCount = 1;
414 |     if (m_textureManager) {
415 |         setLayouts[1] = m_textureManager->GetDescriptorSetLayout();
416 |         setLayoutCount = 2;
417 |     }
418 |     pl.setLayoutCount = setLayoutCount;
419 |     pl.pSetLayouts = setLayouts;
420 |     pl.pushConstantRangeCount = 1;
421 |     pl.pPushConstantRanges = &push;
422 |     VkResult res = vkCreatePipelineLayout(m_vkDevice, &pl, nullptr, &m_pipelineLayout);
423 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
424 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create pipeline layout for mega geometry");
425 |         vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, vertMod, nullptr);
426 |         vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, fragMod, nullptr);
427 |         return false;
428 |     }
429 |     
430 |     VkGraphicsPipelineCreateInfo pipe = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_GRAPHICS_PIPELINE_CREATE_INFO};
431 |     pipe.flags = VK_PIPELINE_CREATE_ALLOW_DERIVATIVES_BIT; // Enable pipeline derivatives for faster creation
432 |     pipe.stageCount = 2; pipe.pStages = stages; pipe.pVertexInputState = &vi; pipe.pInputAssemblyState = &ia;
433 |     pipe.pViewportState = &vp; pipe.pRasterizationState = &rs; pipe.pMultisampleState = &ms; pipe.pDepthStencilState = &ds; pipe.pColorBlendState = &cb;
434 |     pipe.pDynamicState = &dynamicState;
435 |     pipe.layout = m_pipelineLayout; pipe.renderPass = renderPass;
436 |     
437 |     // Use pipeline cache for faster creation on subsequent runs
438 |     VkPipelineCacheCreateInfo cacheInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_CACHE_CREATE_INFO};
439 |     VkPipelineCache cache = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
440 |     res = vkCreatePipelineCache(m_vkDevice, &cacheInfo, nullptr, &cache);
441 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS && logger) {
442 |         logger->LogWarning("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create pipeline cache (non-fatal)");
443 |     }
444 |     
445 |     res = vkCreateGraphicsPipelines(m_vkDevice, cache, 1, &pipe, nullptr, &m_pipeline);
446 |     
447 |     if (cache != VK_NULL_HANDLE) {
448 |         vkDestroyPipelineCache(m_vkDevice, cache, nullptr);
449 |     }
450 |     
451 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
452 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "vkCreateGraphicsPipelines failed for mega geometry pipeline");
453 |         vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, vertMod, nullptr);
454 |         vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, fragMod, nullptr);
455 |         return false;
456 |     }
457 | 
458 |     vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, vertMod, nullptr);
459 |     vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, fragMod, nullptr);
460 |     return true;
461 | }
462 | 
463 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::LoadMesh(const char* path, uint32_t meshSlot) {
464 |     auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
465 |     
466 |     // Stage 1: Load Header (Optimized)
467 |     MeshHeader header = {};
468 |     if (!m_core->GetAssetProvider()->LoadBinaryToBuffer(path, &header, sizeof(MeshHeader))) {
469 |         if (logger) {
470 |             char msg[256];
471 |             snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "LoadMesh: Failed to load header for %s", path);
472 |             logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", msg);
473 |         }
474 |         return false;
475 |     }
476 |     if (logger) {
477 |         char msg[256];
478 |         snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "LoadMesh: Loaded %s - %u vertices, %u indices", 
479 |             path, header.vertexCount, header.indexCount);
480 |         logger->LogInfo("MegaGeometryRenderer", msg);
481 |     }
482 |     
483 |     if (m_vertexOffset + header.vertexCount > MAX_VERTICES) return false;
484 |     if (m_indexOffset + header.indexCount > MAX_INDICES) return false;
485 | 
486 |     // Stage 2: Direct Disk-To-GPU Streaming (Zero RAM allocation)
487 |     // We skip the traditional "Load binary to RAM" step and stream directly to Persistent-Mapped VRAM
488 |     
489 |     // AssetProvider must handle reading with an offset to skip header
490 |     // Since LoadBinaryToBuffer doesn't have offset, we load Vertices + Indices in one shot
491 |     // To keep it simple and zero-copy, we load exactly what we need
492 |     
493 |     // NOTE: This implementation assumes LoadBinaryToBuffer can handle loading specific segments
494 |     // Stage 2: Nitrogen High-Fidelity 16-bit Quantization
495 |     Vertex3DNitro* vDest = (Vertex3DNitro*)m_vertexDataMapped + m_vertexOffset;
496 |     uint16_t* iDest = (uint16_t*)((uint8_t*)m_indexDataMapped + (m_indexOffset * sizeof(uint16_t)));
497 | 
498 |     auto provider = m_core->GetAssetProvider();
499 |     auto rawBuffer = provider->LoadBinary(path);
500 |     if (rawBuffer.size() < sizeof(MeshHeader)) return false;
501 | 
502 |     Vertex3D* src = (Vertex3D*)(rawBuffer.data() + sizeof(MeshHeader));
503 |     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < header.vertexCount; ++i) {
504 |         // 16-bit Position: Scale 8.0f covers range [-8, 8] with 0.0002 precision
505 |         vDest[i].pos[0] = (int16_t)std::clamp(src[i].position[0] * 4096.0f, -32768.0f, 32767.0f);
506 |         vDest[i].pos[1] = (int16_t)std::clamp(src[i].position[1] * 4096.0f, -32768.0f, 32767.0f);
507 |         vDest[i].pos[2] = (int16_t)std::clamp(src[i].position[2] * 4096.0f, -32768.0f, 32767.0f);
508 |         vDest[i].pos[3] = 32767; // W=1.0
509 | 
510 |         vDest[i].norm[0] = (int8_t)std::clamp(src[i].normal[0] * 127.0f, -128.0f, 127.0f);
511 |         vDest[i].norm[1] = (int8_t)std::clamp(src[i].normal[1] * 127.0f, -128.0f, 127.0f);
512 |         vDest[i].norm[2] = (int8_t)std::clamp(src[i].normal[2] * 127.0f, -128.0f, 127.0f);
513 |         vDest[i].norm[3] = 0;
514 | 
515 |         vDest[i].uv[0] = (uint16_t)std::clamp(src[i].uv[0] * 65535.0f, 0.0f, 65535.0f);
516 |         vDest[i].uv[1] = (uint16_t)std::clamp(src[i].uv[1] * 65535.0f, 0.0f, 65535.0f);
517 |     }
518 |     
519 |     // Quantize Indices to 16-bit
520 |     uint32_t* srcIndices = (uint32_t*)(rawBuffer.data() + sizeof(MeshHeader) + (header.vertexCount * sizeof(Vertex3D)));
521 |     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < header.indexCount; ++i) {
522 |         iDest[i] = (uint16_t)srcIndices[i];
523 |     }
524 |     
525 |     // Transfer to BOTH buffers for persistence
526 |     for(int i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
527 |         if (m_indirectMapped[i]) {
528 |             m_indirectMapped[i][meshSlot].indexCount = header.indexCount;
529 |             m_indirectMapped[i][meshSlot].instanceCount = 0;
530 |             m_indirectMapped[i][meshSlot].firstIndex = m_indexOffset;
531 |             m_indirectMapped[i][meshSlot].vertexOffset = (int32_t)m_vertexOffset;
532 |             m_indirectMapped[i][meshSlot].firstInstance = 0;
533 |         } else {
534 |             if (logger) {
535 |                 char msg[256];
536 |                 snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "LoadMesh: indirectMapped[%d] is null!", i);
537 |                 logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", msg);
538 |             }
539 |             return false;
540 |         }
541 |     }
542 |     
543 |     m_vertexOffset += header.vertexCount;
544 |     m_indexOffset += header.indexCount;
545 |     
546 |     if (logger) {
547 |         char msg[256];
548 |         snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "LoadMesh: Mesh slot %u initialized with indexCount=%u", 
549 |             meshSlot, header.indexCount);
550 |         logger->LogInfo("MegaGeometryRenderer", msg);
551 |     }
552 |     return true;
553 | }
554 | 
555 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::CreateVisibleBuffer() {
556 |     VkDeviceSize bufferSize = sizeof(InstanceData) * MAX_INSTANCES;
557 |     for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
558 |         if (!Helpers::CreateBuffer(m_vkDevice, m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), bufferSize,
559 |                                  VK_BUFFER_USAGE_STORAGE_BUFFER_BIT | VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT,
560 |                                  VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT, // Visible for debugging if needed
561 |                                  m_visibleInstanceSSBO[i], m_visibleInstanceMemory[i])) return false;
562 |     }
563 |     return true;
564 | }
565 | 
566 | bool MegaGeometryRenderer::CreateCullPipeline() {
567 |     auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
568 | 
569 |     auto computeCode = m_core->GetAssetProvider()->LoadBinary("shaders/cull_comp.spv");
570 |     if (computeCode.empty()) {
571 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to load cull_comp.spv for compute culling pipeline");
572 |         return false;
573 |     }
574 |     
575 |     VkShaderModule cullMod = Helpers::CreateShaderModule(m_vkDevice, computeCode);
576 |     if (cullMod == VK_NULL_HANDLE) {
577 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create shader module for cull_comp.spv");
578 |         return false;
579 |     }
580 |     
581 |     // 1. Cull Descriptor Layout
582 |     VkDescriptorSetLayoutBinding bindings[3] = {
583 |         {0, VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, 1, VK_SHADER_STAGE_COMPUTE_BIT, nullptr}, 
584 |         {1, VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, 1, VK_SHADER_STAGE_COMPUTE_BIT, nullptr}, 
585 |         {2, VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, 1, VK_SHADER_STAGE_COMPUTE_BIT, nullptr}  
586 |     };
587 |     
588 |     VkDescriptorSetLayoutCreateInfo layoutInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_LAYOUT_CREATE_INFO};
589 |     layoutInfo.bindingCount = 3; layoutInfo.pBindings = bindings;
590 |     VkResult res = vkCreateDescriptorSetLayout(m_vkDevice, &layoutInfo, nullptr, &m_cullDescriptorLayout);
591 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
592 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create descriptor set layout for culling pipeline");
593 |         vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, cullMod, nullptr);
594 |         return false;
595 |     }
596 |     
597 |     // 2. Cull Pipeline Layout
598 |     VkPushConstantRange push = {VK_SHADER_STAGE_COMPUTE_BIT, 0, 80}; 
599 |     VkPipelineLayoutCreateInfo pl = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_LAYOUT_CREATE_INFO};
600 |     pl.setLayoutCount = 1; pl.pSetLayouts = &m_cullDescriptorLayout;
601 |     pl.pushConstantRangeCount = 1; pl.pPushConstantRanges = &push;
602 |     res = vkCreatePipelineLayout(m_vkDevice, &pl, nullptr, &m_cullLayout);
603 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
604 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create pipeline layout for culling pipeline");
605 |         vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, cullMod, nullptr);
606 |         return false;
607 |     }
608 |     
609 |     // 3. Cull Descriptor Sets
610 |     VkDescriptorPoolSize poolSize = {VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, 6};
611 |     VkDescriptorPoolCreateInfo poolInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_POOL_CREATE_INFO};
612 |     poolInfo.maxSets = 2; poolInfo.poolSizeCount = 1; poolInfo.pPoolSizes = &poolSize;
613 |     VkDescriptorPool pool = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
614 |     res = vkCreateDescriptorPool(m_vkDevice, &poolInfo, nullptr, &pool);
615 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
616 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to create descriptor pool for culling pipeline");
617 |         vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, cullMod, nullptr);
618 |         return false;
619 |     }
620 |     
621 |     for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
622 |         VkDescriptorSetAllocateInfo alloc = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_ALLOCATE_INFO};
623 |         alloc.descriptorPool = pool;
624 |         alloc.descriptorSetCount = 1;
625 |         alloc.pSetLayouts = &m_cullDescriptorLayout;
626 |         res = vkAllocateDescriptorSets(m_vkDevice, &alloc, &m_cullDescriptorSet[i]);
627 |         if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
628 |             if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "Failed to allocate descriptor set for culling pipeline");
629 |             vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, cullMod, nullptr);
630 |             return false;
631 |         }
632 |         
633 |         VkDescriptorBufferInfo bSrc = {m_instanceSSBO[i], 0, VK_WHOLE_SIZE};
634 |         VkDescriptorBufferInfo bVis = {m_visibleInstanceSSBO[i], 0, VK_WHOLE_SIZE};
635 |         VkDescriptorBufferInfo bInd = {m_indirectBuffer[i], 0, VK_WHOLE_SIZE};
636 |         
637 |         VkWriteDescriptorSet writes[3] = {};
638 |         writes[0] = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_WRITE_DESCRIPTOR_SET, nullptr, m_cullDescriptorSet[i], 0, 0, 1, VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, nullptr, &bSrc, nullptr};
639 |         writes[1] = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_WRITE_DESCRIPTOR_SET, nullptr, m_cullDescriptorSet[i], 1, 0, 1, VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, nullptr, &bVis, nullptr};
640 |         writes[2] = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_WRITE_DESCRIPTOR_SET, nullptr, m_cullDescriptorSet[i], 2, 0, 1, VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER, nullptr, &bInd, nullptr};
641 |         vkUpdateDescriptorSets(m_vkDevice, 3, writes, 0, nullptr);
642 |     }
643 |     
644 |     // 4. Cull Pipeline
645 |     VkComputePipelineCreateInfo cp = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMPUTE_PIPELINE_CREATE_INFO};
646 |     cp.stage = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_SHADER_STAGE_CREATE_INFO, nullptr, 0, VK_SHADER_STAGE_COMPUTE_BIT, cullMod, "main", nullptr};
647 |     cp.layout = m_cullLayout;
648 |     res = vkCreateComputePipelines(m_vkDevice, VK_NULL_HANDLE, 1, &cp, nullptr, &m_cullPipeline);
649 |     if (res != VK_SUCCESS) {
650 |         if (logger) logger->LogError("MegaGeometryRenderer", "vkCreateComputePipelines failed for culling pipeline");
651 |         vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, cullMod, nullptr);
652 |         return false;
653 |     }
654 |     
655 |     vkDestroyShaderModule(m_vkDevice, cullMod, nullptr);
656 |     return true;
657 | }
658 | 
659 | uint32_t MegaGeometryRenderer::AddInstance(uint32_t meshSlot, float x, float y, float z, uint32_t textureID) {
660 |     uint32_t id = m_totalInstances.fetch_add(1);
661 |     if(id >= MAX_INSTANCES) {
662 |         auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
663 |         if (logger) logger->LogWarning("MegaGeometryRenderer", "AddInstance: MAX_INSTANCES reached");
664 |         return MAX_INSTANCES;
665 |     }
666 |     
667 |     // Initial color
668 |     UpdateInstanceColor(id, 1,1,1,1);
669 |     // Transform (Implicitly calculates MVP)
670 |     UpdateInstanceTransform(id, x, y, z);
671 |     // Texture (if provided)
672 |     UpdateInstanceTexture(id, textureID);
673 |     
674 |     for(int i=0; i<2; ++i) {
675 |         if(m_indirectMapped[i] && meshSlot < MAX_MESHES) {
676 |             m_indirectMapped[i][meshSlot].instanceCount++;
677 |         } else {
678 |             auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
679 |             if (logger && i == 0) {
680 |                 char msg[256];
681 |                 snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "AddInstance: indirectMapped[%d] is null or meshSlot %u >= MAX_MESHES", i, meshSlot);
682 |                 logger->LogWarning("MegaGeometryRenderer", msg);
683 |             }
684 |         }
685 |     }
686 |     return id;
687 | }
688 | 
689 | void MegaGeometryRenderer::RemoveInstance(uint32_t instanceID, uint32_t meshSlot) {}
690 | 
691 | MegaGeometryRenderer::RenderStats MegaGeometryRenderer::GetStats() const { 
692 |     uint32_t totalTris = 0;
693 |     uint32_t totalInstances = m_totalInstances.load();
694 |     
695 |     // Just use frame 0 for stats
696 |     if (m_indirectMapped[0]) {
697 |         for (uint32_t i = 0; i < MAX_MESHES; ++i) {
698 |             uint32_t idxCount = m_indirectMapped[0][i].indexCount;
699 |             uint32_t instCount = m_indirectMapped[0][i].instanceCount;
700 |             if (idxCount > 0 && instCount > 0) {
701 |                 totalTris += (idxCount / 3) * instCount;
702 |             }
703 |         }
704 |     } else {
705 |         auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
706 |         if (logger) {
707 |             static int logCount = 0;
708 |             if (logCount++ < 5) { // Log first 5 times only
709 |                 logger->LogWarning("MegaGeometryRenderer", "GetStats: indirectMapped[0] is null");
710 |             }
711 |         }
712 |     }
713 |     return { totalInstances, totalTris, 1 }; 
714 | }
715 | 
716 | } // namespace SecretEngine::MegaGeometry
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/MegaGeometryRenderer.h
```
1 | // ============================================================================
2 | // GPU-DRIVEN MEGA-GEOMETRY RENDERER
3 | // Process 10M+ triangles at 60fps using FDA + Vulkan Indirect Draw
4 | // ============================================================================
5 | 
6 | #pragma once
7 | #include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
8 | #include <vector>
9 | #include <atomic>
10 | #include <cstring>
11 | #include <SecretEngine/Math.h>
12 | #include <SecretEngine/IAssetProvider.h>
13 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
14 | #include <SecretEngine/Fast/FastData.h>
15 | #include "TextureManager.h"
16 | 
17 | class VulkanDevice;
18 | 
19 | // Instance data structure is now in SecretEngine/Math.h
20 | using SecretEngine::Math::InstanceData;
21 | 
22 | namespace SecretEngine::Textures { class TextureManager; }
23 | 
24 | // ============================================================================
25 | // INDIRECT DRAW COMMAND (Vulkan Standard Format)
26 | // ============================================================================
27 | 
28 | namespace SecretEngine::MegaGeometry {
29 | 
30 | // ============================================================================
31 | // MEGA GEOMETRY SYSTEM
32 | // Handles millions of triangles using GPU-driven rendering
33 | // ============================================================================
34 | class MegaGeometryRenderer {
35 | private:
36 |     
37 |     // === GPU BUFFERS (All persistent-mapped) ===
38 |     
39 |     // Instance data (65,536 instances max) - DOUBLE BUFFERED
40 |     VkBuffer m_instanceSSBO[2] = {VK_NULL_HANDLE, VK_NULL_HANDLE};
41 |     VkDeviceMemory m_instanceSSBOMemory[2] = {VK_NULL_HANDLE, VK_NULL_HANDLE};
42 |     InstanceData* m_instanceDataMapped[2] = {nullptr, nullptr}; // PERSISTENT MAP!
43 |     static constexpr uint32_t MAX_INSTANCES = 65536;
44 |     
45 |     // Indirect draw commands (one per mesh type) - DOUBLE BUFFERED
46 |     VkBuffer m_indirectBuffer[2] = {VK_NULL_HANDLE, VK_NULL_HANDLE};
47 |     VkDeviceMemory m_indirectMemory[2] = {VK_NULL_HANDLE, VK_NULL_HANDLE};
48 |     VkDrawIndexedIndirectCommand* m_indirectMapped[2] = {nullptr, nullptr};
49 |     static constexpr uint32_t MAX_MESHES = 256;
50 |     
51 |     // Shared vertex buffer (One huge buffer for all meshes)
52 |     VkBuffer m_vertexBuffer = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
53 |     VkDeviceMemory m_vertexMemory = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
54 |     void* m_vertexDataMapped = nullptr; // PERSISTENT MAP
55 |     uint32_t m_vertexOffset = 0; 
56 |     static constexpr uint32_t MAX_VERTICES = 1000000;
57 |     
58 |     // Shared index buffer
59 |     VkBuffer m_indexBuffer = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
60 |     VkDeviceMemory m_indexMemory = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
61 |     void* m_indexDataMapped = nullptr; // PERSISTENT MAP
62 |     uint32_t m_indexOffset = 0;
63 |     static constexpr uint32_t MAX_INDICES = 3000000;
64 |     
65 |     // Pipeline
66 |     VkPipeline m_pipeline = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
67 |     VkPipelineLayout m_pipelineLayout = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
68 |     VkDescriptorSetLayout m_descriptorSetLayout = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
69 |     VkDescriptorSet m_descriptorSet[2] = {VK_NULL_HANDLE, VK_NULL_HANDLE};
70 |     
71 |     // Virtual Geometry (Compute Culling)
72 |     VkPipeline m_cullPipeline = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
73 |     VkPipelineLayout m_cullLayout = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
74 |     VkDescriptorSetLayout m_cullDescriptorLayout = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
75 |     VkDescriptorSet m_cullDescriptorSet[2] = {VK_NULL_HANDLE, VK_NULL_HANDLE};
76 |     VkBuffer m_visibleInstanceSSBO[2] = {VK_NULL_HANDLE, VK_NULL_HANDLE};
77 |     VkDeviceMemory m_visibleInstanceMemory[2] = {VK_NULL_HANDLE, VK_NULL_HANDLE};
78 |     
79 |     uint32_t m_frameIndex = 0;
80 |     
81 |     // Stats
82 |     std::atomic<uint32_t> m_totalInstances{0};
83 |     std::atomic<uint32_t> m_totalTriangles{0};
84 |     
85 |     // Camera
86 |     float m_viewProj[16];
87 |     
88 |     // Batch update flag
89 |     bool m_batchUpdateActive = false;
90 |     
91 | public:
92 |     bool Initialize(VulkanDevice* device, VkRenderPass renderPass, SecretEngine::ICore* core, SecretEngine::Textures::TextureManager* textureManager);
93 |     
94 |     void ProcessPacket(const SecretEngine::Fast::UltraPacket& packet) {
95 |         switch (packet.GetType()) {
96 |             case SecretEngine::Fast::PacketType::RenderTransform: {
97 |                 uint32_t instanceID = packet.GetMetadata();
98 |                 if (instanceID < MAX_INSTANCES) {
99 |                     float x = static_cast<float>(packet.dataA) / 32767.0f;
100 |                     float y = static_cast<float>(packet.dataB) / 32767.0f;
101 |                     UpdateInstanceTransform(instanceID, x, y, 0.0f);
102 |                 }
103 |                 break;
104 |             }
105 |             case SecretEngine::Fast::PacketType::RenderCommand: {
106 |                 uint32_t instanceID = packet.GetMetadata();
107 |                 if (instanceID < MAX_INSTANCES) {
108 |                     // CMD ID 1: Update Color (dataA = color index or packed)
109 |                     UpdateInstanceColor(instanceID, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f); 
110 |                 }
111 |                 break;
112 |             }
113 |             default:
114 |                 break;
115 |         }
116 |     }
117 |     
118 |     void UpdateInstanceTransform(uint32_t instanceID, float x, float y, float z, float rotY = 0.0f, float rotX = 0.0f, float rotZ = 0.0f);
119 |     void UpdateInstanceColor(uint32_t instanceID, float r, float g, float b, float a);
120 |     void UpdateInstanceTexture(uint32_t instanceID, uint32_t textureID);
121 |     
122 |     void SetViewProjection(const float* vp) {
123 |         memcpy(m_viewProj, vp, sizeof(float) * 16);
124 |     }
125 |     
126 |     void PreRender(VkCommandBuffer cmd);
127 |     void Render(VkCommandBuffer cmd);
128 |     
129 |     // Batch update optimization
130 |     void BeginBatchUpdate() { m_batchUpdateActive = true; }
131 |     void EndBatchUpdate() { m_batchUpdateActive = false; }
132 |     
133 |     bool LoadMesh(const char* path, uint32_t meshSlot);
134 |     uint32_t AddInstance(uint32_t meshSlot, float x, float y, float z, uint32_t textureID = UINT32_MAX);
135 |     void RemoveInstance(uint32_t instanceID, uint32_t meshSlot);
136 |     
137 |     struct RenderStats {
138 |         uint32_t totalInstances;
139 |         uint32_t totalTriangles;
140 |         uint32_t drawCalls;
141 |     };
142 |     
143 |     RenderStats GetStats() const;
144 | 
145 | private:
146 |     bool CreateGeometricBuffers();
147 |     bool CreateInstanceSSBO();
148 |     bool CreateIndirectBuffer();
149 |     bool CreateDescriptorSet();
150 |     bool CreatePipeline(VkRenderPass renderPass);
151 |     bool CreateCullPipeline();
152 |     bool CreateVisibleBuffer();
153 |     VkDevice m_vkDevice = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
154 |     VulkanDevice* m_device = nullptr;
155 |     SecretEngine::ICore* m_core = nullptr;
156 |     SecretEngine::Textures::TextureManager* m_textureManager = nullptr;
157 | };
158 | 
159 | } // namespace SecretEngine::MegaGeometry
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/Pipeline3D.cpp
```
1 | // SecretEngine
2 | // Module: VulkanRenderer
3 | // Responsibility: 3D Graphics Pipeline (Multi-Mesh, Instanced)
4 | // Dependencies: VulkanDevice, ICore, Math, IAssetProvider
5 | 
6 | #include "Pipeline3D.h"
7 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
8 | #include <SecretEngine/ILogger.h>
9 | #include <SecretEngine/Math.h>
10 | #include <SecretEngine/IAssetProvider.h>
11 | #include "VulkanHelpers.h"
12 | #include <cstring>
13 | #include <vector>
14 | #include <map>
15 | 
16 | using namespace SecretEngine::Math;
17 | using SecretEngine::Vulkan::Helpers;
18 | 
19 | // Instance data structure is now in SecretEngine/Math.h
20 | using SecretEngine::Math::InstanceData;
21 | 
22 | Pipeline3D::Pipeline3D() : m_device(nullptr), m_core(nullptr), m_renderPass(VK_NULL_HANDLE), m_pipeline(VK_NULL_HANDLE),
23 |     m_pipelineLayout(VK_NULL_HANDLE), m_instanceBuffer(VK_NULL_HANDLE),
24 |     m_instanceMemory(VK_NULL_HANDLE), m_currentColorIndex(0) 
25 | {
26 | }
27 | 
28 | Pipeline3D::~Pipeline3D() { Cleanup(); }
29 | 
30 | bool Pipeline3D::Initialize(VulkanDevice* device, VkRenderPass renderPass, SecretEngine::ICore* core) {
31 |     m_device = device; m_renderPass = renderPass; m_core = core;
32 |     
33 |     // Create Instance Buffer
34 |     VkDeviceSize instanceBufferSize = sizeof(InstanceData) * MAX_INSTANCES;
35 |     Helpers::CreateBuffer(m_device->GetDevice(), m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), instanceBufferSize,
36 |                          VK_BUFFER_USAGE_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT, VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT,
37 |                          m_instanceBuffer, m_instanceMemory);
38 | 
39 |     if (!CreatePipeline()) return false;
40 |     m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("Pipeline3D", "✓ 3D Multi-Mesh Pipeline initialized");
41 |     return true;
42 | }
43 | 
44 | bool Pipeline3D::LoadMesh(const char* filename) {
45 |     if (m_meshes.count(filename)) return true; // Already loaded
46 | 
47 |     auto buffer = m_core->GetAssetProvider()->LoadBinary(filename);
48 |     if (buffer.size() < sizeof(MeshHeader)) return false;
49 |     
50 |     MeshHeader* header = reinterpret_cast<MeshHeader*>(buffer.data());
51 |     
52 |     MeshData mesh = {};
53 |     mesh.vertexCount = header->vertexCount;
54 |     mesh.indexCount = header->indexCount;
55 |     Vertex3D* vertices = reinterpret_cast<Vertex3D*>(buffer.data() + sizeof(MeshHeader));
56 |     uint32_t* indices = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(buffer.data() + sizeof(MeshHeader) + mesh.vertexCount * sizeof(Vertex3D));
57 | 
58 |     VkDeviceSize vertexBufferSize = mesh.vertexCount * sizeof(Vertex3D);
59 |     Helpers::CreateBuffer(m_device->GetDevice(), m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), vertexBufferSize,
60 |                          VK_BUFFER_USAGE_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT, VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT,
61 |                          mesh.vertexBuffer, mesh.vertexMemory);
62 |     Helpers::MapAndCopy(m_device->GetDevice(), mesh.vertexMemory, vertexBufferSize, vertices);
63 | 
64 |     VkDeviceSize indexBufferSize = mesh.indexCount * sizeof(uint32_t);
65 |     Helpers::CreateBuffer(m_device->GetDevice(), m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), indexBufferSize,
66 |                          VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDEX_BUFFER_BIT, VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT,
67 |                          mesh.indexBuffer, mesh.indexMemory);
68 |     Helpers::MapAndCopy(m_device->GetDevice(), mesh.indexMemory, indexBufferSize, indices);
69 | 
70 |     m_meshes[filename] = mesh;
71 |     m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("Pipeline3D", (std::string("Loaded mesh resource: ") + filename).c_str());
72 |     return true;
73 | }
74 | 
75 | bool Pipeline3D::CreatePipeline() {
76 |     auto vertCode = m_core->GetAssetProvider()->LoadBinary("shaders/basic3d_vert.spv");
77 |     auto fragCode = m_core->GetAssetProvider()->LoadBinary("shaders/basic3d_frag.spv");
78 |     
79 |     if (vertCode.empty() || fragCode.empty()) return false;
80 |     
81 |     VkShaderModule vertMod = Helpers::CreateShaderModule(m_device->GetDevice(), vertCode);
82 |     VkShaderModule fragMod = Helpers::CreateShaderModule(m_device->GetDevice(), fragCode);
83 | 
84 |     VkPipelineShaderStageCreateInfo stages[2] = {};
85 |     stages[0].sType = VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_SHADER_STAGE_CREATE_INFO; stages[0].stage = VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT; stages[0].module = vertMod; stages[0].pName = "main";
86 |     stages[1].sType = VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_SHADER_STAGE_CREATE_INFO; stages[1].stage = VK_SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT_BIT; stages[1].module = fragMod; stages[1].pName = "main";
87 | 
88 |     VkVertexInputBindingDescription bindings[2] = {
89 |         {0, sizeof(Vertex3D), VK_VERTEX_INPUT_RATE_VERTEX},
90 |         {1, sizeof(InstanceData), VK_VERTEX_INPUT_RATE_INSTANCE}
91 |     };
92 |     VkVertexInputAttributeDescription attrs[7] = {
93 |         {0, 0, VK_FORMAT_R32G32B32_SFLOAT, 0}, // Pos
94 |         {1, 0, VK_FORMAT_R32G32B32_SFLOAT, 12}, // Norm
95 |         {2, 0, VK_FORMAT_R32G32_SFLOAT, 24},    // UV
96 |         {3, 1, VK_FORMAT_R32G32B32A32_SFLOAT, 0},  // Matrix R0
97 |         {4, 1, VK_FORMAT_R32G32B32A32_SFLOAT, 16}, // Matrix R1
98 |         {5, 1, VK_FORMAT_R32G32B32A32_SFLOAT, 32}, // Matrix R2
99 |         {6, 1, VK_FORMAT_R32_UINT, 48}             // Packed Color (8-bit Nitrogen)
100 |     };
101 | 
102 |     VkPipelineVertexInputStateCreateInfo vInput = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_VERTEX_INPUT_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
103 |     vInput.vertexBindingDescriptionCount = 2; vInput.pVertexBindingDescriptions = bindings;
104 |     vInput.vertexAttributeDescriptionCount = 7; vInput.pVertexAttributeDescriptions = attrs;
105 | 
106 |     VkPipelineInputAssemblyStateCreateInfo inputAsm = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
107 |     inputAsm.topology = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_LIST;
108 | 
109 |     VkPipelineViewportStateCreateInfo vport = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_VIEWPORT_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
110 |     vport.viewportCount = 1; vport.pViewports = nullptr; // Dynamic
111 |     vport.scissorCount = 1; vport.pScissors = nullptr; // Dynamic
112 | 
113 |     VkDynamicState dynStates[] = { VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_VIEWPORT, VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_SCISSOR };
114 |     VkPipelineDynamicStateCreateInfo dynamicState = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_DYNAMIC_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
115 |     dynamicState.dynamicStateCount = 2;
116 |     dynamicState.pDynamicStates = dynStates;
117 | 
118 |     VkPipelineRasterizationStateCreateInfo raster = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_RASTERIZATION_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
119 |     raster.lineWidth = 1.0f; raster.cullMode = VK_CULL_MODE_NONE; raster.frontFace = VK_FRONT_FACE_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE;
120 | 
121 |     VkPipelineMultisampleStateCreateInfo ms = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_MULTISAMPLE_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
122 |     ms.rasterizationSamples = VK_SAMPLE_COUNT_1_BIT;
123 |     
124 |     VkPipelineDepthStencilStateCreateInfo ds = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_DEPTH_STENCIL_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
125 |     ds.depthTestEnable = VK_FALSE; ds.depthWriteEnable = VK_FALSE; ds.depthCompareOp = VK_COMPARE_OP_ALWAYS;
126 | 
127 |     VkPipelineColorBlendAttachmentState cbAs = {}; cbAs.colorWriteMask = 0xF;
128 |     VkPipelineColorBlendStateCreateInfo cb = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_COLOR_BLEND_STATE_CREATE_INFO };
129 |     cb.attachmentCount = 1; cb.pAttachments = &cbAs;
130 | 
131 |     VkPushConstantRange push = {VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT, 0, sizeof(float) * 16};
132 |     VkPipelineLayoutCreateInfo layoutInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_LAYOUT_CREATE_INFO };
133 |     layoutInfo.pushConstantRangeCount = 1; layoutInfo.pPushConstantRanges = &push;
134 |     vkCreatePipelineLayout(m_device->GetDevice(), &layoutInfo, nullptr, &m_pipelineLayout);
135 | 
136 |     VkGraphicsPipelineCreateInfo pipe = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_GRAPHICS_PIPELINE_CREATE_INFO };
137 |     pipe.stageCount = 2; pipe.pStages = stages; pipe.pVertexInputState = &vInput; pipe.pInputAssemblyState = &inputAsm;
138 |     pipe.pViewportState = &vport; pipe.pRasterizationState = &raster; pipe.pMultisampleState = &ms; pipe.pColorBlendState = &cb; pipe.pDepthStencilState = &ds;
139 |     pipe.pDynamicState = &dynamicState;
140 |     pipe.layout = m_pipelineLayout; pipe.renderPass = m_renderPass;
141 |     vkCreateGraphicsPipelines(m_device->GetDevice(), VK_NULL_HANDLE, 1, &pipe, nullptr, &m_pipeline);
142 | 
143 |     vkDestroyShaderModule(m_device->GetDevice(), vertMod, nullptr); vkDestroyShaderModule(m_device->GetDevice(), fragMod, nullptr);
144 |     return true;
145 | }
146 | 
147 | #include <SecretEngine/IWorld.h>
148 | #include <SecretEngine/Components.h>
149 | 
150 | void Pipeline3D::Render(VkCommandBuffer cmd, float rotation, float aspect, const float camPos[3], const float camRot[3], const float* viewProj) {
151 |     if (m_pipeline == VK_NULL_HANDLE || m_meshes.empty()) return;
152 |     
153 |     Matrix4x4 vp;
154 |     if (viewProj) {
155 |         memcpy(vp.m, viewProj, 16 * sizeof(float));
156 |     } else {
157 |         Matrix4x4 proj = Matrix4x4::Perspective(0.785f, aspect, 0.1f, 100.0f);
158 |         Matrix4x4 view = Matrix4x4::RotationX(-camRot[0]) * 
159 |                          Matrix4x4::RotationY(-camRot[1]) * 
160 |                          Matrix4x4::RotationZ(-camRot[2]) * 
161 |                          Matrix4x4::Translation(-camPos[0], -camPos[1], -camPos[2]);
162 | 
163 |         vp = proj * view;
164 |     }
165 | 
166 |     vkCmdBindPipeline(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_BIND_POINT_GRAPHICS, m_pipeline);
167 |     vkCmdPushConstants(cmd, m_pipelineLayout, VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT, 0, sizeof(float)*16, vp.m);
168 | 
169 |     struct DrawCall {
170 |         std::string meshPath;
171 |         uint32_t firstInstance;
172 |         uint32_t instanceCount;
173 |     };
174 |     std::vector<DrawCall> drawCalls;
175 |     std::vector<InstanceData> allInstanceData;
176 | 
177 |     if (m_core->GetWorld()) {
178 |         auto world = m_core->GetWorld();
179 |         const auto& entities = world->GetAllEntities();
180 |         
181 |         // Group by mesh
182 |         std::map<std::string, std::vector<size_t>> meshToEntities;
183 |         for (size_t i = 0; i < entities.size(); ++i) {
184 |             auto meshComp = static_cast<SecretEngine::MeshComponent*>(world->GetComponent(entities[i], SecretEngine::MeshComponent::TypeID));
185 |             if (meshComp) meshToEntities[meshComp->meshPath].push_back(i);
186 |         }
187 | 
188 |         for (auto const& [path, indices] : meshToEntities) {
189 |             if (!m_meshes.count(path)) continue;
190 |             
191 |             DrawCall dc = { path, (uint32_t)allInstanceData.size(), 0 };
192 |             for (size_t idx : indices) {
193 |                 if (allInstanceData.size() >= MAX_INSTANCES) break;
194 |                 auto e = entities[idx];
195 |                 auto transform = static_cast<SecretEngine::TransformComponent*>(world->GetComponent(e, SecretEngine::TransformComponent::TypeID));
196 |                 auto meshComp = static_cast<SecretEngine::MeshComponent*>(world->GetComponent(e, SecretEngine::MeshComponent::TypeID));
197 |                 
198 |                 InstanceData inst = {};
199 |                 Matrix4x4::FromTRS(inst.transform, transform->position[0], transform->position[1], transform->position[2], 0.0f, transform->rotation[1], 0.0f, transform->scale[0]);
200 |                 
201 |                 // Pack 8-bit color
202 |                 uint32_t r = (uint32_t)(meshComp->color[0] * 255.0f) & 0xFF;
203 |                 uint32_t g = (uint32_t)(meshComp->color[1] * 255.0f) & 0xFF;
204 |                 uint32_t b = (uint32_t)(meshComp->color[2] * 255.0f) & 0xFF;
205 |                 inst.packedColor = r | (g << 8) | (b << 16) | (0xFF << 24);
206 |                 
207 |                 allInstanceData.push_back(inst);
208 |                 dc.instanceCount++;
209 |             }
210 |             if (dc.instanceCount > 0) drawCalls.push_back(dc);
211 |         }
212 |     }
213 | 
214 |     if (allInstanceData.empty()) return;
215 | 
216 |     // Map once for the whole frame
217 |     void* data;
218 |     vkMapMemory(m_device->GetDevice(), m_instanceMemory, 0, allInstanceData.size() * sizeof(InstanceData), 0, &data);
219 |     memcpy(data, allInstanceData.data(), allInstanceData.size() * sizeof(InstanceData));
220 |     vkUnmapMemory(m_device->GetDevice(), m_instanceMemory);
221 | 
222 |     for (const auto& dc : drawCalls) {
223 |         const auto& mesh = m_meshes[dc.meshPath];
224 |         VkBuffer vbs[] = {mesh.vertexBuffer, m_instanceBuffer};
225 |         VkDeviceSize offsets[] = {0, dc.firstInstance * sizeof(InstanceData)};
226 |         vkCmdBindVertexBuffers(cmd, 0, 2, vbs, offsets);
227 |         vkCmdBindIndexBuffer(cmd, mesh.indexBuffer, 0, VK_INDEX_TYPE_UINT32);
228 |         vkCmdDrawIndexed(cmd, mesh.indexCount, dc.instanceCount, 0, 0, 0);
229 |     }
230 | }
231 | 
232 | void Pipeline3D::SetCubeColor(int idx) { m_currentColorIndex = idx % 6; }
233 | void Pipeline3D::UpdateEntityPosition(int i, float x, float y) {}
234 | 
235 | void Pipeline3D::Cleanup() {
236 |     if (m_device) {
237 |         if (m_pipeline) vkDestroyPipeline(m_device->GetDevice(), m_pipeline, nullptr);
238 |         if (m_pipelineLayout) vkDestroyPipelineLayout(m_device->GetDevice(), m_pipelineLayout, nullptr);
239 |         for (auto& pair : m_meshes) {
240 |             vkDestroyBuffer(m_device->GetDevice(), pair.second.vertexBuffer, nullptr);
241 |             vkFreeMemory(m_device->GetDevice(), pair.second.vertexMemory, nullptr);
242 |             vkDestroyBuffer(m_device->GetDevice(), pair.second.indexBuffer, nullptr);
243 |             vkFreeMemory(m_device->GetDevice(), pair.second.indexMemory, nullptr);
244 |         }
245 |         if (m_instanceBuffer) { vkDestroyBuffer(m_device->GetDevice(), m_instanceBuffer, nullptr); vkFreeMemory(m_device->GetDevice(), m_instanceMemory, nullptr); }
246 |     }
247 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/Pipeline3D.h
```
1 | #pragma once
2 | #include "VulkanDevice.h"
3 | #include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
4 | #include <vector>
5 | #include <map>
6 | #include <string>
7 | 
8 | namespace SecretEngine {
9 |     class ICore;
10 | }
11 | 
12 | struct Vertex3D {
13 |     float position[3];
14 |     float normal[3];
15 |     float uv[2];
16 | };
17 | 
18 | struct Vertex3DNitro {
19 |     int16_t pos[4];    // 8 bytes - 16-bit Nitro Positioning (Supports wide range)
20 |     int8_t  norm[4];   // 4 bytes - 8-bit Nitro Normals (Fast decoding)
21 |     uint16_t uv[2];    // 4 bytes - 16-bit Nitro UVs (Texture fidelity)
22 | };
23 | static_assert(sizeof(Vertex3DNitro) == 16, "Vertex3DNitro must be 16 bytes for peak Nitrogen cache efficiency");
24 | 
25 | struct MeshHeader {
26 |     char magic[4];
27 |     uint32_t version;
28 |     uint32_t vertexCount;
29 |     uint32_t indexCount;
30 |     float boundsMin[3];
31 |     float boundsMax[3];
32 | };
33 | 
34 | class Pipeline3D {
35 | public:
36 |     Pipeline3D();
37 |     ~Pipeline3D();
38 |     
39 |     bool Initialize(VulkanDevice* device, VkRenderPass renderPass, SecretEngine::ICore* core);
40 |     bool LoadMesh(const char* path);
41 |     void Render(VkCommandBuffer cmd, float rotation, float aspect, const float camPos[3], const float camRot[3], const float* viewProj = nullptr);
42 |     void Cleanup();
43 |     
44 |     void SetCubeColor(int colorIndex);
45 |     void UpdateEntityPosition(int entityIndex, float x, float y);
46 |     
47 | private:
48 |     bool CreatePipeline();
49 |     
50 |     VulkanDevice* m_device;
51 |     SecretEngine::ICore* m_core;
52 |     VkRenderPass m_renderPass;
53 |     
54 |     VkPipeline m_pipeline;
55 |     VkPipelineLayout m_pipelineLayout;
56 |     
57 |     struct MeshData {
58 |         VkBuffer vertexBuffer;
59 |         VkDeviceMemory vertexMemory;
60 |         VkBuffer indexBuffer;
61 |         VkDeviceMemory indexMemory;
62 |         uint32_t vertexCount;
63 |         uint32_t indexCount;
64 |     };
65 |     std::map<std::string, MeshData> m_meshes;
66 |     
67 |     // Instancing
68 |     VkBuffer m_instanceBuffer;
69 |     VkDeviceMemory m_instanceMemory;
70 |     static constexpr int MAX_INSTANCES = 100;
71 |     
72 |     int m_currentColorIndex;
73 |     
74 |     // Multiple entities - removed local struct to use SecretEngine::Entity
75 | };
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/RendererPlugin.cpp
```
1 | #include "RendererPlugin.h"
2 | #include "VulkanDevice.h"
3 | #include <SecretEngine/ILogger.h>
4 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
5 | #include <SecretEngine/IRenderer.h>
6 | #include <SecretEngine/IWorld.h>
7 | #include <SecretEngine/IInputSystem.h>
8 | #include <SecretEngine/Components.h>
9 | #include <cstring>
10 | #include <random>
11 | #include <SecretEngine/Fast/FastData.h>
12 | #include "../../CameraPlugin/src/CameraPlugin.h"
13 | #include <vector>
14 | #include <fstream>
15 | #include <nlohmann/json.hpp>
16 | 
17 | using json = nlohmann::json;
18 | #include <SecretEngine/IAssetProvider.h>
19 | #include "VulkanHelpers.h"
20 | 
21 | using SecretEngine::Vulkan::Helpers;
22 | 
23 | void RendererPlugin::OnLoad(SecretEngine::ICore* core) {
24 |     m_core = core;
25 |     m_core->RegisterCapability("rendering", this);
26 |     m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Plugin Loaded.");
27 | }
28 | 
29 | void RendererPlugin::OnActivate() {
30 |     // PIVOT: Do NOT create windows or devices here on Android.
31 |     // We wait for the Core to pass us a native window handle later.
32 |     m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Renderer Waiting for Native Window...");
33 | }
34 | 
35 | // NEW FUNCTION: This is what we call from AndroidMain when the window is ready
36 | void RendererPlugin::InitializeHardware(void* nativeWindow) {
37 |     if (!m_core || !m_core->GetLogger()) {
38 |         // Emergency fallback if logger isn't available
39 |         return;
40 |     }
41 |     
42 |     auto logger = m_core->GetLogger();
43 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "InitializeHardware() called - Starting Vulkan setup");
44 |     
45 |     // Step 1: Create Vulkan Device
46 |     m_device = new VulkanDevice(m_core);
47 |     if (!m_device) {
48 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: Failed to allocate VulkanDevice");
49 |         return;
50 |     }
51 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ VulkanDevice allocated");
52 |     
53 |     // Step 2: Initialize Vulkan Device
54 |     if (!m_device->Initialize()) {
55 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: VulkanDevice::Initialize() failed");
56 |         delete m_device;
57 |         m_device = nullptr;
58 |         return;
59 |     }
60 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ VulkanDevice initialized");
61 |     
62 |     // Step 3: Create Surface
63 |     if (!nativeWindow) {
64 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: nativeWindow is nullptr");
65 |         delete m_device;
66 |         m_device = nullptr;
67 |         return;
68 |     }
69 |     
70 |     m_device->CreateSurface(nativeWindow);
71 |     VkSurfaceKHR surf = m_device->GetSurface();
72 |     if (surf == VK_NULL_HANDLE) {
73 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: Failed to create Vulkan Surface");
74 |         delete m_device;
75 |         m_device = nullptr;
76 |         return;
77 |     }
78 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Vulkan Surface created successfully");
79 |     
80 |     // Step 4: Get Surface Capabilities
81 |     VkSurfaceCapabilitiesKHR caps;
82 |     VkResult result = vkGetPhysicalDeviceSurfaceCapabilitiesKHR(
83 |         m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), surf, &caps);
84 |     
85 |     if (result != VK_SUCCESS) {
86 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: Failed to get surface capabilities");
87 |         delete m_device;
88 |         m_device = nullptr;
89 |         return;
90 |     }
91 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Surface capabilities retrieved");
92 |     
93 |     // Step 5: Create Swapchain
94 |     m_swapchain = new Swapchain(m_device, m_core);
95 |     if (!m_swapchain) {
96 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: Failed to allocate Swapchain");
97 |         delete m_device;
98 |         m_device = nullptr;
99 |         return;
100 |     }
101 |     
102 |     if (!m_swapchain->Create(surf, caps.currentExtent.width, caps.currentExtent.height)) {
103 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: Swapchain::Create() failed");
104 |         delete m_swapchain;
105 |         delete m_device;
106 |         m_swapchain = nullptr;
107 |         m_device = nullptr;
108 |         return;
109 |     }
110 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Swapchain created successfully");
111 |     
112 |     // Step 6: Create Render Pass
113 |     if (!CreateRenderPass()) {
114 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: CreateRenderPass() failed");
115 |         delete m_swapchain;
116 |         delete m_device;
117 |         m_swapchain = nullptr;
118 |         m_device = nullptr;
119 |         return;
120 |     }
121 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Render Pass created");
122 |     
123 |     // Step 7: Create Framebuffers
124 |     if (!CreateFramebuffers()) {
125 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: CreateFramebuffers() failed");
126 |         delete m_swapchain;
127 |         delete m_device;
128 |         m_swapchain = nullptr;
129 |         m_device = nullptr;
130 |         return;
131 |     }
132 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Framebuffers created");
133 |     
134 |     // Step 8: Create Sync Objects
135 |     if (!CreateSyncObjects()) {
136 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: CreateSyncObjects() failed");
137 |         delete m_swapchain;
138 |         delete m_device;
139 |         m_swapchain = nullptr;
140 |         m_device = nullptr;
141 |         return;
142 |     }
143 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Sync objects created");
144 |     
145 |     // Step 9: Initialize Command Buffers
146 |     if (!InitCommands()) {
147 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "CRITICAL: InitCommands() failed");
148 |         delete m_swapchain;
149 |         delete m_device;
150 |         m_swapchain = nullptr;
151 |         m_device = nullptr;
152 |         return;
153 |     }
154 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Command buffers initialized");
155 |     
156 |     // Step 10: Create 2D Text Rendering Pipeline
157 |     if (!Create2DPipeline()) {
158 |         logger->LogWarning("VulkanRenderer", "2D pipeline creation failed (non-critical)");
159 |     } else if (!Create2DVertexBuffer()) {
160 |         logger->LogWarning("VulkanRenderer", "2D vertex buffer creation failed (non-critical)");
161 |     } else {
162 |         logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ 2D text rendering pipeline enabled");
