163 |     }
164 | 
165 |     // Step 11: Create 3D Rendering Pipeline
166 |     m_pipeline3D = new Pipeline3D();
167 |     if (!m_pipeline3D->Initialize(m_device, m_renderPass, m_core)) {
168 |         logger->LogWarning("VulkanRenderer", "3D pipeline creation failed (non-critical)");
169 |         delete m_pipeline3D;
170 |         m_pipeline3D = nullptr;
171 |     }
172 |     
173 |     // Step 12: Initialize Texture System (bindless textures for Mega Geometry)
174 |     m_textureManager = new SecretEngine::Textures::TextureManager();
175 |     if (!m_textureManager->Initialize(m_device, m_core)) {
176 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to initialize TextureManager");
177 |         delete m_textureManager;
178 |         m_textureManager = nullptr;
179 |     } else {
180 |         logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ TextureManager initialized");
181 |     }
182 | 
183 |     // Step 13: Initialize Mega Geometry System
184 |     m_megaGeometry = new SecretEngine::MegaGeometry::MegaGeometryRenderer();
185 |     if (!m_megaGeometry->Initialize(m_device, m_renderPass, m_core, m_textureManager)) {
186 |         logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to create mega geometry renderer");
187 |         delete m_megaGeometry;
188 |         m_megaGeometry = nullptr;
189 |     } else {
190 |         logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Mega Geometry System initialized");
191 |         
192 |         // Load the character mesh into slot 0 (CRITICAL: Must be done before AddInstance)
193 |         if (!m_megaGeometry->LoadMesh("meshes/Character.meshbin", 0)) {
194 |             logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to load Character.meshbin into MegaGeometry slot 0");
195 |         } else {
196 |             logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Character mesh loaded into MegaGeometry slot 0");
197 |         }
198 |         
199 |         // Instances are already handled by logic/scattering
200 |             
201 |             // Spawn 4000 Instances in a Spherical Distribution around the player
202 |             // Target: 6M triangles (4000 instances × ~1500 tris/instance)
203 |             std::mt19937 rng(1337); 
204 |             std::uniform_real_distribution<float> distRadius(300.0f, 2000.0f);
205 |             std::uniform_real_distribution<float> distPhi(0.0f, 3.14159f);
206 |             std::uniform_real_distribution<float> distTheta(0.0f, 6.28318f);
207 |             std::uniform_real_distribution<float> distColor(0.2f, 1.0f);
208 | 
209 |             // Preload default character texture once (cached in TextureManager)
210 |             uint32_t defaultCharacterTextureID = UINT32_MAX;
211 |             if (m_textureManager) {
212 |                 defaultCharacterTextureID = m_textureManager->LoadTexture("textures/diffuse.jpeg");
213 |                 // Load normal map as second texture
214 |                 m_textureManager->LoadTexture("textures/NormalMap.png");
215 |             }
216 |             
217 |             m_instancePositions.clear();
218 |             m_instanceRotationSpeeds.clear();
219 |             m_instanceColors.clear();
220 |             
221 |             uint32_t instancesAdded = 0;
222 |             for(int i = 0; i < 4000; i++) {
223 |                  float r = distRadius(rng);
224 |                  float phi = distPhi(rng);
225 |                  float theta = distTheta(rng);
226 |                  
227 |                  float posX = r * sinf(phi) * cosf(theta);
228 |                  float posY = r * sinf(phi) * sinf(theta);
229 |                  float posZ = r * cosf(phi);
230 |                  
231 |                  uint32_t instanceID = m_megaGeometry->AddInstance(0, posX, posY, posZ, defaultCharacterTextureID);
232 |                  if (instanceID < 65536) { // Valid instance ID (not MAX_INSTANCES error)
233 |                      instancesAdded++;
234 |                      m_instancePositions.push_back({posX, posY, posZ});
235 |                      
236 |                      // Random speeds: 0.1 to 2.0 rad/sec
237 |                      std::uniform_real_distribution<float> distSpeed(0.1f, 2.0f);
238 |                      m_instanceRotationSpeeds.push_back(distSpeed(rng));
239 |                      
240 |                      // Set color to WHITE (1,1,1) so texture shows properly without tinting
241 |                      m_instanceColors.push_back({1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f});
242 |                      m_megaGeometry->UpdateInstanceColor(instanceID, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
243 |                  }
244 |             }
245 |             char msg[256];
246 |             snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "✓ Spawned %u Instances in Sphere (R=2000) - Target: 6M triangles", instancesAdded);
247 |             logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", msg);
248 |             
249 |             // Verify instance count
250 |             auto stats = m_megaGeometry->GetStats();
251 |             snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "✓ Instance count verification: totalInstances=%u, totalTriangles=%u", 
252 |                 stats.totalInstances, stats.totalTriangles);
253 |             logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", msg);
254 |         logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ Mega Geometry Renderer initialized");
255 |     }
256 |     if (m_pipeline3D) {
257 |         logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "✓ 3D rendering pipeline enabled");
258 |         
259 |         // --- Populate World with Entities (Day 3.9) ---
260 |         if (m_core->GetWorld()) {
261 |             auto world = m_core->GetWorld();
262 |             auto logger = m_core->GetLogger();
263 | 
264 |             std::string sceneJson = LoadAssetAsString("scene.json");
265 |             if (!sceneJson.empty()) {
266 |                 try {
267 |                     auto data = json::parse(sceneJson);
268 |                     if (data.contains("entities") && data["entities"].is_array()) {
269 |                         for (const auto& entityData : data["entities"]) {
270 |                             auto e = world->CreateEntity();
271 |                             
272 |                             // Transform
273 |                             auto transform = new SecretEngine::TransformComponent();
274 |                             // Support both "transform" and "transformed" as the user mentioned
275 |                             std::string transformKey = entityData.contains("transformed") ? "transformed" : "transform";
276 |                             
277 |                             if (entityData.contains(transformKey)) {
278 |                                 auto t = entityData[transformKey];
279 |                                 if (t.contains("position") && t["position"].is_array()) {
280 |                                     transform->position[0] = t["position"].size() > 0 ? t["position"][0].get<float>() : 0.0f;
281 |                                     transform->position[1] = t["position"].size() > 1 ? t["position"][1].get<float>() : 0.0f;
282 |                                     transform->position[2] = t["position"].size() > 2 ? t["position"][2].get<float>() : 0.0f;
283 |                                 }
284 |                                 if (t.contains("rotation") && t["rotation"].is_array()) {
285 |                                     const float DEG_TO_RAD = 3.14159265f / 180.0f;
286 |                                     transform->rotation[0] = t["rotation"].size() > 0 ? t["rotation"][0].get<float>() * DEG_TO_RAD : 0.0f;
287 |                                     transform->rotation[1] = t["rotation"].size() > 1 ? t["rotation"][1].get<float>() * DEG_TO_RAD : 0.0f;
288 |                                     transform->rotation[2] = t["rotation"].size() > 2 ? t["rotation"][2].get<float>() * DEG_TO_RAD : 0.0f;
289 |                                 }
290 |                                 if (t.contains("scale") && t["scale"].is_array()) {
291 |                                     transform->scale[0] = t["scale"].size() > 0 ? t["scale"][0].get<float>() : 1.0f;
292 |                                     transform->scale[1] = t["scale"].size() > 1 ? t["scale"][1].get<float>() : 1.0f;
293 |                                     transform->scale[2] = t["scale"].size() > 2 ? t["scale"][2].get<float>() : 1.0f;
294 |                                 }
295 |                             }
296 |                             world->AddComponent(e, SecretEngine::TransformComponent::TypeID, transform);
297 |                             
298 |                             // Mesh
299 |                             if (entityData.contains("mesh")) {
300 |                                 auto m = entityData["mesh"];
301 |                                 auto mesh = new SecretEngine::MeshComponent();
302 |                                 if (m.contains("path")) {
303 |                                     std::string meshPath = m["path"].get<std::string>();
304 |                                     strncpy(mesh->meshPath, meshPath.c_str(), 255);
305 |                                     mesh->meshPath[255] = '\0';
306 | 
307 |                                     // Parse color first (before instancing)
308 |                                     if (m.contains("color") && m["color"].is_array()) {
309 |                                         mesh->color[0] = m["color"].size() > 0 ? m["color"][0].get<float>() : 1.0f;
310 |                                         mesh->color[1] = m["color"].size() > 1 ? m["color"][1].get<float>() : 1.0f;
311 |                                         mesh->color[2] = m["color"].size() > 2 ? m["color"][2].get<float>() : 1.0f;
312 |                                         mesh->color[3] = m["color"].size() > 3 ? m["color"][3].get<float>() : 1.0f;
313 |                                     }
314 | 
315 |                                     // Optional per-entity texture paths from scene.json
316 |                                     if (m.contains("texture")) {
317 |                                         std::string tex = m["texture"].get<std::string>();
318 |                                         strncpy(mesh->texturePath, tex.c_str(), 255);
319 |                                         mesh->texturePath[255] = '\0';
320 |                                     }
321 |                                     if (m.contains("normalMap")) {
322 |                                         std::string nrm = m["normalMap"].get<std::string>();
323 |                                         strncpy(mesh->normalMapPath, nrm.c_str(), 255);
324 |                                         mesh->normalMapPath[255] = '\0';
325 |                                     }
326 | 
327 |                                     const bool isCharacterMesh = meshPath.find("Character.meshbin") != std::string::npos;
328 | 
329 |                                     // Provide sensible defaults for character meshes if scene doesn't specify textures
330 |                                     if (isCharacterMesh) {
331 |                                         if (mesh->texturePath[0] == '\0') {
332 |                                             const char* defaultTex = "textures/diffuse.jpeg";
333 |                                             strncpy(mesh->texturePath, defaultTex, 255);
334 |                                             mesh->texturePath[255] = '\0';
335 |                                         }
336 |                                         if (mesh->normalMapPath[0] == '\0') {
337 |                                             const char* defaultNrm = "textures/NormalMap.png";
338 |                                             strncpy(mesh->normalMapPath, defaultNrm, 255);
339 |                                             mesh->normalMapPath[255] = '\0';
340 |                                         }
341 |                                     }
342 |                                     
343 |                                     // Instancing: Add this entity to MegaGeometry system WITH COLOR + TEXTURE
344 |                                     if (isCharacterMesh && m_megaGeometry) {
345 |                                         uint32_t textureID = UINT32_MAX;
346 |                                         if (m_textureManager && mesh->texturePath[0] != '\0') {
347 |                                             textureID = m_textureManager->LoadTexture(mesh->texturePath);
348 |                                         }
349 | 
350 |                                         uint32_t instanceID = m_megaGeometry->AddInstance(
351 |                                             0,
352 |                                             transform->position[0],
353 |                                             transform->position[1],
354 |                                             transform->position[2],
355 |                                             textureID
356 |                                         );
357 |                                         // Apply color to the instance
358 |                                         m_megaGeometry->UpdateInstanceColor(instanceID, mesh->color[0], mesh->color[1], mesh->color[2], mesh->color[3]);
359 |                                     }
360 |                                     
361 |                                     if (m_pipeline3D) {
362 |                                         m_pipeline3D->LoadMesh(mesh->meshPath);
363 |                                     }
364 |                                 }
365 |                                 world->AddComponent(e, SecretEngine::MeshComponent::TypeID, mesh);
366 |                             }
367 | 
368 |                             if (entityData.contains("isPlayerStart") && entityData["isPlayerStart"].get<bool>()) {
369 |                                 m_playerStartEntity = e;
370 |                             }
371 |                         }
372 |                         logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", ("✓ Scene loaded successfully: " + std::to_string(data["entities"].size()) + " entities").c_str());
373 |                     }
374 |                 } catch (const std::exception& e) {
375 |                     logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", (std::string("Failed to parse scene.json: ") + e.what()).c_str());
376 |                 }
377 |             } else {
378 |                 logger->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "scene.json could not be loaded (empty or missing)!");
379 |             }
380 |         }
381 |     }
382 |     
383 |     // SUCCESS!
384 |     m_core->SetRendererReady(true);
385 |     
386 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "========================================");
387 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Vulkan Renderer FULLY INITIALIZED");
388 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Ready to render 3D + 2D!");
389 |     logger->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "========================================");
390 | }
391 | 
392 | void RendererPlugin::OnUpdate(float dt) {
393 |     m_totalTime += dt;
394 |     if (m_megaGeometry) {
395 |         // ULTRA-FAST BATCH UPDATE - Minimize cache misses
396 |         m_megaGeometry->BeginBatchUpdate();
397 |         
398 |         uint32_t count = (uint32_t)m_instancePositions.size();
399 |         
400 |         // Pre-compute time factors once
401 |         float timeX = m_totalTime;
402 |         float timeY = m_totalTime * 0.7f;
403 |         float timeZ = m_totalTime * 0.3f;
404 |         
405 |         for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
406 |             float speed = m_instanceRotationSpeeds[i];
407 |             
408 |             // Y-rotation only for 10x faster matrix construction
409 |             float rotY = timeY * speed;
410 |             
411 |             m_megaGeometry->UpdateInstanceTransform(
412 |                 i, 
413 |                 m_instancePositions[i].x, 
414 |                 m_instancePositions[i].y, 
415 |                 m_instancePositions[i].z, 
416 |                 rotY, 0.0f, 0.0f  // Only Y rotation - triggers fast path
417 |             );
418 |         }
419 |         
420 |         m_megaGeometry->EndBatchUpdate();
421 |     }
422 | }
423 | void RendererPlugin::OnDeactivate() {
424 |     // Optional: Log deactivation or handle backgrounding
425 |     if(m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Deactivating renderer...");
426 | }
427 | 
428 | void RendererPlugin::OnUnload() {
429 |     if(m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Unloading plugin...");
430 |     
431 |     if (m_device) {
432 |         vkDeviceWaitIdle(m_device->GetDevice());
433 |         
434 |         CleanupSwapchain();
435 |         
436 |         if (m_pipeline3D) {
437 |             m_pipeline3D->Cleanup();
438 |             delete m_pipeline3D;
439 |             m_pipeline3D = nullptr;
440 |         }
441 |         
442 |         if (m_megaGeometry) {
443 |             delete m_megaGeometry;
444 |             m_megaGeometry = nullptr;
445 |         }
446 | 
447 |         if (m_textureManager) {
448 |             m_textureManager->Shutdown();
449 |             delete m_textureManager;
450 |             m_textureManager = nullptr;
451 |         }
452 | 
453 |         if (m_inFlightFence) vkDestroyFence(m_device->GetDevice(), m_inFlightFence, nullptr);
454 |         if (m_imageAvailableSemaphore) vkDestroySemaphore(m_device->GetDevice(), m_imageAvailableSemaphore, nullptr);
455 |         if (m_renderFinishedSemaphore) vkDestroySemaphore(m_device->GetDevice(), m_renderFinishedSemaphore, nullptr);
456 |         if (m_commandPool) vkDestroyCommandPool(m_device->GetDevice(), m_commandPool, nullptr);
457 |         
458 |         if (m_renderPass != VK_NULL_HANDLE) vkDestroyRenderPass(m_device->GetDevice(), m_renderPass, nullptr);
459 |         if (m_2dPipeline != VK_NULL_HANDLE) vkDestroyPipeline(m_device->GetDevice(), m_2dPipeline, nullptr);
460 |         if (m_2dPipelineLayout != VK_NULL_HANDLE) vkDestroyPipelineLayout(m_device->GetDevice(), m_2dPipelineLayout, nullptr);
461 | 
462 |         if (m_2dVertexBuffer != VK_NULL_HANDLE) {
463 |             vkDestroyBuffer(m_device->GetDevice(), m_2dVertexBuffer, nullptr);
464 |             vkFreeMemory(m_device->GetDevice(), m_2dVertexMemory, nullptr);
465 |         }
466 | 
467 |         m_device->Shutdown();
468 |         delete m_device;
469 |         m_device = nullptr;
470 |     }
471 | }
472 | 
473 | void RendererPlugin::GetCameraMatrix(float* outViewProj) {
474 |     // Get camera plugin
475 |     auto* camera = m_core->GetCapability("camera");
476 |     if (!camera) {
477 |         // Fallback: identity matrix
478 |         memset(outViewProj, 0, 16*sizeof(float));
479 |         outViewProj[0] = outViewProj[5] = outViewProj[10] = outViewProj[15] = 1.0f;
480 |         return;
481 |     }
482 |     
483 |     // Get view-projection from camera (needs interface method)
484 |     // For now, use direct access via void* interface
485 |     auto* cameraPlugin = static_cast<SecretEngine::CameraPlugin*>(camera);
486 |     const float* vp = cameraPlugin->GetViewProjection();
487 |     memcpy(outViewProj, vp, 16*sizeof(float));
488 | }
489 | 
490 | void RendererPlugin::Submit() {
491 |     // Primary consumer of the Command Stream
492 |     ProcessFastStream();
493 | }
494 | 
495 | void RendererPlugin::ProcessFastStream() {
496 |     SecretEngine::Fast::UltraPacket packet;
497 |     // Drain batch for performance
498 |     while (m_commandStream.Pop(packet)) {
499 |         // Route to Mega Geometry first
500 |         if (m_megaGeometry) {
501 |              m_megaGeometry->ProcessPacket(packet);
502 |         }
503 | 
504 |         switch (packet.GetType()) {
505 |             case SecretEngine::Fast::PacketType::RenderTransform:
506 |                 m_rotation = static_cast<float>(packet.dataB) / 32767.0f;
507 |                 break;
508 |             case SecretEngine::Fast::PacketType::RenderCommand:
509 |                 if (packet.GetMetadata() == 1) { // Set Color
510 |                     SetCubeColor(packet.dataA);
511 |                 }
512 |                 break;
513 |             default:
514 |                 break;
515 |         }
516 |     }
517 | }
518 | 
519 | void RendererPlugin::Present() {
520 |     // Defensive checks - if any component is missing, skip rendering
521 |     if (!m_device || !m_swapchain || !m_swapchain->GetSwapchain()) {
522 |         return;
523 |     }
524 |     
525 |     if (!m_commandBuffer || m_framebuffers.empty()) {
526 |         // Command buffers or framebuffers not ready
527 |         return;
528 |     }
529 |     
530 |     // Log first present call
531 |     static bool firstPresent = true;
532 |     if (firstPresent && m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
533 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Present() called - starting to render frames");
534 |         firstPresent = false;
535 |     }
536 | 
537 |     // Acquire image first, then wait on fence (reduces latency)
538 |     uint32_t imageIndex;
539 |     VkResult result = vkAcquireNextImageKHR(m_device->GetDevice(), m_swapchain->GetSwapchain(), UINT64_MAX, m_imageAvailableSemaphore, VK_NULL_HANDLE, &imageIndex);
540 |     
541 |     vkWaitForFences(m_device->GetDevice(), 1, &m_inFlightFence, VK_TRUE, UINT64_MAX);
542 | 
543 |     if (result == VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR) {
544 |         RecreateSwapchain();
545 |         return;
546 |     } else if (result != VK_SUCCESS && result != VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR) {
547 |         if (m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
548 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to acquire swapchain image!");
549 |         }
550 |         return;
551 |     }
552 | 
553 |     // Safety check for framebuffer index
554 |     if (imageIndex >= m_framebuffers.size()) {
555 |         if (m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
556 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Image index out of range of framebuffers!");
557 |         }
558 |         return;
559 |     }
560 | 
561 |     // Only reset fence if we are actually going to submit work
562 |     vkResetFences(m_device->GetDevice(), 1, &m_inFlightFence);
563 | 
564 |     // Update global time-based rotation (used by shaders/logic)
565 |     m_rotation += 0.016f;
566 |     
567 |     // Begin recording with ONE_TIME_SUBMIT flag for better performance
568 |     VkCommandBufferBeginInfo beginInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_BUFFER_BEGIN_INFO };
569 |     beginInfo.flags = VK_COMMAND_BUFFER_USAGE_ONE_TIME_SUBMIT_BIT;
570 |     vkBeginCommandBuffer(m_commandBuffer, &beginInfo);
571 |     VkRenderPassBeginInfo renderPassInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_RENDER_PASS_BEGIN_INFO };
572 |     renderPassInfo.renderPass = m_renderPass;
573 |     renderPassInfo.framebuffer = m_framebuffers[imageIndex];
574 |     renderPassInfo.renderArea.offset = {0, 0};
575 |     renderPassInfo.renderArea.extent = m_swapchain->GetExtent();
576 |     
577 |     
578 |     // Neutral dark gray background for better visibility
579 |     VkClearValue clearColor = {{{0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f, 1.0f}}};
580 |     
581 |     // Log once to confirm
582 |     static bool loggedColor = false;
583 |     if (!loggedColor && m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
584 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Rendering 3D scene on DARK GREY background");
585 |         loggedColor = true;
586 |     }
587 |     
588 |     renderPassInfo.clearValueCount = 1;
589 |     renderPassInfo.pClearValues = &clearColor;
590 |     // GPU-Driven Virtual Geometry Prep (Culling) - Done OUTSIDE RenderPass
591 |     if (m_megaGeometry) {
592 |         m_megaGeometry->PreRender(m_commandBuffer);
593 |     }
594 | 
595 |     vkCmdBeginRenderPass(m_commandBuffer, &renderPassInfo, VK_SUBPASS_CONTENTS_INLINE);
596 |     
597 |     // Set Dynamic Viewport and Scissor
598 |     VkViewport viewport = {};
599 |     viewport.x = 0.0f;
600 |     viewport.y = 0.0f;
601 |     viewport.width = (float)m_swapchain->GetExtent().width;
602 |     viewport.height = (float)m_swapchain->GetExtent().height;
603 |     viewport.minDepth = 0.0f;
604 |     viewport.maxDepth = 1.0f;
605 |     vkCmdSetViewport(m_commandBuffer, 0, 1, &viewport);
606 | 
607 |     VkRect2D scissor = {};
608 |     scissor.offset = {0, 0};
609 |     scissor.extent = m_swapchain->GetExtent();
610 |     vkCmdSetScissor(m_commandBuffer, 0, 1, &scissor);
611 |     
612 |     
613 |     
614 |     // Get camera matrix from CameraPlugin and send to MegaGeometry
615 |     float viewProj[16];
616 |     GetCameraMatrix(viewProj);
617 |     if (m_megaGeometry) {
618 |         m_megaGeometry->SetViewProjection(viewProj);
619 |     }
620 |     
621 |     //    // 3D Rendering
622 |     float aspect = 1.0f;
623 |     if (m_swapchain) {
624 |         VkExtent2D ext = m_swapchain->GetExtent();
625 |         if (ext.height > 0) aspect = (float)ext.width / (float)ext.height;
626 |     }
627 | 
628 |     if (m_pipeline3D) {
629 |         // Use unified view-projection from CameraPlugin
630 |         float vp[16];
631 |         GetCameraMatrix(vp);
632 |         
633 |         // camPos/camRot are still needed by Pipeline3D if it does some internal logic, 
634 |         // but we'll modify Pipeline3D to prioritize vp matrix.
635 |         float camPos[3] = {0, 0, 0};
636 |         float camRot[3] = {0, 0, 0};
637 |         auto* camera = m_core->GetCapability("camera");
638 |         if (camera) {
639 |             auto* cameraPlugin = static_cast<SecretEngine::CameraPlugin*>(camera);
640 |             const float* p = cameraPlugin->GetPosition();
641 |             camPos[0] = p[0]; camPos[1] = p[1]; camPos[2] = p[2];
642 |             camRot[0] = cameraPlugin->GetPitch();
643 |             camRot[1] = cameraPlugin->GetYaw();
644 |         }
645 |         
646 |         m_pipeline3D->Render(m_commandBuffer, m_rotation, aspect, camPos, camRot, vp);
647 |     }
648 |     
649 |     // Draw Mega Geometry (GPU Driven)
650 |     if (m_megaGeometry) {
651 |         m_megaGeometry->Render(m_commandBuffer);
652 |     }
653 | 
654 |     // Draw 2D UI overlay on top
655 |     DrawWelcomeText(m_commandBuffer);
656 |     
657 |     vkCmdEndRenderPass(m_commandBuffer);
658 |     vkEndCommandBuffer(m_commandBuffer);
659 | 
660 |     VkSubmitInfo submitInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_SUBMIT_INFO };
661 |     VkSemaphore waitSemaphores[] = { m_imageAvailableSemaphore };
662 |     VkPipelineStageFlags waitStages[] = { VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OUTPUT_BIT };
663 |     submitInfo.waitSemaphoreCount = 1;
664 |     submitInfo.pWaitSemaphores = waitSemaphores;
665 |     submitInfo.pWaitDstStageMask = waitStages;
666 |     submitInfo.commandBufferCount = 1;
667 |     submitInfo.pCommandBuffers = &m_commandBuffer;
668 |     
669 |     VkSemaphore signalSemaphores[] = { m_renderFinishedSemaphore };
670 |     submitInfo.signalSemaphoreCount = 1;
671 |     submitInfo.pSignalSemaphores = signalSemaphores;
672 | 
673 |     if (vkQueueSubmit(m_device->GetGraphicsQueue(), 1, &submitInfo, m_inFlightFence) != VK_SUCCESS) {
674 |         if (m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
675 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to submit draw command buffer!");
676 |         }
677 |     }
678 | 
679 |     VkPresentInfoKHR presentInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PRESENT_INFO_KHR };
680 |     presentInfo.waitSemaphoreCount = 1;
681 |     presentInfo.pWaitSemaphores = signalSemaphores;
682 |     VkSwapchainKHR swapchains[] = { m_swapchain->GetSwapchain() };
683 |     presentInfo.swapchainCount = 1;
684 |     presentInfo.pSwapchains = swapchains;
685 |     presentInfo.pImageIndices = &imageIndex;
686 | 
687 |     // Check present result too
688 |     result = vkQueuePresentKHR(m_device->GetGraphicsQueue(), &presentInfo);
689 |     if (result == VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR || result == VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR) {
690 |         RecreateSwapchain();
691 |     } else if (result != VK_SUCCESS) {
692 |         if (m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
693 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to present swapchain image!");
694 |         }
695 |     }
696 |     
697 |     // Log successful frame every 60 frames
698 |     static int frameCount = 0;
699 |     frameCount++;
700 |     if (frameCount % 60 == 0 && m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
701 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanRenderer", "Rendering frames successfully");
702 |     }
703 | }
704 | 
705 | void RendererPlugin::SetCubeColor(int colorIndex) {
706 |     if (m_pipeline3D) {
707 |         m_pipeline3D->SetCubeColor(colorIndex);
708 |     }
709 | }

711 | void RendererPlugin::SetDebugInfo(int slot, const char* text) {
712 |     if (text) {
713 |         m_debugStrings[slot] = text;
714 |     } else {
715 |         m_debugStrings.erase(slot);
716 |     }
717 | }
718 | 
719 | void RendererPlugin::GetStats(uint32_t& instances, uint32_t& triangles, uint32_t& drawCalls) {
720 |     instances = 0; triangles = 0; drawCalls = 1; // Base calls
721 |     
722 |     if (m_megaGeometry) {
723 |         auto s = m_megaGeometry->GetStats();
724 |         instances += s.totalInstances;
725 |         triangles += s.totalTriangles;
726 |         drawCalls += s.drawCalls;
727 |     }
728 | }
729 | 
730 | uint64_t RendererPlugin::GetVRAMUsage() {
731 |     return SecretEngine::Vulkan::Helpers::GetVRAMAllocated();
732 | }
733 | 
734 | bool RendererPlugin::CreateRenderPass() {
735 |     VkAttachmentDescription colorAttachment = {};
736 |     colorAttachment.format = m_swapchain->GetFormat();
737 |     colorAttachment.samples = VK_SAMPLE_COUNT_1_BIT;
738 |     colorAttachment.loadOp = VK_ATTACHMENT_LOAD_OP_CLEAR;
739 |     colorAttachment.storeOp = VK_ATTACHMENT_STORE_OP_STORE;
740 |     colorAttachment.stencilLoadOp = VK_ATTACHMENT_LOAD_OP_DONT_CARE;
741 |     colorAttachment.stencilStoreOp = VK_ATTACHMENT_STORE_OP_DONT_CARE;
742 |     colorAttachment.initialLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_UNDEFINED;
743 |     colorAttachment.finalLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_PRESENT_SRC_KHR;
744 | 
745 |     VkAttachmentReference colorAttachmentRef = {};
746 |     colorAttachmentRef.attachment = 0;
747 |     colorAttachmentRef.layout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL;
748 | 
749 |     VkSubpassDescription subpass = {};
750 |     subpass.pipelineBindPoint = VK_PIPELINE_BIND_POINT_GRAPHICS;
751 |     subpass.colorAttachmentCount = 1;
752 |     subpass.pColorAttachments = &colorAttachmentRef;
753 |     
754 |     // Add subpass dependency for proper synchronization
755 |     VkSubpassDependency dependency = {};
756 |     dependency.srcSubpass = VK_SUBPASS_EXTERNAL;
757 |     dependency.dstSubpass = 0;
758 |     dependency.srcStageMask = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OUTPUT_BIT;
759 |     dependency.srcAccessMask = 0;
760 |     dependency.dstStageMask = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OUTPUT_BIT;
761 |     dependency.dstAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT;
762 | 
763 |     VkRenderPassCreateInfo renderPassInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_RENDER_PASS_CREATE_INFO };
764 |     renderPassInfo.attachmentCount = 1;
765 |     renderPassInfo.pAttachments = &colorAttachment;
766 |     renderPassInfo.subpassCount = 1;
767 |     renderPassInfo.pSubpasses = &subpass;
768 |     renderPassInfo.dependencyCount = 1;
769 |     renderPassInfo.pDependencies = &dependency;
770 | 
771 |     if (vkCreateRenderPass(m_device->GetDevice(), &renderPassInfo, nullptr, &m_renderPass) != VK_SUCCESS) {
772 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to create RenderPass!");
773 |         return false;
774 |     }
775 |     return true;
776 | }
777 | 
778 | bool RendererPlugin::CreateFramebuffers() {
779 |     auto& imageViews = m_swapchain->GetImageViews();
780 |     m_framebuffers.resize(imageViews.size());
781 | 
782 |     for (size_t i = 0; i < imageViews.size(); i++) {
783 |         VkImageView attachments[] = { imageViews[i] };
784 |         VkFramebufferCreateInfo framebufferInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_FRAMEBUFFER_CREATE_INFO };
785 |         framebufferInfo.renderPass = m_renderPass;
786 |         framebufferInfo.attachmentCount = 1;
787 |         framebufferInfo.pAttachments = attachments;
788 |         framebufferInfo.width = m_swapchain->GetExtent().width;
789 |         framebufferInfo.height = m_swapchain->GetExtent().height;
790 |         framebufferInfo.layers = 1;
791 | 
792 |         if (vkCreateFramebuffer(m_device->GetDevice(), &framebufferInfo, nullptr, &m_framebuffers[i]) != VK_SUCCESS) {
793 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to create Framebuffer!");
794 |             return false;
795 |         }
796 |     }
797 |     return true;
798 | }
799 | 
800 | bool RendererPlugin::CreateSyncObjects() {
801 |     VkSemaphoreCreateInfo semaphoreInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_SEMAPHORE_CREATE_INFO };
802 |     VkFenceCreateInfo fenceInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_FENCE_CREATE_INFO };
803 |     fenceInfo.flags = VK_FENCE_CREATE_SIGNALED_BIT;
804 | 
805 |     if (vkCreateSemaphore(m_device->GetDevice(), &semaphoreInfo, nullptr, &m_imageAvailableSemaphore) != VK_SUCCESS ||
806 |         vkCreateSemaphore(m_device->GetDevice(), &semaphoreInfo, nullptr, &m_renderFinishedSemaphore) != VK_SUCCESS ||
807 |         vkCreateFence(m_device->GetDevice(), &fenceInfo, nullptr, &m_inFlightFence) != VK_SUCCESS) {
808 |         
809 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to create Sync Objects!");
810 |         return false;
811 |     }
812 |     return true;
813 | }
814 | 
815 | bool RendererPlugin::InitCommands() {
816 |     VkCommandPoolCreateInfo poolInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_POOL_CREATE_INFO };
817 |     poolInfo.queueFamilyIndex = 0; // Assume 0 for now as we did in VulkanDevice
818 |     poolInfo.flags = VK_COMMAND_POOL_CREATE_RESET_COMMAND_BUFFER_BIT;
819 | 
820 |     if (vkCreateCommandPool(m_device->GetDevice(), &poolInfo, nullptr, &m_commandPool) != VK_SUCCESS) {
821 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to create Command Pool!");
822 |         return false;
823 |     }
824 | 
825 |     VkCommandBufferAllocateInfo allocInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_BUFFER_ALLOCATE_INFO };
826 |     allocInfo.commandPool = m_commandPool;
827 |     allocInfo.level = VK_COMMAND_BUFFER_LEVEL_PRIMARY;
828 |     allocInfo.commandBufferCount = 1;
829 | 
830 |     if (vkAllocateCommandBuffers(m_device->GetDevice(), &allocInfo, &m_commandBuffer) != VK_SUCCESS) {
831 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanRenderer", "Failed to allocate Command Buffer!");
832 |         return false;
833 |     }
834 |     return true;
835 | }
