1 | #include <SecretEngine/IRenderer.h>
2 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
3 | #include <SecretEngine/Entity.h>
4 | #include <SecretEngine/Fast/FastData.h>
5 | #include "VulkanDevice.h"
6 | #include "Window.h"
7 | #include "Swapchain.h"
8 | #include "Pipeline3D.h"
9 | #include "MegaGeometryRenderer.h"
10 | #include "TextureManager.h"
11 | 
12 | // Forward declaration
13 | namespace SecretEngine { class CameraPlugin; }
14 | 
15 | class RendererPlugin : public SecretEngine::IRenderer {
16 | public:
17 |     const char* GetName() const override { return "VulkanRenderer"; }
18 |     uint32_t GetVersion() const override { return 1; }
19 | 
20 |     void OnLoad(SecretEngine::ICore* core) override;
21 |     void OnActivate() override;
22 |     void OnDeactivate() override;
23 |     void OnUnload() override;
24 |     void OnUpdate(float dt) override;
25 |     
26 |     void* GetInterface(uint32_t id) override {
27 |         if (id == 1) return (SecretEngine::IRenderer*)this;
28 |         return nullptr;
29 |     }
30 | 
31 |     // IRenderer implementation
32 |     SecretEngine::Fast::UltraRingBuffer<1024>& GetCommandStream() override { return m_commandStream; }
33 |     
34 |     void Submit() override;
35 |     void Present() override;
36 |     void InitializeHardware(void* nativeWindow) override;
37 |     
38 |     void SetCubeColor(int colorIndex) override;
39 |     void SetDebugInfo(int slot, const char* text) override;
40 |     void GetStats(uint32_t& instances, uint32_t& triangles, uint32_t& drawCalls) override;
41 |     uint64_t GetVRAMUsage() override; // Returns VRAM usage in bytes
42 |     void DrawWelcomeText(VkCommandBuffer cmd);
43 | 
44 | private:
45 |     void ProcessFastStream(); // NEW: Primary consumer for 8-byte packets
46 |     void GetCameraMatrix(float* outViewProj); // Get camera from CameraPlugin
47 | 
48 |     bool CreateRenderPass();
49 |     bool CreateFramebuffers();
50 |     bool CreateSyncObjects();
51 |     bool InitCommands();
52 |     void CleanupSwapchain();
53 |     bool RecreateSwapchain();
54 |     
55 |     // Triangle debugging
56 |     bool CreateTrianglePipeline();
57 |     void DrawTriangle(VkCommandBuffer cmd);
58 |     
59 |     // 2D rendering
60 |     bool Create2DPipeline();
61 |     bool Create2DVertexBuffer();
62 | 
63 |     std::string LoadAssetAsString(const char* filename);
64 | 
65 |     SecretEngine::ICore* m_core = nullptr;
66 |     VulkanDevice* m_device = nullptr;
67 |     Window* m_window = nullptr;
68 |     Swapchain* m_swapchain = nullptr;
69 | 
70 |     VkRenderPass m_renderPass = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
71 |     std::vector<VkFramebuffer> m_framebuffers;
72 |     VkCommandPool m_commandPool = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
73 |     VkCommandBuffer m_commandBuffer = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
74 | 
75 |     VkSemaphore m_imageAvailableSemaphore = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
76 |     VkSemaphore m_renderFinishedSemaphore = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
77 |     VkFence m_inFlightFence = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
78 |     int m_currentFrame = 0;
79 |     
80 |     VkPipeline m_trianglePipeline = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
81 |     VkPipelineLayout m_trianglePipelineLayout = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
82 |     
83 |     VkPipeline m_2dPipeline = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
84 |     VkPipelineLayout m_2dPipelineLayout = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
85 |     VkBuffer m_2dVertexBuffer = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
86 |     VkDeviceMemory m_2dVertexMemory = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
87 |     uint32_t m_2dVertexCount = 0;
88 |     
89 |     Pipeline3D* m_pipeline3D = nullptr;
90 |     float m_rotation = 0.0f;
91 |     
92 |     SecretEngine::Entity m_playerStartEntity = {0, 0};
93 |     uint32_t m_skyVertexCount = 0;
94 | 
95 |     // Fast Data Protocol Stream (1024 commands buffer)
96 |     SecretEngine::Fast::UltraRingBuffer<1024> m_commandStream;
97 | 
98 |     // Mega Geometry System + Texture System
99 |     SecretEngine::MegaGeometry::MegaGeometryRenderer* m_megaGeometry = nullptr;
100 |     SecretEngine::Textures::TextureManager* m_textureManager = nullptr;
101 |     
102 |     // Stats
103 |     int m_fps = 0;
104 |     int m_frameCount = 0;
105 |     float m_lastTime = 0.0f;
106 |     
107 |     struct Float3 { float x, y, z; };
108 |     std::vector<Float3> m_instancePositions;
109 |     std::vector<float> m_instanceRotationSpeeds;
110 |     std::vector<Float3> m_instanceColors;
111 |     float m_totalTime = 0.0f;
112 |     std::map<int, std::string> m_debugStrings;
113 | };
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/Swapchain.cpp
```
1 | #include "Swapchain.h"
2 | #include <string>
3 | #include "VulkanDevice.h"
4 | #include <SecretEngine/ILogger.h>
5 | 
6 | Swapchain::Swapchain(VulkanDevice* device, SecretEngine::ICore* core) : m_device(device), m_core(core) {}
7 | Swapchain::~Swapchain() { Cleanup(); }
8 | 
9 | bool Swapchain::Create(VkSurfaceKHR surface, uint32_t width, uint32_t height) {
10 |     // 1. Query Surface Capabilities
11 |     VkSurfaceCapabilitiesKHR capabilities;
12 |     vkGetPhysicalDeviceSurfaceCapabilitiesKHR(m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), surface, &capabilities);
13 | 
14 |     VkExtent2D actualExtent = capabilities.currentExtent;
15 |     if (actualExtent.width == UINT32_MAX) {
16 |         actualExtent.width = width;
17 |         actualExtent.height = height;
18 |     }
19 |     m_extent = actualExtent;
20 |     
21 |     // 2. Query supported surface formats
22 |     uint32_t formatCount;
23 |     vkGetPhysicalDeviceSurfaceFormatsKHR(m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), surface, &formatCount, nullptr);
24 |     std::vector<VkSurfaceFormatKHR> surfaceFormats(formatCount);
25 |     vkGetPhysicalDeviceSurfaceFormatsKHR(m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), surface, &formatCount, surfaceFormats.data());
26 |     
27 |     // Select the best format (Prefer R8G8B8A8_UNORM on Android)
28 |     VkSurfaceFormatKHR selectedFormat = surfaceFormats[0]; 
29 |     for (const auto& format : surfaceFormats) {
30 |         if (format.format == VK_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_UNORM && format.colorSpace == VK_COLOR_SPACE_SRGB_NONLINEAR_KHR) {
31 |             selectedFormat = format;
32 |             break;
33 |         }
34 |     }
35 |     
36 |     m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("Swapchain", ("Selected surface format: " + std::to_string(selectedFormat.format)).c_str());
37 | 
38 |     VkSwapchainCreateInfoKHR createInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_SWAPCHAIN_CREATE_INFO_KHR };
39 |     createInfo.surface = surface;
40 |     createInfo.minImageCount = 3; 
41 |     if (createInfo.minImageCount < capabilities.minImageCount) createInfo.minImageCount = capabilities.minImageCount;
42 |     if (capabilities.maxImageCount > 0 && createInfo.minImageCount > capabilities.maxImageCount) createInfo.minImageCount = capabilities.maxImageCount;
43 | 
44 |     createInfo.imageFormat = selectedFormat.format;
45 |     createInfo.imageColorSpace = selectedFormat.colorSpace;
46 |     createInfo.imageExtent = m_extent;
47 |     createInfo.imageArrayLayers = 1;
48 |     createInfo.imageUsage = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT;
49 |     createInfo.preTransform = capabilities.currentTransform;
50 |     
51 |     // Prefer OPAQUE or INHERIT for Android
52 |     if (capabilities.supportedCompositeAlpha & VK_COMPOSITE_ALPHA_OPAQUE_BIT_KHR) {
53 |         createInfo.compositeAlpha = VK_COMPOSITE_ALPHA_OPAQUE_BIT_KHR;
54 |     } else if (capabilities.supportedCompositeAlpha & VK_COMPOSITE_ALPHA_INHERIT_BIT_KHR) {
55 |         createInfo.compositeAlpha = VK_COMPOSITE_ALPHA_INHERIT_BIT_KHR;
56 |     } else {
57 |         createInfo.compositeAlpha = VK_COMPOSITE_ALPHA_PRE_MULTIPLIED_BIT_KHR;
58 |     }
59 |     
60 |     createInfo.presentMode = VK_PRESENT_MODE_FIFO_KHR;
61 |     createInfo.clipped = VK_TRUE;
62 | 
63 |     if (vkCreateSwapchainKHR(m_device->GetDevice(), &createInfo, nullptr, &m_swapchain) != VK_SUCCESS) {
64 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("Swapchain", "Failed to create swapchain!");
65 |         return false;
66 |     }
67 | 
68 |     // 2. Retrieve Images
69 |     uint32_t imageCount;
70 |     vkGetSwapchainImagesKHR(m_device->GetDevice(), m_swapchain, &imageCount, nullptr);
71 |     m_images.resize(imageCount);
72 |     vkGetSwapchainImagesKHR(m_device->GetDevice(), m_swapchain, &imageCount, m_images.data());
73 | 
74 |     m_imageFormat = createInfo.imageFormat;
75 | 
76 |     CreateImageViews();
77 |     return true;
78 | }
79 | 
80 | void Swapchain::CreateImageViews() {
81 |     m_imageViews.resize(m_images.size());
82 |     for (size_t i = 0; i < m_images.size(); i++) {
83 |         VkImageViewCreateInfo createInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_IMAGE_VIEW_CREATE_INFO };
84 |         createInfo.image = m_images[i];
85 |         createInfo.viewType = VK_IMAGE_VIEW_TYPE_2D;
86 |         createInfo.format = m_imageFormat;
87 |         createInfo.components.r = VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY;
88 |         createInfo.components.g = VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY;
89 |         createInfo.components.b = VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY;
90 |         createInfo.components.a = VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY;
91 |         createInfo.subresourceRange.aspectMask = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_COLOR_BIT;
92 |         createInfo.subresourceRange.baseMipLevel = 0;
93 |         createInfo.subresourceRange.levelCount = 1;
94 |         createInfo.subresourceRange.baseArrayLayer = 0;
95 |         createInfo.subresourceRange.layerCount = 1;
96 | 
97 |         if (vkCreateImageView(m_device->GetDevice(), &createInfo, nullptr, &m_imageViews[i]) != VK_SUCCESS) {
98 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("Swapchain", "Failed to create image views!");
99 |         }
100 |     }
101 | }
102 | 
103 | void Swapchain::Cleanup() {
104 |     for (auto imageView : m_imageViews) {
105 |         vkDestroyImageView(m_device->GetDevice(), imageView, nullptr);
106 |     }
107 |     m_imageViews.clear();
108 |     
109 |     if (m_swapchain) vkDestroySwapchainKHR(m_device->GetDevice(), m_swapchain, nullptr);
110 |     m_swapchain = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
111 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/Swapchain.h
```
1 | #include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
2 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h> 
3 | #include <vector>
4 | 
5 | class VulkanDevice;
6 | 
7 | class Swapchain {
8 | public:
9 |     Swapchain(VulkanDevice* device, SecretEngine::ICore* core);
10 |     ~Swapchain();
11 | 
12 |     bool Create(VkSurfaceKHR surface, uint32_t width, uint32_t height);
13 |     void Cleanup();
14 | 
15 |     VkFormat GetFormat() const { return m_imageFormat; }
16 |     VkExtent2D GetExtent() const { return m_extent; }
17 |     VkSwapchainKHR GetSwapchain() const { return m_swapchain; }
18 |     const std::vector<VkImageView>& GetImageViews() const { return m_imageViews; }
19 | 
20 | private:
21 |     void CreateImageViews();
22 | 
23 |     VulkanDevice* m_device;
24 |     SecretEngine::ICore* m_core;
25 |     VkSwapchainKHR m_swapchain = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
26 |     VkFormat m_imageFormat;
27 |     VkExtent2D m_extent;
28 |     std::vector<VkImage> m_images;
29 |     std::vector<VkImageView> m_imageViews;
30 | };
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/TextureManager.cpp
```
1 | // ============================================================================
2 | // TEXTURE MANAGER IMPLEMENTATION
3 | // High-performance texture loading with ASTC compression
4 | // ============================================================================
5 | 
6 | #include "TextureManager.h"
7 | #include "VulkanDevice.h"
8 | #include "VulkanHelpers.h"
9 | #include <SecretEngine/ICore.h>
10 | #include <SecretEngine/ILogger.h>
11 | #include <SecretEngine/IAssetProvider.h>
12 | #include <cstring>
13 | #include <algorithm>
14 | 
15 | // STB Image for PNG/JPEG decoding
16 | #define STB_IMAGE_IMPLEMENTATION
17 | #include "stb_image.h"
18 | 
19 | namespace SecretEngine::Textures {
20 | 
21 | using SecretEngine::Vulkan::Helpers;
22 | 
23 | TextureManager::~TextureManager() {
24 |     Shutdown();
25 | }
26 | 
27 | bool TextureManager::Initialize(VulkanDevice* device, SecretEngine::ICore* core) {
28 |     m_device = device;
29 |     m_vkDevice = device->GetDevice();
30 |     m_core = core;
31 |     
32 |     // Create staging buffer for uploads
33 |     VkBufferCreateInfo bufferInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_BUFFER_CREATE_INFO};
34 |     bufferInfo.size = STAGING_SIZE;
35 |     bufferInfo.usage = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT;
36 |     bufferInfo.sharingMode = VK_SHARING_MODE_EXCLUSIVE;
37 |     
38 |     if (vkCreateBuffer(m_vkDevice, &bufferInfo, nullptr, &m_stagingBuffer) != VK_SUCCESS) {
39 |         return false;
40 |     }
41 |     
42 |     VkMemoryRequirements memReq;
43 |     vkGetBufferMemoryRequirements(m_vkDevice, m_stagingBuffer, &memReq);
44 |     
45 |     VkMemoryAllocateInfo allocInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_MEMORY_ALLOCATE_INFO};
46 |     allocInfo.allocationSize = memReq.size;
47 |     allocInfo.memoryTypeIndex = Helpers::FindMemoryType(m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), 
48 |         memReq.memoryTypeBits, VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT | VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT);
49 |     
50 |     if (vkAllocateMemory(m_vkDevice, &allocInfo, nullptr, &m_stagingMemory) != VK_SUCCESS) {
51 |         return false;
52 |     }
53 |     
54 |     vkBindBufferMemory(m_vkDevice, m_stagingBuffer, m_stagingMemory, 0);
55 |     vkMapMemory(m_vkDevice, m_stagingMemory, 0, STAGING_SIZE, 0, &m_stagingMapped);
56 |     
57 |     // Create transfer command pool
58 |     VkCommandPoolCreateInfo poolInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_POOL_CREATE_INFO};
59 |     poolInfo.queueFamilyIndex = 0;  // TODO: Use proper queue family
60 |     poolInfo.flags = VK_COMMAND_POOL_CREATE_TRANSIENT_BIT;
61 |     vkCreateCommandPool(m_vkDevice, &poolInfo, nullptr, &m_transferPool);
62 |     
63 |     // Create bindless descriptor set
64 |     if (!CreateDescriptorSet()) {
65 |         return false;
66 |     }
67 |     
68 |     if (m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
69 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("TextureManager", "✓ Texture system initialized with ASTC support");
70 |     }
71 |     return true;
72 | }
73 | 
74 | void TextureManager::Shutdown() {
75 |     // Cleanup textures
76 |     for (auto& tex : m_textures) {
77 |         if (tex.view) vkDestroyImageView(m_vkDevice, tex.view, nullptr);
78 |         if (tex.sampler) vkDestroySampler(m_vkDevice, tex.sampler, nullptr);
79 |         if (tex.image) vkDestroyImage(m_vkDevice, tex.image, nullptr);
80 |         if (tex.memory) vkFreeMemory(m_vkDevice, tex.memory, nullptr);
81 |     }
82 |     
83 |     if (m_stagingMapped) vkUnmapMemory(m_vkDevice, m_stagingMemory);
84 |     if (m_stagingBuffer) vkDestroyBuffer(m_vkDevice, m_stagingBuffer, nullptr);
85 |     if (m_stagingMemory) vkFreeMemory(m_vkDevice, m_stagingMemory, nullptr);
86 |     if (m_transferPool) vkDestroyCommandPool(m_vkDevice, m_transferPool, nullptr);
87 |     if (m_descriptorPool) vkDestroyDescriptorPool(m_vkDevice, m_descriptorPool, nullptr);
88 |     if (m_descriptorSetLayout) vkDestroyDescriptorSetLayout(m_vkDevice, m_descriptorSetLayout, nullptr);
89 | }
90 | 
91 | VkFormat TextureManager::ASTCFormatToVkFormat(ASTCFormat format) const {
92 |     switch (format) {
93 |         case ASTCFormat::ASTC_4x4_UNORM: return VK_FORMAT_ASTC_4x4_UNORM_BLOCK;
94 |         case ASTCFormat::ASTC_5x5_UNORM: return VK_FORMAT_ASTC_5x5_UNORM_BLOCK;
95 |         case ASTCFormat::ASTC_6x6_UNORM: return VK_FORMAT_ASTC_6x6_UNORM_BLOCK;
96 |         case ASTCFormat::ASTC_8x8_UNORM: return VK_FORMAT_ASTC_8x8_UNORM_BLOCK;
97 |         case ASTCFormat::ASTC_10x10_UNORM: return VK_FORMAT_ASTC_10x10_UNORM_BLOCK;
98 |         case ASTCFormat::ASTC_12x12_UNORM: return VK_FORMAT_ASTC_12x12_UNORM_BLOCK;
99 |         case ASTCFormat::ASTC_4x4_SRGB: return VK_FORMAT_ASTC_4x4_SRGB_BLOCK;
100 |         case ASTCFormat::ASTC_8x8_SRGB: return VK_FORMAT_ASTC_8x8_SRGB_BLOCK;
101 |         case ASTCFormat::BC7_UNORM: return VK_FORMAT_BC7_UNORM_BLOCK;
102 |         case ASTCFormat::RGBA8_UNORM: return VK_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_UNORM;
103 |         default: return VK_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_UNORM;
104 |     }
105 | }
106 | 
107 | bool TextureManager::IsFormatSupported(VkFormat format) const {
108 |     VkFormatProperties props;
109 |     vkGetPhysicalDeviceFormatProperties(m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), format, &props);
110 |     return (props.optimalTilingFeatures & VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_BIT) != 0;
111 | }
112 | 
113 | ASTCFormat TextureManager::SelectBestFormat() const {
114 |     // For now, always use RGBA8 to avoid needing astcenc on all platforms.
115 |     return ASTCFormat::RGBA8_UNORM;
116 | }
117 | 
118 | uint32_t TextureManager::LoadTexture(const char* path, ASTCFormat preferredFormat) {
119 |     // Check cache
120 |     auto it = m_textureCache.find(path);
121 |     if (it != m_textureCache.end()) {
122 |         return it->second;
123 |     }
124 |     
125 |     // Auto-detect format
126 |     if (preferredFormat == ASTCFormat::AUTO) {
127 |         preferredFormat = SelectBestFormat();
128 |     }
129 |     
130 |     std::vector<uint8_t> compressedData;
131 |     uint32_t width, height;
132 |     ASTCFormat actualFormat = preferredFormat;
133 |     
134 |     // Load and compress
135 |     if (!LoadPNGToASTC(path, compressedData, width, height, actualFormat)) {
136 |         if (m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
137 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("TextureManager", 
138 |                 (std::string("Failed to load texture: ") + path).c_str());
139 |         }
140 |         return UINT32_MAX;
141 |     }
142 |     
143 |     VkFormat vkFormat = ASTCFormatToVkFormat(actualFormat);
144 |     // For now, just use a single mip level to avoid std::log2/std::floor portability issues.
145 |     uint32_t mipLevels = 1;
146 |     
147 |     uint32_t textureID = CreateTextureFromMemory(compressedData.data(), width, height, vkFormat, mipLevels);
148 |     
149 |     if (textureID != UINT32_MAX) {
150 |         m_textureCache[path] = textureID;
151 |         if (m_core && m_core->GetLogger()) {
152 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("TextureManager", 
153 |                 (std::string("✓ Loaded: ") + path + " [" + std::to_string(width) + "x" + std::to_string(height) + "]").c_str());
154 |         }
155 |     }
156 |     
157 |     return textureID;
158 | }
159 | 
160 | bool TextureManager::LoadPNGToASTC(const char* path, std::vector<uint8_t>& outData, 
161 |                                    uint32_t& width, uint32_t& height, ASTCFormat& format) {
162 |     // Load encoded image bytes using the engine asset provider
163 |     auto imgData = m_core->GetAssetProvider()->LoadBinary(path);
164 |     if (imgData.empty()) {
165 |         return false;
166 |     }
167 | 
168 |     // Decode via stb_image into RGBA8
169 |     int w, h, channels;
170 |     unsigned char* pixels = stbi_load_from_memory(
171 |         reinterpret_cast<const unsigned char*>(imgData.data()),
172 |         static_cast<int>(imgData.size()),
173 |         &w, &h, &channels, 4  // Force RGBA
174 |     );
175 | 
176 |     if (!pixels) {
177 |         return false;
178 |     }
179 | 
180 |     width = static_cast<uint32_t>(w);
181 |     height = static_cast<uint32_t>(h);
182 | 
183 |     outData.resize(width * height * 4);
184 |     std::memcpy(outData.data(), pixels, width * height * 4);
185 |     stbi_image_free(pixels);
186 | 
187 |     // We always return RGBA8 for now (no ASTC compression on Android/desktop).
188 |     format = ASTCFormat::RGBA8_UNORM;
189 |     return true;
190 | }
191 | 
192 | uint32_t TextureManager::CreateTextureFromMemory(const void* data, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, 
193 |                                                  VkFormat format, uint32_t mipLevels) {
194 |     if (m_textures.size() >= MAX_TEXTURES) {
195 |         return UINT32_MAX;
196 |     }
197 |     
198 |     TextureSlot slot;
199 |     slot.width = width;
200 |     slot.height = height;
201 |     slot.mipLevels = mipLevels;
202 |     slot.format = format;
203 |     
204 |     // Create image
205 |     if (!CreateImage(width, height, format, mipLevels, slot.image, slot.memory)) {
206 |         return UINT32_MAX;
207 |     }
208 |     
209 |     // Upload data
210 |     if (!UploadTextureData(slot.image, data, width, height, format, mipLevels)) {
211 |         vkDestroyImage(m_vkDevice, slot.image, nullptr);
212 |         vkFreeMemory(m_vkDevice, slot.memory, nullptr);
213 |         return UINT32_MAX;
214 |     }
215 |     
216 |     // Create image view
217 |     if (!CreateImageView(slot.image, format, mipLevels, slot.view)) {
218 |         vkDestroyImage(m_vkDevice, slot.image, nullptr);
219 |         vkFreeMemory(m_vkDevice, slot.memory, nullptr);
220 |         return UINT32_MAX;
221 |     }
222 |     
223 |     // Create sampler
224 |     if (!CreateSampler(slot.sampler, mipLevels)) {
225 |         vkDestroyImageView(m_vkDevice, slot.view, nullptr);
226 |         vkDestroyImage(m_vkDevice, slot.image, nullptr);
227 |         vkFreeMemory(m_vkDevice, slot.memory, nullptr);
228 |         return UINT32_MAX;
229 |     }
230 |     
231 |     slot.isResident = true;
232 |     
233 |     uint32_t textureID = static_cast<uint32_t>(m_textures.size());
234 |     m_textures.push_back(slot);
235 |     
236 |     // Update descriptor set
237 |     UpdateDescriptorSet(textureID);
238 |     
239 |     return textureID;
240 | }
241 | 
242 | bool TextureManager::CreateImage(uint32_t width, uint32_t height, VkFormat format, uint32_t mipLevels,
243 |                                  VkImage& image, VkDeviceMemory& memory) {
244 |     VkImageCreateInfo imageInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_IMAGE_CREATE_INFO};
245 |     imageInfo.imageType = VK_IMAGE_TYPE_2D;
246 |     imageInfo.extent.width = width;
247 |     imageInfo.extent.height = height;
248 |     imageInfo.extent.depth = 1;
249 |     imageInfo.mipLevels = mipLevels;
250 |     imageInfo.arrayLayers = 1;
251 |     imageInfo.format = format;
252 |     imageInfo.tiling = VK_IMAGE_TILING_OPTIMAL;
253 |     imageInfo.initialLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_UNDEFINED;
254 |     imageInfo.usage = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT | VK_IMAGE_USAGE_SAMPLED_BIT | VK_IMAGE_USAGE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT;
255 |     imageInfo.sharingMode = VK_SHARING_MODE_EXCLUSIVE;
256 |     imageInfo.samples = VK_SAMPLE_COUNT_1_BIT;
257 |     
258 |     if (vkCreateImage(m_vkDevice, &imageInfo, nullptr, &image) != VK_SUCCESS) {
259 |         return false;
260 |     }
261 |     
262 |     VkMemoryRequirements memReq;
263 |     vkGetImageMemoryRequirements(m_vkDevice, image, &memReq);
264 |     
265 |     VkMemoryAllocateInfo allocInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_MEMORY_ALLOCATE_INFO};
266 |     allocInfo.allocationSize = memReq.size;
267 |     allocInfo.memoryTypeIndex = Helpers::FindMemoryType(m_device->GetPhysicalDevice(), 
268 |         memReq.memoryTypeBits, VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT);
269 |     
270 |     if (vkAllocateMemory(m_vkDevice, &allocInfo, nullptr, &memory) != VK_SUCCESS) {
271 |         vkDestroyImage(m_vkDevice, image, nullptr);
272 |         return false;
273 |     }
274 |     
275 |     vkBindImageMemory(m_vkDevice, image, memory, 0);
276 |     
277 |     m_vramAllocated.fetch_add(memReq.size);
278 |     
279 |     return true;
280 | }
281 | 
282 | bool TextureManager::CreateImageView(VkImage image, VkFormat format, uint32_t mipLevels, VkImageView& view) {
283 |     VkImageViewCreateInfo viewInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_IMAGE_VIEW_CREATE_INFO};
284 |     viewInfo.image = image;
285 |     viewInfo.viewType = VK_IMAGE_VIEW_TYPE_2D;
286 |     viewInfo.format = format;
287 |     viewInfo.subresourceRange.aspectMask = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_COLOR_BIT;
288 |     viewInfo.subresourceRange.baseMipLevel = 0;
289 |     viewInfo.subresourceRange.levelCount = mipLevels;
290 |     viewInfo.subresourceRange.baseArrayLayer = 0;
291 |     viewInfo.subresourceRange.layerCount = 1;
292 |     
293 |     return vkCreateImageView(m_vkDevice, &viewInfo, nullptr, &view) == VK_SUCCESS;
294 | }
295 | 
296 | bool TextureManager::CreateSampler(VkSampler& sampler, uint32_t mipLevels) {
297 |     VkSamplerCreateInfo samplerInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_SAMPLER_CREATE_INFO};
298 |     samplerInfo.magFilter = VK_FILTER_LINEAR;
299 |     samplerInfo.minFilter = VK_FILTER_LINEAR;
300 |     samplerInfo.mipmapMode = VK_SAMPLER_MIPMAP_MODE_LINEAR;
301 |     samplerInfo.addressModeU = VK_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_REPEAT;
302 |     samplerInfo.addressModeV = VK_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_REPEAT;
303 |     samplerInfo.addressModeW = VK_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_REPEAT;
304 |     samplerInfo.mipLodBias = 0.0f;
305 |     samplerInfo.anisotropyEnable = VK_TRUE;
306 |     samplerInfo.maxAnisotropy = 16.0f;
307 |     samplerInfo.minLod = 0.0f;
308 |     samplerInfo.maxLod = static_cast<float>(mipLevels);
309 |     
310 |     return vkCreateSampler(m_vkDevice, &samplerInfo, nullptr, &sampler) == VK_SUCCESS;
311 | }
312 | 
313 | bool TextureManager::UploadTextureData(VkImage image, const void* data, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, 
314 |                                        VkFormat format, uint32_t mipLevels) {
315 |     // Calculate data size
316 |     size_t dataSize = width * height * 4;  // Assume 4 bytes per pixel for now
317 |     
318 |     if (dataSize > STAGING_SIZE) {
319 |         return false;  // Texture too large for staging buffer
320 |     }
321 |     
322 |     // Copy to staging
323 |     memcpy(m_stagingMapped, data, dataSize);
324 |     
325 |     // Create command buffer
326 |     VkCommandBufferAllocateInfo allocInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_BUFFER_ALLOCATE_INFO};
327 |     allocInfo.commandPool = m_transferPool;
328 |     allocInfo.level = VK_COMMAND_BUFFER_LEVEL_PRIMARY;
329 |     allocInfo.commandBufferCount = 1;
330 |     
331 |     VkCommandBuffer cmd;
332 |     vkAllocateCommandBuffers(m_vkDevice, &allocInfo, &cmd);
333 |     
334 |     VkCommandBufferBeginInfo beginInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COMMAND_BUFFER_BEGIN_INFO};
335 |     beginInfo.flags = VK_COMMAND_BUFFER_USAGE_ONE_TIME_SUBMIT_BIT;
336 |     vkBeginCommandBuffer(cmd, &beginInfo);
337 |     
338 |     // Transition to TRANSFER_DST
339 |     VkImageMemoryBarrier barrier = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_IMAGE_MEMORY_BARRIER};
340 |     barrier.oldLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_UNDEFINED;
341 |     barrier.newLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_TRANSFER_DST_OPTIMAL;
342 |     barrier.srcQueueFamilyIndex = VK_QUEUE_FAMILY_IGNORED;
343 |     barrier.dstQueueFamilyIndex = VK_QUEUE_FAMILY_IGNORED;
344 |     barrier.image = image;
345 |     barrier.subresourceRange.aspectMask = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_COLOR_BIT;
346 |     barrier.subresourceRange.baseMipLevel = 0;
347 |     barrier.subresourceRange.levelCount = 1;
348 |     barrier.subresourceRange.baseArrayLayer = 0;
349 |     barrier.subresourceRange.layerCount = 1;
350 |     barrier.srcAccessMask = 0;
351 |     barrier.dstAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_TRANSFER_WRITE_BIT;
352 |     
353 |     vkCmdPipelineBarrier(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TOP_OF_PIPE_BIT, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TRANSFER_BIT, 
354 |                         0, 0, nullptr, 0, nullptr, 1, &barrier);
355 |     
356 |     // Copy buffer to image
357 |     VkBufferImageCopy region = {};
358 |     region.bufferOffset = 0;
359 |     region.bufferRowLength = 0;
360 |     region.bufferImageHeight = 0;
361 |     region.imageSubresource.aspectMask = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_COLOR_BIT;
362 |     region.imageSubresource.mipLevel = 0;
363 |     region.imageSubresource.baseArrayLayer = 0;
364 |     region.imageSubresource.layerCount = 1;
365 |     region.imageOffset = {0, 0, 0};
366 |     region.imageExtent = {width, height, 1};
367 |     
368 |     vkCmdCopyBufferToImage(cmd, m_stagingBuffer, image, VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_TRANSFER_DST_OPTIMAL, 1, &region);
369 |     
370 |     // Transition to SHADER_READ
371 |     barrier.oldLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_TRANSFER_DST_OPTIMAL;
372 |     barrier.newLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHADER_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL;
373 |     barrier.srcAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_TRANSFER_WRITE_BIT;
374 |     barrier.dstAccessMask = VK_ACCESS_SHADER_READ_BIT;
375 |     
376 |     vkCmdPipelineBarrier(cmd, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TRANSFER_BIT, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_FRAGMENT_SHADER_BIT, 
377 |                         0, 0, nullptr, 0, nullptr, 1, &barrier);
378 |     
379 |     vkEndCommandBuffer(cmd);
380 |     
381 |     // Submit
382 |     VkSubmitInfo submitInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_SUBMIT_INFO};
383 |     submitInfo.commandBufferCount = 1;
384 |     submitInfo.pCommandBuffers = &cmd;
385 |     
386 |     vkQueueSubmit(m_device->GetGraphicsQueue(), 1, &submitInfo, VK_NULL_HANDLE);
387 |     vkQueueWaitIdle(m_device->GetGraphicsQueue());
388 |     
389 |     vkFreeCommandBuffers(m_vkDevice, m_transferPool, 1, &cmd);
390 |     
391 |     return true;
392 | }
393 | 
394 | bool TextureManager::CreateDescriptorSet() {
395 |     // FALLBACK MODE: 2 textures (diffuse + normal map)
396 |     VkDescriptorSetLayoutBinding bindings[2] = {};
397 |     
398 |     // Binding 0: Diffuse texture
399 |     bindings[0].binding = 0;
400 |     bindings[0].descriptorType = VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER;
401 |     bindings[0].descriptorCount = 1;
402 |     bindings[0].stageFlags = VK_SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT_BIT;
403 |     
404 |     // Binding 1: Normal map
405 |     bindings[1].binding = 1;
406 |     bindings[1].descriptorType = VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER;
407 |     bindings[1].descriptorCount = 1;
408 |     bindings[1].stageFlags = VK_SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT_BIT;
409 |     
410 |     VkDescriptorSetLayoutCreateInfo layoutInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_LAYOUT_CREATE_INFO};
411 |     layoutInfo.bindingCount = 2;
412 |     layoutInfo.pBindings = bindings;
413 |     
414 |     if (vkCreateDescriptorSetLayout(m_vkDevice, &layoutInfo, nullptr, &m_descriptorSetLayout) != VK_SUCCESS) {
415 |         return false;
416 |     }
417 |     
418 |     // Create descriptor pool for 2 textures
419 |     VkDescriptorPoolSize poolSize = {};
420 |     poolSize.type = VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER;
421 |     poolSize.descriptorCount = 2;
422 |     
423 |     VkDescriptorPoolCreateInfo poolInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_POOL_CREATE_INFO};
424 |     poolInfo.poolSizeCount = 1;
425 |     poolInfo.pPoolSizes = &poolSize;
426 |     poolInfo.maxSets = 1;
427 |     
428 |     if (vkCreateDescriptorPool(m_vkDevice, &poolInfo, nullptr, &m_descriptorPool) != VK_SUCCESS) {
429 |         return false;
430 |     }
431 |     
432 |     // Allocate descriptor set
433 |     VkDescriptorSetAllocateInfo allocInfo = {VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_ALLOCATE_INFO};
434 |     allocInfo.descriptorPool = m_descriptorPool;
435 |     allocInfo.descriptorSetCount = 1;
436 |     allocInfo.pSetLayouts = &m_descriptorSetLayout;
437 |     
438 |     return vkAllocateDescriptorSets(m_vkDevice, &allocInfo, &m_descriptorSet) == VK_SUCCESS;
439 | }
440 | 
441 | void TextureManager::UpdateDescriptorSet(uint32_t textureID) {
442 |     if (textureID >= m_textures.size()) return;
443 |     
444 |     // CRITICAL: Only update descriptor set when BOTH textures are loaded
445 |     // Texture 0 = diffuse, Texture 1 = normal map
446 |     if (m_textures.size() < 2) {
447 |         // Not enough textures loaded yet, skip update
448 |         auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
449 |         if (logger) {
450 |             char msg[256];
451 |             snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "UpdateDescriptorSet: Waiting for both textures (currently have %zu)", m_textures.size());
452 |             logger->LogInfo("TextureManager", msg);
453 |         }
454 |         return;
455 |     }
456 |     
457 |     // Bind diffuse texture to binding 0 (always texture ID 0)
458 |     const auto& diffuseTex = m_textures[0];
459 |     
460 |     // Bind normal map to binding 1 (always texture ID 1)
461 |     const auto& normalTex = m_textures[1];
462 |     
463 |     VkDescriptorImageInfo imageInfos[2] = {};
464 |     
465 |     // Binding 0: Diffuse
466 |     imageInfos[0].imageLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHADER_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL;
467 |     imageInfos[0].imageView = diffuseTex.view;
468 |     imageInfos[0].sampler = diffuseTex.sampler;
469 |     
470 |     // Binding 1: Normal map
471 |     imageInfos[1].imageLayout = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHADER_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL;
472 |     imageInfos[1].imageView = normalTex.view;
473 |     imageInfos[1].sampler = normalTex.sampler;
474 |     
475 |     VkWriteDescriptorSet writes[2] = {};
476 |     
477 |     // Write diffuse texture
478 |     writes[0].sType = VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_WRITE_DESCRIPTOR_SET;
479 |     writes[0].dstSet = m_descriptorSet;
480 |     writes[0].dstBinding = 0;
481 |     writes[0].dstArrayElement = 0;
482 |     writes[0].descriptorType = VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER;
483 |     writes[0].descriptorCount = 1;
484 |     writes[0].pImageInfo = &imageInfos[0];
485 |     
486 |     // Write normal map
487 |     writes[1].sType = VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_WRITE_DESCRIPTOR_SET;
488 |     writes[1].dstSet = m_descriptorSet;
489 |     writes[1].dstBinding = 1;
490 |     writes[1].dstArrayElement = 0;
491 |     writes[1].descriptorType = VK_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER;
492 |     writes[1].descriptorCount = 1;
493 |     writes[1].pImageInfo = &imageInfos[1];
494 |     
495 |     vkUpdateDescriptorSets(m_vkDevice, 2, writes, 0, nullptr);
496 |     
497 |     auto logger = m_core ? m_core->GetLogger() : nullptr;
498 |     if (logger) {
499 |         logger->LogInfo("TextureManager", "✓ Descriptor set updated with diffuse + normal map");
500 |     }
501 | }
502 | 
503 | const TextureSlot* TextureManager::GetTexture(uint32_t id) const {
504 |     if (id >= m_textures.size()) return nullptr;
505 |     return &m_textures[id];
506 | }
507 | 
508 | void TextureManager::StreamTexture(uint32_t textureID) {
509 |     // TODO: Implement async streaming
510 | }
511 | 
512 | void TextureManager::EvictTexture(uint32_t textureID) {
513 |     // TODO: Implement eviction
514 | }
515 | 
516 | uint32_t TextureManager::CreateMaterial(const Material& mat) {
517 |     uint32_t id = static_cast<uint32_t>(m_materials.size());
518 |     m_materials.push_back(mat);
519 |     return id;
520 | }
521 | 
522 | const TextureManager::Material* TextureManager::GetMaterial(uint32_t id) const {
523 |     if (id >= m_materials.size()) return nullptr;
524 |     return &m_materials[id];
525 | }
526 | 
527 | } // namespace SecretEngine::Textures
528 | 
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/TextureManager.h
```
1 | // ============================================================================
2 | // TEXTURE MANAGER - GPU-OPTIMIZED ASTC COMPRESSION
3 | // High-performance texture streaming with bindless textures
4 | // ============================================================================
5 | 
6 | #pragma once
7 | #include <vulkan/vulkan.h>
8 | #include <vector>
9 | #include <string>
10 | #include <map>
11 | #include <atomic>
12 | 
13 | namespace SecretEngine {
14 |     class ICore;
15 |     class IAssetProvider;
16 | }
17 | 
18 | class VulkanDevice;
19 | 
20 | namespace SecretEngine::Textures {
21 | 
22 | // ============================================================================
23 | // ASTC BLOCK FORMATS (Hardware-accelerated on mobile & modern GPUs)
24 | // ============================================================================
25 | enum class ASTCFormat {
26 |     ASTC_4x4_UNORM = 0,   // Highest quality, 8bpp
27 |     ASTC_5x5_UNORM,       // 5.12bpp
28 |     ASTC_6x6_UNORM,       // 3.56bpp
29 |     ASTC_8x8_UNORM,       // 2bpp - Best balance
30 |     ASTC_10x10_UNORM,     // 1.28bpp
31 |     ASTC_12x12_UNORM,     // Lowest quality, 0.89bpp
32 |     
33 |     // SRGB variants
34 |     ASTC_4x4_SRGB,
35 |     ASTC_8x8_SRGB,
36 |     
37 |     // Fallback formats
38 |     BC7_UNORM,            // Desktop fallback
39 |     RGBA8_UNORM,          // Uncompressed fallback
40 |     
41 |     AUTO                  // Auto-detect best format
42 | };
43 | 
44 | // ============================================================================
45 | // TEXTURE SLOT - GPU Bindless Resource
46 | // ============================================================================
47 | struct TextureSlot {
48 |     VkImage image = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
49 |     VkDeviceMemory memory = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
50 |     VkImageView view = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
51 |     VkSampler sampler = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
52 |     
53 |     uint32_t width = 0;
54 |     uint32_t height = 0;
55 |     uint32_t mipLevels = 1;
56 |     VkFormat format = VK_FORMAT_UNDEFINED;
57 |     
58 |     uint64_t vramBytes = 0;
59 |     bool isResident = false;  // GPU streaming state
60 |     
61 |     // Atlas support
62 |     struct AtlasRegion {
63 |         float u0, v0, u1, v1;  // Normalized UV coordinates
64 |     };
65 |     std::vector<AtlasRegion> atlasRegions;  // Sub-textures in atlas
66 | };
67 | 
68 | // ============================================================================
69 | // TEXTURE MANAGER - Centralized GPU Texture System
70 | // ============================================================================
71 | class TextureManager {
72 | public:
73 |     TextureManager() = default;
74 |     ~TextureManager();
75 |     
76 |     // === INITIALIZATION ===
77 |     bool Initialize(VulkanDevice* device, SecretEngine::ICore* core);
78 |     void Shutdown();
79 |     
80 |     // === TEXTURE LOADING (Auto-detects format) ===
81 |     // Loads PNG and converts to optimal GPU format (ASTC preferred)
82 |     uint32_t LoadTexture(const char* path, ASTCFormat preferredFormat = ASTCFormat::AUTO);
83 |     
84 |     // Load pre-compressed ASTC file (fastest)
85 |     uint32_t LoadASTCTexture(const char* path, ASTCFormat format);
86 |     
87 |     // === TEXTURE ATLAS (Batch multiple textures into one) ===
88 |     struct AtlasTextureInfo {
89 |         const char* path;
90 |         uint32_t slotIndex;  // Output: assigned texture slot in atlas
91 |     };
92 |     uint32_t CreateAtlas(AtlasTextureInfo* textures, uint32_t count, uint32_t atlasSize = 4096);
93 |     
94 |     // === BINDLESS DESCRIPTOR MANAGEMENT ===
95 |     VkDescriptorSet GetTextureDescriptorSet() const { return m_descriptorSet; }
96 |     VkDescriptorSetLayout GetDescriptorSetLayout() const { return m_descriptorSetLayout; }
97 |     
98 |     // === STREAMING (Async GPU upload) ===
99 |     void StreamTexture(uint32_t textureID);
100 |     void EvictTexture(uint32_t textureID);
101 |     
102 |     // === ACCESSORS ===
103 |     const TextureSlot* GetTexture(uint32_t id) const;
104 |     uint32_t GetTextureCount() const { return static_cast<uint32_t>(m_textures.size()); }
105 |     
106 |     // === STATS ===
107 |     uint64_t GetVRAMUsage() const { return m_vramAllocated.load(); }
108 |     
109 |     // === MATERIAL SUPPORT ===
110 |     struct Material {
111 |         uint32_t albedoTexture;
112 |         uint32_t normalTexture;
113 |         uint32_t metallicRoughnessTexture;
114 |         float albedoFactor[4];
115 |         float metallicFactor;
116 |         float roughnessFactor;
117 |     };
118 |     uint32_t CreateMaterial(const Material& mat);
119 |     const Material* GetMaterial(uint32_t id) const;
120 |     
121 | private:
122 |     // === INTERNAL LOADING ===
123 |     bool LoadPNGToASTC(const char* path, std::vector<uint8_t>& outData, 
124 |                        uint32_t& width, uint32_t& height, ASTCFormat& format);
125 |     uint32_t CreateTextureFromMemory(const void* data, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, 
126 |                                      VkFormat format, uint32_t mipLevels = 1);
127 |     
128 |     // === GPU RESOURCE CREATION ===
129 |     bool CreateImage(uint32_t width, uint32_t height, VkFormat format, uint32_t mipLevels,
130 |                     VkImage& image, VkDeviceMemory& memory);
131 |     bool CreateImageView(VkImage image, VkFormat format, uint32_t mipLevels, VkImageView& view);
132 |     bool CreateSampler(VkSampler& sampler, uint32_t mipLevels);
133 |     
134 |     // === DESCRIPTOR SET MANAGEMENT ===
135 |     bool CreateDescriptorSet();
136 |     void UpdateDescriptorSet(uint32_t textureID);
137 |     
138 |     // === COMPRESSION HELPERS ===
139 |     VkFormat ASTCFormatToVkFormat(ASTCFormat format) const;
140 |     ASTCFormat SelectBestFormat() const;  // Auto-detect based on GPU capabilities
141 |     bool IsFormatSupported(VkFormat format) const;
142 |     
143 |     // === STAGING ===
144 |     bool UploadTextureData(VkImage image, const void* data, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, 
145 |                           VkFormat format, uint32_t mipLevels);
146 |     bool GenerateMipmaps(VkImage image, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, uint32_t mipLevels, VkFormat format);
147 |     
148 |     VulkanDevice* m_device = nullptr;
149 |     VkDevice m_vkDevice = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
150 |     SecretEngine::ICore* m_core = nullptr;
151 |     
152 |     // === TEXTURE POOL ===
153 |     std::vector<TextureSlot> m_textures;
154 |     std::map<std::string, uint32_t> m_textureCache;  // Path -> Texture ID
155 |     
156 |     // === BINDLESS DESCRIPTORS (Up to 16,384 textures) ===
157 |     VkDescriptorSetLayout m_descriptorSetLayout = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
158 |     VkDescriptorPool m_descriptorPool = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
159 |     VkDescriptorSet m_descriptorSet = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
160 |     static constexpr uint32_t MAX_TEXTURES = 16384;
161 |     
162 |     // === MATERIALS ===
163 |     std::vector<Material> m_materials;
164 |     
165 |     // === STATS ===
166 |     std::atomic<uint64_t> m_vramAllocated{0};
167 |     
168 |     // === STAGING BUFFER (For uploads) ===
169 |     VkBuffer m_stagingBuffer = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
170 |     VkDeviceMemory m_stagingMemory = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
171 |     void* m_stagingMapped = nullptr;
172 |     static constexpr uint64_t STAGING_SIZE = 64 * 1024 * 1024;  // 64MB
173 |     
174 |     // === COMMAND POOL (For transfers) ===
175 |     VkCommandPool m_transferPool = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
176 | };
177 | 
178 | } // namespace SecretEngine::Textures
179 | 
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/VulkanDevice.cpp
```
1 | #ifndef WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
2 | #define WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
3 | #endif
4 | 
5 | #include "VulkanDevice.h"
6 | #include <vulkan/vulkan.h> // MUST BE FIRST
7 | 
8 | // 1. Platform Specific Headers
9 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
10 |     #include <windows.h>
11 |     #include <vulkan/vulkan_win32.h>
12 | #elif defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
13 |     #include <vulkan/vulkan_android.h>
14 | #endif
15 | 
16 | // 2. Standard Libraries
17 | #include <cstdio>
18 | #include <vector>
19 | 
20 | // 3. Vulkan Headers
21 | // Already included at top
22 | 
23 | // 4. Engine Headers
24 | #include <SecretEngine/ILogger.h>
25 | #include "VulkanDevice.h"
26 | 
27 | VulkanDevice::VulkanDevice(SecretEngine::ICore* core) : m_core(core) {}
28 | 
29 | VulkanDevice::~VulkanDevice() { 
30 |     Shutdown(); 
31 | }
32 | 
33 | bool VulkanDevice::Initialize() {
34 |     m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanDevice", "Starting Vulkan Initialization...");
35 | 
36 |     if (!CreateInstance()) {
37 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanDevice", "CRITICAL: Failed to create Vulkan Instance.");
38 |         return false;
39 |     }
40 | 
41 |     if (!PickPhysicalDevice()) {
42 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanDevice", "CRITICAL: Failed to find a suitable GPU.");
43 |         return false;
44 |     }
45 | 
46 |     if (!CreateLogicalDevice()) {
47 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanDevice", "CRITICAL: Failed to create Logical Device.");
48 |         return false;
49 |     }
50 | 
51 |     m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanDevice", "Vulkan Hardware fully initialized.");
52 |     return true;
53 | }
54 | 
55 | bool VulkanDevice::CreateInstance() {
56 |     // Setup platform-specific extensions
57 |     std::vector<const char*> extensions = { VK_KHR_SURFACE_EXTENSION_NAME };
58 | 
59 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
60 |     extensions.push_back(VK_KHR_WIN32_SURFACE_EXTENSION_NAME);
61 | #elif defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
62 |     extensions.push_back(VK_KHR_ANDROID_SURFACE_EXTENSION_NAME);
63 | #endif
64 |     
65 |     VkApplicationInfo appInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_APPLICATION_INFO };
66 |     appInfo.pApplicationName = "SecretEngine";
67 |     appInfo.applicationVersion = VK_MAKE_VERSION(1, 0, 0);
68 |     appInfo.pEngineName = "SecretEngine";
69 |     appInfo.engineVersion = VK_MAKE_VERSION(1, 0, 0);
70 |     appInfo.apiVersion = VK_API_VERSION_1_2;
71 | 
72 |     VkInstanceCreateInfo createInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_INSTANCE_CREATE_INFO };
73 |     createInfo.pApplicationInfo = &appInfo;
74 |     createInfo.enabledExtensionCount = static_cast<uint32_t>(extensions.size());
75 |     createInfo.ppEnabledExtensionNames = extensions.data();
76 | 
77 |     VkResult result = vkCreateInstance(&createInfo, nullptr, &m_instance);
78 |     if (result != VK_SUCCESS) {
79 |         char buf[128];
80 |         sprintf(buf, "vkCreateInstance failed with error code: %d", (int)result);
81 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanDevice", buf);
82 |         return false;
83 |     }
84 | 
85 |     return true;
86 | }
87 | 
88 | bool VulkanDevice::CreateSurface(void* nativeWindow) {
89 |     VkResult result = VK_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED;
90 | 
91 |     if (!nativeWindow) {
92 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanDevice", "Cannot create surface: Native Window handle is NULL.");
93 |         return false;
94 |     }
95 | 
96 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
97 |     VkWin32SurfaceCreateInfoKHR createInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_WIN32_SURFACE_CREATE_INFO_KHR };
98 |     createInfo.hwnd = (HWND)nativeWindow;
99 |     createInfo.hinstance = GetModuleHandle(nullptr);
100 |     result = vkCreateWin32SurfaceKHR(m_instance, &createInfo, nullptr, &m_surface);
101 | 
102 | #elif defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
103 |     VkAndroidSurfaceCreateInfoKHR createInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_ANDROID_SURFACE_CREATE_INFO_KHR };
104 |     createInfo.pNext = nullptr;
105 |     createInfo.flags = 0;
106 |     createInfo.window = (ANativeWindow*)nativeWindow;
107 |     
108 |     result = vkCreateAndroidSurfaceKHR(m_instance, &createInfo, nullptr, &m_surface);
109 | #endif
110 | 
111 |     if (result != VK_SUCCESS) {
112 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanDevice", "Failed to create Window Surface.");
113 |         return false;
114 |     }
115 |     return true;
116 | }
117 | 
118 | bool VulkanDevice::PickPhysicalDevice() {
119 |     uint32_t count = 0;
120 |     vkEnumeratePhysicalDevices(m_instance, &count, nullptr);
121 |     
122 |     if (count == 0) {
123 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanDevice", "No Vulkan-compatible GPUs found on this system.");
124 |         return false;
125 |     }
126 | 
127 |     // Just pick the first available device for now
128 |     VkPhysicalDevice devices[8];
129 |     vkEnumeratePhysicalDevices(m_instance, &count, devices);
130 |     m_physicalDevice = devices[0]; 
131 | 
132 |     // Log the name of the GPU we found
133 |     VkPhysicalDeviceProperties props;
134 |     vkGetPhysicalDeviceProperties(m_physicalDevice, &props);
135 |     m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanDevice", props.deviceName);
136 | 
137 |     return true;
138 | }
139 | 
140 | bool VulkanDevice::CreateLogicalDevice() {
141 |     float priority = 1.0f;
142 |     VkDeviceQueueCreateInfo queueInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DEVICE_QUEUE_CREATE_INFO };
143 |     queueInfo.queueFamilyIndex = 0; 
144 |     queueInfo.queueCount = 1;
145 |     queueInfo.pQueuePriorities = &priority;
146 | 
147 |     // Check which extensions are available
148 |     uint32_t extensionCount = 0;
149 |     vkEnumerateDeviceExtensionProperties(m_physicalDevice, nullptr, &extensionCount, nullptr);
150 |     std::vector<VkExtensionProperties> availableExtensions(extensionCount);
151 |     vkEnumerateDeviceExtensionProperties(m_physicalDevice, nullptr, &extensionCount, availableExtensions.data());
152 |     
153 |     // Build list of extensions to enable
154 |     std::vector<const char*> deviceExtensions;
155 |     deviceExtensions.push_back(VK_KHR_SWAPCHAIN_EXTENSION_NAME); // Always required
156 |     
157 |     // Check if descriptor indexing is available (for bindless textures)
158 |     bool hasDescriptorIndexing = false;
159 |     for (const auto& ext : availableExtensions) {
160 |         if (strcmp(ext.extensionName, VK_EXT_DESCRIPTOR_INDEXING_EXTENSION_NAME) == 0) {
161 |             hasDescriptorIndexing = true;
162 |             deviceExtensions.push_back(VK_EXT_DESCRIPTOR_INDEXING_EXTENSION_NAME);
163 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogInfo("VulkanDevice", "✓ Descriptor indexing extension available");
164 |             break;
165 |         }
166 |     }
167 |     
168 |     if (!hasDescriptorIndexing) {
169 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogWarning("VulkanDevice", "Descriptor indexing not available - bindless textures disabled");
170 |     }
171 |     
172 |     VkDeviceCreateInfo createInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DEVICE_CREATE_INFO };
173 |     createInfo.queueCreateInfoCount = 1;
174 |     createInfo.pQueueCreateInfos = &queueInfo;
175 |     createInfo.enabledExtensionCount = static_cast<uint32_t>(deviceExtensions.size());
176 |     createInfo.ppEnabledExtensionNames = deviceExtensions.data();
177 | 
178 |     // Query and enable descriptor indexing features when available.
179 |     //
180 |     // IMPORTANT: We must not hard-link against vkGetPhysicalDeviceFeatures2 on platforms where
181 |     // it's not exported (some Android loaders), so we resolve it dynamically.
182 |     VkPhysicalDeviceDescriptorIndexingFeatures descriptorIndexingFeatures = {
183 |         VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_DESCRIPTOR_INDEXING_FEATURES
184 |     };
185 |     VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures2 features2 = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_FEATURES_2 };
186 |     
187 |     // Only chain descriptor indexing features if the extension is available
188 |     if (hasDescriptorIndexing) {
189 |         features2.pNext = &descriptorIndexingFeatures;
190 |     }
191 | 
192 |     auto fpGetPhysicalDeviceFeatures2 =
193 |         reinterpret_cast<PFN_vkGetPhysicalDeviceFeatures2>(
194 |             vkGetInstanceProcAddr(m_instance, "vkGetPhysicalDeviceFeatures2"));
195 | 
196 |     if (fpGetPhysicalDeviceFeatures2 && hasDescriptorIndexing) {
197 |         // Safe path: loader exports vkGetPhysicalDeviceFeatures2 (Vulkan 1.1+ or extension)
198 |         fpGetPhysicalDeviceFeatures2(m_physicalDevice, &features2);
199 |         createInfo.pNext = &features2;
200 |     } else {
201 |         // Fallback: descriptor indexing querying not available; continue without chaining
202 |         // extended features. Bindless textures may be limited on this platform.
203 |         createInfo.pNext = nullptr;
204 |         if (!hasDescriptorIndexing) {
205 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogWarning(
206 |                 "VulkanDevice",
207 |                 "Descriptor indexing not supported; bindless textures disabled");
208 |         } else {
209 |             m_core->GetLogger()->LogWarning(
210 |                 "VulkanDevice",
211 |                 "vkGetPhysicalDeviceFeatures2 not available; running without explicit descriptor indexing features");
212 |         }
213 |     }
214 | 
215 |     VkResult result = vkCreateDevice(m_physicalDevice, &createInfo, nullptr, &m_device);
216 |     if (result != VK_SUCCESS) {
217 |         char buf[128];
218 |         sprintf(buf, "vkCreateDevice failed with error code: %d", (int)result);
219 |         m_core->GetLogger()->LogError("VulkanDevice", buf);
220 |         return false;
221 |     }
222 | 
223 |     vkGetDeviceQueue(m_device, 0, 0, &m_graphicsQueue);
224 |     return true;
225 | }
226 | 
227 | 
228 | void VulkanDevice::Shutdown() {
229 |     if (m_surface) {
230 |         vkDestroySurfaceKHR(m_instance, m_surface, nullptr);
231 |         m_surface = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
232 |     }
233 |     if (m_device) {
234 |         vkDestroyDevice(m_device, nullptr);
235 |         m_device = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
236 |     }
237 |     if (m_instance) {
238 |         vkDestroyInstance(m_instance, nullptr);
239 |         m_instance = VK_NULL_HANDLE;
240 |     }
241 | }
```

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/VulkanHelpers.cpp
```
1 | #include "VulkanHelpers.h"
2 | #include <cstring>
3 | #include <atomic>
4 | 
5 | // === VRAM TRACKING (Thread-Safe) ===
6 | namespace {
7 |     std::atomic<uint64_t> g_vramAllocated{0};
8 | }
9 | 
10 | namespace SecretEngine::Vulkan {
11 | 
12 | bool Helpers::CreateBuffer(VkDevice device, VkPhysicalDevice physicalDevice, VkDeviceSize size, 
13 |                          VkBufferUsageFlags usage, VkMemoryPropertyFlags properties, 
14 |                          VkBuffer& buffer, VkDeviceMemory& bufferMemory) {
15 |     VkBufferCreateInfo bufferInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_BUFFER_CREATE_INFO };
16 |     bufferInfo.size = size;
17 |     bufferInfo.usage = usage;
18 |     bufferInfo.sharingMode = VK_SHARING_MODE_EXCLUSIVE;
19 | 
20 |     if (vkCreateBuffer(device, &bufferInfo, nullptr, &buffer) != VK_SUCCESS) {
21 |         return false;
22 |     }
23 | 
24 |     VkMemoryRequirements memRequirements;
25 |     vkGetBufferMemoryRequirements(device, buffer, &memRequirements);
26 | 
27 |     VkMemoryAllocateInfo allocInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_MEMORY_ALLOCATE_INFO };
28 |     allocInfo.allocationSize = memRequirements.size;
29 |     allocInfo.memoryTypeIndex = FindMemoryType(physicalDevice, memRequirements.memoryTypeBits, properties);
30 | 
31 |     if (vkAllocateMemory(device, &allocInfo, nullptr, &bufferMemory) != VK_SUCCESS) {
32 |         return false;
33 |     }
34 | 
35 |     vkBindBufferMemory(device, buffer, bufferMemory, 0);
36 |     
37 |     // === TRACK VRAM ALLOCATION ===
38 |     g_vramAllocated.fetch_add(memRequirements.size, std::memory_order_relaxed);
39 |     
40 |     return true;
41 | }
42 | 
43 | VkShaderModule Helpers::CreateShaderModule(VkDevice device, const std::vector<char>& code) {
44 |     VkShaderModuleCreateInfo createInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_SHADER_MODULE_CREATE_INFO };
45 |     createInfo.codeSize = code.size();
46 |     createInfo.pCode = reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t*>(code.data());
47 | 
48 |     VkShaderModule shaderModule;
49 |     if (vkCreateShaderModule(device, &createInfo, nullptr, &shaderModule) != VK_SUCCESS) {
50 |         return VK_NULL_HANDLE;
51 |     }
52 | 
53 |     return shaderModule;
54 | }
55 | 
56 | uint32_t Helpers::FindMemoryType(VkPhysicalDevice physicalDevice, uint32_t typeFilter, 
57 |                                VkMemoryPropertyFlags properties) {
58 |     VkPhysicalDeviceMemoryProperties memProperties;
59 |     vkGetPhysicalDeviceMemoryProperties(physicalDevice, &memProperties);
60 | 
61 |     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < memProperties.memoryTypeCount; i++) {
62 |         if ((typeFilter & (1 << i)) && (memProperties.memoryTypes[i].propertyFlags & properties) == properties) {
63 |             return i;
64 |         }
65 |     }
66 |     return 0;
67 | }
68 | 
69 | void Helpers::MapAndCopy(VkDevice device, VkDeviceMemory memory, VkDeviceSize size, const void* data) {
70 |     void* mappedData;
71 |     vkMapMemory(device, memory, 0, size, 0, &mappedData);
72 |     memcpy(mappedData, data, size);
73 |     vkUnmapMemory(device, memory);
74 | }
75 | 
76 | // === VRAM STATS API ===
77 | uint64_t Helpers::GetVRAMAllocated() {
78 |     return g_vramAllocated.load(std::memory_order_relaxed);
79 | }
80 | 
81 | } // namespace SecretEngine::Vulkan
```

7 | #ifdef CreateBuffer
8 | #undef CreateBuffer

14 | public:

16 |                            VkBufferUsageFlags usage, VkMemoryPropertyFlags properties, 
17 |                            VkBuffer& buffer, VkDeviceMemory& bufferMemory);

20 |

22 |                                  VkMemoryPropertyFlags properties);
23 | 
24 |     static void MapAndCopy(VkDevice device, VkDeviceMemory memory, VkDeviceSize size, const void* data);
25 |     
26 |     // VRAM tracking (thread-safe)
27 |     static uint64_t GetVRAMAllocated();
28 | };
29 |

plugins/VulkanRenderer/src/Window.cpp
```
1 | #include "Window.h"
2 | 
3 | #if defined(SE_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)
4 | #include <vulkan/vulkan_win32.h>
5 | 
6 | LRESULT CALLBACK WindowProc(HWND hwnd, UINT uMsg, WPARAM wParam, LPARAM lParam) {
7 |     if (uMsg == WM_CLOSE) { PostQuitMessage(0); return 0; }
8 |     return DefWindowProc(hwnd, uMsg, wParam, lParam);
9 | }
10 | 
11 | bool Window::Create(int width, int height, const char* title) {
12 |     WNDCLASS wc = { 0 };
13 |     wc.lpfnWndProc = WindowProc;
14 |     wc.hInstance = GetModuleHandle(nullptr);
15 |     wc.lpszClassName = "SecretEngineWin";
16 |     RegisterClass(&wc);
17 | 
18 |     // Added WS_VISIBLE to force the window to show immediately
19 |     m_hwnd = CreateWindowEx(0, wc.lpszClassName, title, 
20 |         WS_OVERLAPPEDWINDOW | WS_VISIBLE, 
21 |         CW_USEDEFAULT, CW_USEDEFAULT, width, height, 
22 |         nullptr, nullptr, wc.hInstance, nullptr);
23 | 
24 |     if (!m_hwnd) return false;
25 | 
26 |     // Ensure it comes to the front
27 |     SetForegroundWindow(m_hwnd);
28 |     SetFocus(m_hwnd);
29 |     
30 |     return true;
31 | }
32 | 
33 | void Window::PollEvents() {
34 |     MSG msg;
35 |     while (PeekMessage(&msg, nullptr, 0, 0, PM_REMOVE)) {
36 |         if (msg.message == WM_QUIT) m_shouldClose = true;
37 |         TranslateMessage(&msg);
38 |         DispatchMessage(&msg);
39 |     }
40 | }
41 | 
42 | VkSurfaceKHR Window::CreateSurface(VkInstance instance) {
43 |     VkWin32SurfaceCreateInfoKHR createInfo = { VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_WIN32_SURFACE_CREATE_INFO_KHR };
44 |     createInfo.hwnd = m_hwnd;
45 |     createInfo.hinstance = GetModuleHandle(nullptr);
46 |     VkSurfaceKHR surface;
47 |     vkCreateWin32SurfaceKHR(instance, &createInfo, nullptr, &surface);
48 |     return surface;
49 | }
50 | #elif defined(SE_PLATFORM_ANDROID)
51 | // Android Dummy Implementation - Window is managed by AndroidMain
52 | bool Window::Create(int width, int height, const char* title) { return true; }
53 | void Window::PollEvents() {}
54 | VkSurfaceKHR Window::CreateSurface(VkInstance instance) { return VK_NULL_HANDLE; }
55 | #endif
```

tools/AssetCooker/src/main.cpp
```
1 | #define TINYGLTF_IMPLEMENTATION
2 | #define STB_IMAGE_IMPLEMENTATION
3 | #define STB_IMAGE_WRITE_IMPLEMENTATION
4 | #include "tiny_gltf.h"
5 | #include <iostream>
6 | #include <fstream>
7 | #include <vector>
8 | #include <string>
9 | 
10 | struct Vertex3D {
11 |     float position[3];
12 |     float normal[3];
13 |     float uv[2];
14 | };
15 | 
16 | struct MeshHeader {
17 |     char magic[4]; // "MESH"
18 |     uint32_t version;
19 |     uint32_t vertexCount;
20 |     uint32_t indexCount;
21 |     float boundsMin[3];
22 |     float boundsMax[3];
23 | };
24 | 
25 | int main(int argc, char** argv) {
26 |     if (argc < 3) {
27 |         std::cout << "Usage: AssetCooker <input.gltf/glb> <output.meshbin>" << std::endl;
28 |         return 1;
29 |     }
30 | 
31 |     std::string inputPath = argv[1];
32 |     std::string outputPath = argv[2];
33 | 
34 |     tinygltf::Model model;
35 |     tinygltf::TinyGLTF loader;
36 |     std::string err, warn;
37 | 
38 |     bool ret = false;
39 |     if (inputPath.substr(inputPath.find_last_of(".") + 1) == "glb") {
40 |         ret = loader.LoadBinaryFromFile(&model, &err, &warn, inputPath);
41 |     } else {
42 |         ret = loader.LoadASCIIFromFile(&model, &err, &warn, inputPath);
43 |     }
44 | 
45 |     if (!warn.empty()) std::cout << "Warn: " << warn << std::endl;
46 |     if (!err.empty()) std::cerr << "Err: " << err << std::endl;
47 |     if (!ret) {
48 |         std::cerr << "Failed to parse glTF" << std::endl;
49 |         return 1;
50 |     }
51 | 
52 |     std::vector<Vertex3D> allVertices;
53 |     std::vector<uint32_t> allIndices;
54 | 
55 |     // Simplified: Just grab the first primitive of the first mesh
56 |     if (model.meshes.empty()) {
57 |         std::cerr << "No meshes found in glTF" << std::endl;
58 |         return 1;
59 |     }
60 | 
61 |     const auto& mesh = model.meshes[0];
62 |     for (const auto& primitive : mesh.primitives) {
63 |         // Position
64 |         const auto& posAccessor = model.accessors[primitive.attributes.at("POSITION")];
65 |         const auto& posBufferView = model.bufferViews[posAccessor.bufferView];
66 |         const auto& posBuffer = model.buffers[posBufferView.buffer];
67 |         const float* positions = reinterpret_cast<const float*>(&posBuffer.data[posBufferView.byteOffset + posAccessor.byteOffset]);
68 | 
69 |         // Normal
70 |         const float* normals = nullptr;
71 |         if (primitive.attributes.count("NORMAL")) {
72 |             const auto& normAccessor = model.accessors[primitive.attributes.at("NORMAL")];
73 |             const auto& normBufferView = model.bufferViews[normAccessor.bufferView];
74 |             const auto& normBuffer = model.buffers[normBufferView.buffer];
75 |             normals = reinterpret_cast<const float*>(&normBuffer.data[normBufferView.byteOffset + normAccessor.byteOffset]);
76 |         }
77 | 
78 |         // UV
79 |         const float* uvs = nullptr;
80 |         if (primitive.attributes.count("TEXCOORD_0")) {
81 |             const auto& uvAccessor = model.accessors[primitive.attributes.at("TEXCOORD_0")];
82 |             const auto& uvBufferView = model.bufferViews[uvAccessor.bufferView];
83 |             const auto& uvBuffer = model.buffers[uvBufferView.buffer];
84 |             uvs = reinterpret_cast<const float*>(&uvBuffer.data[uvBufferView.byteOffset + uvAccessor.byteOffset]);
85 |         }
86 | 
87 |         uint32_t vertexStart = (uint32_t)allVertices.size();
88 |         for (size_t i = 0; i < posAccessor.count; ++i) {
89 |             Vertex3D v;
90 |             v.position[0] = positions[i * 3 + 0];
91 |             v.position[1] = positions[i * 3 + 1];
92 |             v.position[2] = positions[i * 3 + 2];
93 | 
94 |             if (normals) {
95 |                 v.normal[0] = normals[i * 3 + 0];
96 |                 v.normal[1] = normals[i * 3 + 1];
97 |                 v.normal[2] = normals[i * 3 + 2];
98 |             } else {
99 |                 v.normal[0] = 0; v.normal[1] = 1; v.normal[2] = 0;
100 |             }
101 | 
102 |             if (uvs) {
103 |                 v.uv[0] = uvs[i * 2 + 0];
104 |                 v.uv[1] = uvs[i * 2 + 1];
105 |             } else {
106 |                 v.uv[0] = 0; v.uv[1] = 0;
107 |             }
108 |             allVertices.push_back(v);
109 |         }
110 | 
111 |         // Indices
112 |         const auto& indexAccessor = model.accessors[primitive.indices];
113 |         const auto& indexBufferView = model.bufferViews[indexAccessor.bufferView];
114 |         const auto& indexBuffer = model.buffers[indexBufferView.buffer];
115 |         
116 |         if (indexAccessor.componentType == TINYGLTF_COMPONENT_TYPE_UNSIGNED_SHORT) {
117 |             const uint16_t* indices = reinterpret_cast<const uint16_t*>(&indexBuffer.data[indexBufferView.byteOffset + indexAccessor.byteOffset]);
118 |             for (size_t i = 0; i < indexAccessor.count; ++i) allIndices.push_back(vertexStart + indices[i]);
119 |         } else if (indexAccessor.componentType == TINYGLTF_COMPONENT_TYPE_UNSIGNED_INT) {
120 |             const uint32_t* indices = reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t*>(&indexBuffer.data[indexBufferView.byteOffset + indexAccessor.byteOffset]);
121 |             for (size_t i = 0; i < indexAccessor.count; ++i) allIndices.push_back(vertexStart + indices[i]);
122 |         }
123 |     }
124 | 
125 |     // Write binary file
126 |     std::ofstream out(outputPath, std::ios::binary);
127 |     if (!out.is_open()) {
128 |         std::cerr << "Failed to open output file" << std::endl;
129 |         return 1;
130 |     }
131 | 
132 |     MeshHeader header;
133 |     header.magic[0] = 'M'; header.magic[1] = 'E'; header.magic[2] = 'S'; header.magic[3] = 'H';
134 |     header.version = 1;
135 |     header.vertexCount = (uint32_t)allVertices.size();
136 |     header.indexCount = (uint32_t)allIndices.size();
137 |     // Simplified bounds
138 |     header.boundsMin[0] = -1; header.boundsMin[1] = -1; header.boundsMin[2] = -1;
139 |     header.boundsMax[0] = 1; header.boundsMax[1] = 1; header.boundsMax[2] = 1;
140 | 
141 |     out.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&header), sizeof(header));
142 |     out.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(allVertices.data()), allVertices.size() * sizeof(Vertex3D));
143 |     out.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(allIndices.data()), allIndices.size() * sizeof(uint32_t));
144 |     out.close();
145 | 
146 |     std::cout << "Successfully cooked " << inputPath << " to " << outputPath << " (" << allVertices.size() << " verts, " << allIndices.size() << " indices)" << std::endl;
147 | 
148 |     return 0;
149 | }
```
